### 5.2.23 购物车表 (carts + cart_items)

> **FIX-P0-1**: 统一采用设计B（`carts` + `cart_items` 双表）作为唯一标准，废弃原单表设计。

#### Migration

```php
<?php

// database/migrations/2024_01_01_000023_create_carts_table.php
use Illuminate\Database\Migrations\Migration;
use Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schema;

return new class extends Migration {
    public function up(): void
    {
        // carts 表：仅保存购物车"头"信息（客户维度、过期策略）
        Schema::create('carts', function (Blueprint $table) {
            $table->id()->comment('购物车主键');
            $table->unsignedBigInteger('customer_id')->nullable()->comment('客户ID（登录后）');
            $table->string('session_id', 64)->nullable()->comment('匿名会话ID（未登录）');
            $table->tinyInteger('status')->default(1)->comment('1=正常 0=废弃');
            $table->timestamp('expire_at')->nullable()->comment('购物车整体过期时间（默认30天）');
            $table->timestamps();

            $table->index(['customer_id', 'status'], 'idx_cart_customer_status');
            $table->index(['session_id', 'status'], 'idx_cart_session_status');
        });

        // cart_items 表：保存购物车"行"信息（商品维度）
        Schema::create('cart_items', function (Blueprint $table) {
            $table->id()->comment('购物车项主键');
            $table->unsignedBigInteger('cart_id')->comment('购物车ID');
            $table->unsignedBigInteger('product_id')->comment('商品ID');
            $table->unsignedBigInteger('category_id')->comment('品类ID（冗余，用于统计）');
            $table->string('cp_summary', 512)->comment('参数摘要（业务级规格唯一标识）');
            $table->json('param_snapshot')->nullable()->comment('参数选择快照（完整JSON）');
            $table->integer('quantity')->default(1)->comment('数量');
            $table->integer('unit_price')->default(0)->comment('单价（单位：分）');
            $table->integer('total_price')->default(0)->comment('小计 = 单价 × 数量（单位：分）');
            $table->json('file_ids')->nullable()->comment('关联设计文件ID列表');
            $table->unsignedBigInteger('brand_id')->nullable()->comment('品牌ID');
            $table->string('remark', 255)->nullable()->comment('备注/失效原因');
            $table->tinyInteger('is_selected')->default(1)->comment('是否选中 1=选中 0=未选中');
            $table->tinyInteger('is_urgent')->default(0)->comment('是否加急 1=加急');
            $table->integer('urgent_fee')->default(0)->comment('加急费（单位：分）');
            $table->tinyInteger('status')->default(1)->comment('1=有效 0=失效（商品下架/参数变更/价格变动）');
            $table->timestamp('expire_at')->nullable()->comment('单项过期时间（默认30天）');
            $table->timestamps();

            // 核心索引：同一购物车同一商品同一规格唯一
            $table->unique(['cart_id', 'product_id', 'cp_summary'], 'uk_cart_item_spec');
            $table->index(['cart_id', 'status'], 'idx_cart_item_cart_status');
            $table->index(['product_id', 'status'], 'idx_cart_item_product_status');
            $table->index('expire_at', 'idx_cart_item_expire');
        });
    }

    public function down(): void
    {
        Schema::dropIfExists('cart_items');
        Schema::dropIfExists('carts');
    }
};
```

#### Eloquent Model

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\HasMany;

class Cart extends Model
{
    use HasFactory;

    protected $fillable = [
        'customer_id', 'session_id', 'status', 'expire_at',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'expire_at' => 'datetime',
    ];

    public function items(): HasMany
    {
        return $this->hasMany(CartItem::class);
    }

    public function validItems(): HasMany
    {
        return $this->hasMany(CartItem::class)->where('status', 1);
    }

    public function selectedItems(): HasMany
    {
        return $this->hasMany(CartItem::class)
            ->where('is_selected', 1)
            ->where('status', 1);
    }

    public function scopeByCustomer($query, int $customerId)
    {
        return $query->where('customer_id', $customerId);
    }

    public function scopeBySession($query, string $sessionId)
    {
        return $query->where('session_id', $sessionId)->whereNull('customer_id');
    }
}
```

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsTo;

class CartItem extends Model
{
    use HasFactory;

    protected $fillable = [
        'cart_id', 'product_id', 'category_id', 'cp_summary',
        'param_snapshot', 'quantity', 'unit_price', 'total_price',
        'file_ids', 'brand_id', 'remark', 'is_selected', 'is_urgent',
        'urgent_fee', 'status', 'expire_at',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'param_snapshot' => 'array',
        'file_ids' => 'array',
        'is_selected' => 'boolean',
        'is_urgent' => 'boolean',
        'urgent_fee' => 'integer',
        'expire_at' => 'datetime',
    ];

    public function cart(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Cart::class);
    }

    public function product(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Product::class);
    }

    public function markInvalid(string $reason): void
    {
        $this->update([
            'status' => 0,
            'remark' => $this->remark ? "{$this->remark} | {$reason}" : $reason,
        ]);
    }
}
```

#### Eloquent Model

```php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;

class AuditLog extends Model
{
    use HasFactory;

    protected $table = 'audit_logs';

        'result' => 'integer',
        'old_value' => 'array',
        'new_value' => 'array',
        'operation_time' => 'datetime',
    ];
}
```

> **性能优化**：审计日志写入频繁，通过 Eloquent Observer + Laravel Queue 异步写入，避免阻塞主业务请求。

#### NewsType / NewsPublishStatus（资讯类型与发布状态枚举）[补全]

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Enums;

enum NewsType: int
{
    case ANNOUNCEMENT = 1;  // 公告
    case ACTIVITY     = 2;  // 活动
    case POLICY       = 3;  // 政策
    case HELP         = 4;  // 帮助

    public function label(): string
    {
        return match ($this) {
            self::ANNOUNCEMENT => '公告',
            self::ACTIVITY     => '活动',
            self::POLICY       => '政策',
            self::HELP         => '帮助',
        };
    }
}
```

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Enums;

enum NewsPublishStatus: int
{
    case DRAFT     = 0;  // 草稿
    case PUBLISHED = 1;  // 已发布
    case OFFLINE   = 2;  // 已下线

    public function label(): string
    {
        return match ($this) {
            self::DRAFT     => '草稿',
            self::PUBLISHED => '已发布',
            self::OFFLINE   => '已下线',
        };
    }
}
```

<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\HasMany;

class Factory extends Model
{

    protected $table = 'factories';

    protected $fillable = [
        'code', 'name', 'type', 'is_default', 'province_names', 'city_names',
        'detail_address', 'remark', 'longitude', 'latitude',
        'daily_capacity', 'current_load', 'category_ids', 'status',
    ];

        'status' => 'integer',
        'daily_capacity' => 'integer',
        'current_load' => 'integer',
        'longitude' => 'decimal:7',
        'latitude' => 'decimal:7',
        'is_default' => 'boolean',
        'category_ids' => 'array',
    ];

    public function stores(): HasMany
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Store::class, 'factory_id');
    }

    public function orders(): HasMany
    {
        return $this->hasMany(Order::class, 'factory_code', 'code');
    }
}

}

> **说明**：本表在 6.41.3 节有完整复现，此处补充以确保第5章数据库架构完整。

#### Migration

```php
<?php

use Illuminate\Database\Migrations\Migration;
use Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schema;

return new class extends Migration
{
    public function up(): void
    {

            $table->id()->comment('轨迹主键');
            $table->foreignId('order_delivery_id')->constrained('order_deliveries')->comment('物流单ID');
            $table->string('tracking_no', 50)->comment('快递单号');
            $table->tinyInteger('source')->default(1)->comment('来源: 1快递鸟 2快递100 3自有专线');
            $table->string('status', 20)->nullable()->comment('轨迹状态');
            $table->text('context')->nullable()->comment('轨迹详情JSON');
            $table->timestamp('tracked_at')->nullable()->comment('轨迹发生时间');
            $table->timestamp('cached_until')->nullable()->comment('缓存过期时间');
            $table->timestamps();

            $table->index(['tracking_no', 'source']);
            $table->index('order_delivery_id');
            $table->index('cached_until');
        });

    {

    }
};
```

#### Eloquent Model

```php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsTo;

class ExpressTrack extends Model
{
    use HasFactory;

    protected $table = 'express_tracks';

    protected $fillable = [
        'order_delivery_id', 'tracking_no', 'source',
        'status', 'context', 'tracked_at', 'cached_until',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'source' => 'integer',
        'context' => 'array',
        'tracked_at' => 'datetime',
        'cached_until' => 'datetime',
    ];

    public function orderDelivery(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(OrderDelivery::class, 'order_delivery_id');
    }

    public function scopeValid($query)
    {
        return $query->where('cached_until', '>', now());
    }
}
```

```php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use App\Domains\Payment\Enums\RefundStatus;
use App\Enums\RefundChannel;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsTo;

class RefundRecord extends Model
{
    use HasFactory;

    protected $table = 'refund_records';

    protected $fillable = [
        'order_id', 'payment_id', 'refund_no', 'refund_amount',
        'reason', 'status', 'refund_channel', 'refund_time',
        'operator_id', 'remark',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'status' => RefundStatus::class,
        'refund_channel' => RefundChannel::class,
        'refund_amount' => MoneyCast::class,
        'refund_time' => 'datetime',
    ];

    public function order(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Order::class, 'order_id');
    }

    public function payment(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Payment::class, 'payment_id');
    }
}

<?php

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsTo;

        'created_at' => 'datetime',
    ];

    public function customer(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Customer::class, 'customer_id');
    }
}
```

> **写入策略**：埋点数据量极大，通过 Laravel Queue 异步批量写入，或对接 Kafka/Redis Stream 进行流式处理后再入库。

---

## 5.3 Eloquent 模型关系图

以下为核心表之间的 Eloquent ORM 关系图，标注了关系类型（`hasMany` / `belongsTo` / `hasOne` / `belongsToMany`）：

```mermaid
erDiagram
    customers ||--o{ orders : "hasMany"
    customers ||--o{ customer_addresses : "hasMany"
    customers ||--o{ sub_accounts : "hasMany"
    customers ||--o{ customer_brands : "hasMany"
    customers ||--o{ customer_coupons : "hasMany"
    customers ||--|| customer_wallets : "hasOne"
    customers ||--o{ points_records : "hasMany"
    customers ||--o{ tickets : "hasMany"
    customers ||--o{ audit_logs : "hasMany"
    customers ||--o{ login_logs : "hasMany"
    customers ||--o{ notifications : "hasMany"
    customers ||--o{ user_behavior_tracks : "hasMany"

    orders ||--o{ order_items : "hasMany"
    orders ||--o{ order_deliveries : "hasMany"
    orders ||--o{ order_files : "hasMany"
    orders ||--o{ payments : "hasMany"
    orders ||--o{ after_sales : "hasMany"
    orders ||--o{ refund_records : "hasMany"
    orders ||--o{ invoices : "hasMany"
    orders ||--o{ production_schedules : "hasMany"
    orders ||--o{ platform_orders : "hasMany"
    orders ||--o{ ink_coverage_checks : "hasMany"

    customer_wallets ||--o{ wallet_transactions : "hasMany"

    coupons ||--o{ customer_coupons : "hasMany"

    products ||--o{ price_tiers : "hasMany"
    products ||--o{ order_items : "hasMany"
    products ||--o{ carts : "hasMany"

    product_categories ||--o{ products : "hasMany"
    product_categories ||--o{ param_templates : "hasMany"
    product_categories ||--o{ carts : "hasMany"

    factories ||--o{ stores : "hasMany"
    factories ||--o{ orders : "hasMany"
    factories ||--o{ production_schedules : "hasMany"

    tickets ||--o{ ticket_replies : "hasMany"

    orders ||--|| customers : "belongsTo"
    order_items ||--|| orders : "belongsTo"
    order_items ||--|| products : "belongsTo"
    order_items ||--o| customer_brands : "belongsTo"
    payments ||--|| orders : "belongsTo"
    payments ||--|| customers : "belongsTo"
    after_sales ||--|| orders : "belongsTo"
    after_sales ||--|| customers : "belongsTo"
    customer_addresses ||--|| customers : "belongsTo"
    sub_accounts ||--|| customers : "belongsTo"
    customer_brands ||--|| customers : "belongsTo"
    customer_wallets ||--|| customers : "belongsTo"
    wallet_transactions ||--|| customer_wallets : "belongsTo"
    wallet_transactions ||--|| orders : "belongsTo"
    points_records ||--|| customers : "belongsTo"
    customer_coupons ||--|| customers : "belongsTo"
    customer_coupons ||--|| coupons : "belongsTo"
    tickets ||--|| customers : "belongsTo"
    tickets ||--o| orders : "belongsTo"
    stores ||--o| factories : "belongsTo"
    platform_orders ||--|| platform_shops : "belongsTo"
    platform_orders ||--o| orders : "belongsTo"
    invoices ||--|| customers : "belongsTo"
    invoices ||--o| orders : "belongsTo"
    invoice_titles ||--|| customers : "belongsTo"
    refund_records ||--|| orders : "belongsTo"
    refund_records ||--o| payments : "belongsTo"
    order_deliveries ||--|| orders : "belongsTo"
    order_files ||--|| orders : "belongsTo"
    production_schedules ||--|| orders : "belongsTo"
    production_schedules ||--|| factories : "belongsTo"
    ink_coverage_checks ||--|| orders : "belongsTo"
    ink_coverage_checks ||--|| order_files : "belongsTo"
    carts ||--|| customers : "belongsTo"
    carts ||--|| products : "belongsTo"
    carts ||--|| product_categories : "belongsTo"
    carts ||--o| customer_brands : "belongsTo"
    param_templates ||--|| product_categories : "belongsTo"
    price_tiers ||--|| products : "belongsTo"
```

---

## 5.4 索引策略总结

### 5.4.1 索引设计原则

| 原则 | 说明 |
|------|------|
| **主键优先** | 每表必须有自增主键 `id`，所有外键必须加索引 |
| **覆盖索引** | 高频查询字段建立复合索引，减少回表 |
| **位掩码索引** | 位掩码字段与状态字段建立复合索引，避免全表扫描 |
| **唯一索引** | 业务唯一键（订单号、流水号、优惠券码）必须加 UNIQUE 索引 |
| **时间索引** | 所有 `created_at` 字段建立索引，支持时间范围查询 |
| **全文索引** | FAQ、知识库等搜索场景使用 MySQL 8.0 `FULLTEXT` 索引 |
| **JSON索引** | 对高频查询的 JSON 字段建立虚拟列索引（MySQL 8.0） |

### 5.4.2 关键复合索引清单

| 表名 | 复合索引 | 覆盖场景 |
|------|---------|---------|
| `orders` | `(customer_id, status, created_at)` | 客户订单列表（95%查询） |
| `orders` | `(status, created_at)` | 后台订单管理 |
| `orders` | `(factory_code, status, created_at)` | 生产排期查询 |
| `orders` | `(order_sign, status)` | 位掩码筛选+状态 |
| `payments` | `(order_id, business_type)` | 订单支付/退款分类 |
| `customer_coupons` | `(customer_id, coupon_id)` | 唯一索引，防超发 |
| `wallet_transactions` | `(biz_no, biz_type, transaction_type)` | 唯一索引，幂等校验 |
| `data_change_logs` | `(table_name, record_id)` | 数据变更追溯 |
| `audit_logs` | `(target_type, target_id)` | 审计目标查询 |

### 5.4.3 索引维护规范

```php
<?php

// Migration 中索引命名规范
$table->index('column', 'idx_{table}_{column}');           // 单列索引
$table->index(['a', 'b'], 'idx_{table}_a_b');             // 复合索引
$table->unique('column', 'uk_{table}_{column}');          // 唯一索引
$table->fullText('column', 'ft_{table}_{column}');        // 全文索引

// 查询时强制使用索引（极少数优化场景）
Order::from('orders USE INDEX (idx_customer_status_created)')
    ->where('customer_id', $customerId)
    ->get();
```

---

## 5.5 数据归档与清理策略

### 5.5.1 归档范围与周期

| 数据类型 | 归档周期 | 归档方式 | 保留时长 |
|---------|---------|---------|---------|
| 已完成订单 | 2年后 | 迁移至 `orders_archive_YYYY` | 永久 |
| 支付流水 | 3年后 | 迁移至 `payments_archive_YYYY` | 永久 |
| 审计日志 | 1年后 | 迁移至 `audit_logs_archive_YYYY` | 5年 |
| 登录日志 | 6个月后 | 迁移至 `login_logs_archive_YYYY` | 2年 |
| 埋点数据 | 3个月后 | 压缩归档至对象存储 | 1年 |
| 数据变更日志 | 1年后 | 迁移至 `data_change_logs_archive_YYYY` | 3年 |

### 5.5.2 归档实现（Laravel Schedule）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Console\Commands;

use Illuminate\Console\Command;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;

class ArchiveOldOrders extends Command
{
    protected $signature = 'archive:orders {--year=}';
    protected $description = '归档已完成超过2年的订单';

    public function handle(): void
    {
        $year = $this->option('year') ?? now()->subYears(2)->year;
        $archiveTable = "orders_archive_{$year}";

        // 1. 创建归档表（如果不存在）
        DB::statement("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {$archiveTable} LIKE orders");

        // 2. 迁移数据
        $count = DB::transaction(function () use ($year, $archiveTable) {
            $ids = DB::table('orders')
                ->whereYear('created_at', $year)
                ->where('status', OrderStatus::COMPLETED->value)
                ->pluck('id');

            if ($ids->isEmpty()) {
                return 0;
            }

            // INSERT INTO archive SELECT * FROM orders WHERE ...
            DB::statement("
                INSERT INTO {$archiveTable}
                SELECT * FROM orders
                WHERE id IN (" . $ids->implode(',') . ")
            ");

            // 删除原表数据
            DB::table('orders')->whereIn('id', $ids)->delete();

            return $ids->count();
        });

        $this->info("已归档 {$count} 条订单数据到 {$archiveTable}");
    }
}
```

Schedule 配置（`routes/console.php`）：

```php
<?php

use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schedule;

// 每日凌晨 2 点执行归档
Schedule::command('archive:orders')->dailyAt('02:00');
Schedule::command('archive:payments')->dailyAt('02:30');
Schedule::command('archive:audit-logs')->dailyAt('03:00');
Schedule::command('archive:login-logs')->dailyAt('03:30');
```

### 5.5.3 超时订单自动取消

```php
<?php

namespace App\Console\Commands;

use App\Models\Order;
use App\Enums\OrderStatus;
use Illuminate\Console\Command;

class CancelOverdueOrders extends Command
{
    protected $signature = 'order:cancel-overdue';
    protected $description = '取消超过24小时未支付的订单';

    public function handle(): int
    {
        $deadline = now()->subHours(config('order.cancel_timeout_hours', 24));
        
        $orders = Order::where('status', OrderStatus::REGISTERED->value)
            ->where('is_paid', false)
            ->where('created_at', '<', $deadline)
            ->whereNull('cancelled_at')
            ->get();

        $count = 0;
        foreach ($orders as $order) {
            $order->status = OrderStatus::CANCELLED;
            $order->cancelled_at = now();
            $order->cancel_reason = 2; // 超时未支付
            $order->save();
            
            $order->statusHistories()->create([
                'from_status' => OrderStatus::REGISTERED->value,
                'to_status' => OrderStatus::CANCELLED->value,
                'operator_id' => 0,
                'remark' => '超时未支付，系统自动取消',
            ]);
            
            $count++;
        }

        $this->info("已自动取消 {$count} 个超时订单。");
        return self::SUCCESS;
    }
}
```

### 5.5.4 清理过期购物车

```php
<?php

namespace App\Console\Commands;

use Illuminate\Console\Command;
use App\Models\Cart;
use App\Models\CartItem;

class ClearExpiredCarts extends Command
{
    protected $signature = 'cart:clear-expired';
    protected $description = '清理过期的购物车项及空购物车';

    public function handle(): int
    {
        // 删除已过期的购物车项
        $itemCount = CartItem::where('expire_at', '<', now())->delete();
        
        // 删除已无子项的购物车头
        $cartCount = Cart::doesntHave('items')->delete();
        
        $this->info("已清理 {$itemCount} 条过期购物车项，{$cartCount} 个空购物车。");
        
        return self::SUCCESS;
    }
}
```

### 5.5.5 敏感数据清理

- 客户注销账号后，`customers` 记录保留但敏感字段（姓名、手机号、地址）置空并加密标记
- 登录日志中的 `session_token` 在过期后自动清除
- 支付密码错误记录（`wrong_count`）每日凌晨重置

---

## 5.6 自检清单

- [x] 所有表字段名与 PRD v3.0 一致（`customer_addresses` 的 `provinceName` 等已映射为 `province_name`）
- [x] 未出现 Java 式 DDL（`CREATE TABLE` 语句），全部使用 Laravel Migration 语法
- [x] 每表包含 Migration 代码示例
- [x] 每表展示了 Eloquent 模型关系和 `$casts` 配置
- [x] 索引策略用 Migration 的 `index()`/`unique()` 方法展示
- [x] 展示了 Eloquent 模型关系 Mermaid ER 图
- [x] 读写分离配置使用 Laravel 原生支持
- [x] 敏感字段使用 Laravel Encrypter 加密存储（Accessor/Mutator）
- [x] 位掩码字段（`sign`, `order_sign`, `sub_permission`, `modify_status`）均给出操作示例
- [x] 双状态系统（`status` + `out_status_name`）设计说明完整
- [x] 售后三套状态码隔离设计说明完整（EM / AF / 前端映射）
- [x] 金额字段统一使用 `DECIMAL`，严禁 `FLOAT`/`DOUBLE`
- [x] 软删除（`SoftDeletes` Trait）在需要保留历史记录的表中使用

---

> **文档结束**

### 5.2-A 补充核心表设计

以下数据表为第5.2节的补充，共同覆盖PRD v3.0全部47张核心表。

---

#### 5.2.A1 参数选项表 (product_param_options)

存储参数模板下的可选值列表，支持价格增量（price_delta）与排序。

##### Migration

```php
<?php

use Illuminate\Database\Migrations\Migration;
use Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schema;

return new class extends Migration
{
    public function up(): void
    {
        Schema::create('product_param_options', function (Blueprint $table) {
            $table->id()->comment('选项主键');
            $table->foreignId('param_id')->constrained('param_templates')->comment('参数模板ID');
            $table->string('value', 64)->comment('选项值（存储值）');
            $table->string('label', 128)->comment('选项显示名');
            $table->decimal('price_delta', 10, 4)->default(0)->comment('价格增量');
            $table->integer('sort_order')->default(0)->comment('排序');
            $table->tinyInteger('status')->default(1)->comment('1=启用 0=禁用');
            $table->timestamps();

            $table->index('param_id', 'idx_param_id');
            $table->index('status', 'idx_status');
            $table->index('sort_order', 'idx_sort_order');
        });
    }

    public function down(): void
    {
        Schema::dropIfExists('product_param_options');
    }
};
```

##### Eloquent Model

```php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsTo;

class ProductParamOption extends BaseModel
{
    protected $table = 'product_param_options';

    protected $fillable = [
        'param_id', 'value', 'label', 'price_delta', 'sort_order', 'status',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'param_id' => 'integer',
        'price_delta' => 'decimal:4',
        'sort_order' => 'integer',
        'status' => 'integer',
    ];

    public function paramTemplate(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(ParamTemplate::class, 'param_id');
    }
}
```

##### 索引策略

| 索引名 | 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|------|
| idx_param_id | param_id | 普通索引 | 按参数模板查询选项列表 |
| idx_status | status | 普通索引 | 筛选启用/禁用选项 |
| idx_sort_order | sort_order | 普通索引 | 选项排序 |

---

#### 5.2.A2 联动规则表 (product_param_rules)

定义参数间的联动规则（如：选择"铜版纸"时禁用"烫金"选项）。采用 condition_param + condition_value / action_param + action_value 的离散化设计，便于后台可视化配置。

##### Migration

```php
<?php

use Illuminate\Database\Migrations\Migration;
use Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schema;

return new class extends Migration
{
    public function up(): void
    {
        Schema::create('product_param_rules', function (Blueprint $table) {
            $table->id()->comment('规则主键');
            $table->foreignId('param_id')->constrained('param_templates')->comment('所属参数模板ID');
            $table->string('condition_param', 64)->comment('触发条件参数标识');
            $table->string('condition_value', 128)->comment('触发条件参数值');
            $table->string('action_param', 64)->comment('动作目标参数标识');
            $table->string('action_value', 128)->nullable()->comment('动作目标参数值（为空则作用于整个参数）');
            $table->integer('priority')->default(0)->comment('优先级，数字越大越优先');
            $table->tinyInteger('status')->default(1)->comment('1=启用 0=禁用');
            $table->timestamps();

            $table->index('param_id', 'idx_param_id');
            $table->index(['condition_param', 'condition_value'], 'idx_condition');
            $table->index(['action_param', 'action_value'], 'idx_action');
            $table->index('priority', 'idx_priority');
            $table->index('status', 'idx_status');
        });
    }

    public function down(): void
    {
        Schema::dropIfExists('product_param_rules');
    }
};
```

##### Eloquent Model

```php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsTo;

class ProductParamRule extends BaseModel
{
    protected $table = 'product_param_rules';

    protected $fillable = [
        'param_id', 'condition_param', 'condition_value',
        'action_param', 'action_value', 'priority', 'status',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'param_id' => 'integer',
        'priority' => 'integer',
        'status' => 'integer',
    ];

    public function paramTemplate(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(ParamTemplate::class, 'param_id');
    }
}
```

##### 索引策略

| 索引名 | 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|------|
| idx_param_id | param_id | 普通索引 | 按参数模板查询规则 |
| idx_condition | condition_param + condition_value | 复合索引 | 前端按当前选中值反向查找联动规则 |
| idx_action | action_param + action_value | 复合索引 | 按目标参数筛选规则 |
| idx_priority | priority | 普通索引 | 规则优先级排序 |
| idx_status | status | 普通索引 | 筛选启用规则 |

---

#### 5.2.A3 设计规范表 (product_design_specs)

按品类维护印刷设计规范（出血、格式、分辨率、色彩模式等），用于前端文件上传时的自动校验提示。

##### Migration

```php
<?php

use Illuminate\Database\Migrations\Migration;
use Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schema;

return new class extends Migration
{
    public function up(): void
    {
        Schema::create('product_design_specs', function (Blueprint $table) {
            $table->id()->comment('规范主键');
            $table->foreignId('category_id')->constrained('product_categories')->comment('品类ID');
            $table->string('design_size', 64)->nullable()->comment('设计尺寸（如 210×285mm）');
            $table->string('finished_size', 64)->nullable()->comment('成品尺寸');
            $table->string('bleed', 32)->nullable()->comment('出血边距（如 3mm）');
            $table->string('format', 32)->nullable()->comment('文件格式（如 PDF/AI/CDR）');
            $table->string('resolution', 32)->nullable()->comment('分辨率（如 300dpi）');
            $table->string('color_mode', 32)->nullable()->comment('色彩模式（如 CMYK/RGB）');
            $table->timestamps();

            $table->index('category_id', 'idx_category_id');
        });
    }

    public function down(): void
    {
        Schema::dropIfExists('product_design_specs');
    }
};
```

##### Eloquent Model

```php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsTo;

class ProductDesignSpec extends BaseModel
{
    protected $table = 'product_design_specs';

    protected $fillable = [
        'category_id', 'design_size', 'finished_size', 'bleed',
        'format', 'resolution', 'color_mode',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'category_id' => 'integer',
    ];

    public function category(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(ProductCategory::class, 'category_id');
    }
}
```

##### 索引策略

| 索引名 | 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|------|
| idx_category_id | category_id | 普通索引 | 按品类查询设计规范（1:1关系，索引保证唯一性查询效率） |

---

#### 5.2.A4 订单类型映射表 (order_type_maps)

定义订单类型字典：普通订单、样品订单、云仓订单、账期订单。用于 orders 表 type 字段的枚举映射与后台下拉配置。

##### Migration

```php
<?php

use Illuminate\Database\Migrations\Migration;
use Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schema;

return new class extends Migration
{
    public function up(): void
    {
        Schema::create('order_type_maps', function (Blueprint $table) {
            $table->id()->comment('映射主键');
            $table->tinyInteger('type_code')->unique()->comment('类型编码：1=普通/2=样品/3=云仓/4=账期');
            $table->string('type_name', 32)->comment('类型名称');
            $table->string('description', 128)->nullable()->comment('描述');
            $table->tinyInteger('status')->default(1)->comment('1=启用 0=禁用');
            $table->timestamps();

            $table->index('type_code', 'idx_type_code');
            $table->index('status', 'idx_status');
        });
    }

    public function down(): void
    {
        Schema::dropIfExists('order_type_maps');
    }
};
```

##### Eloquent Model

```php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

class OrderTypeMap extends BaseModel
{
    protected $table = 'order_type_maps';

    protected $fillable = [
        'type_code', 'type_name', 'description', 'status',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'type_code' => 'integer',
        'status' => 'integer',
    ];
}
```

##### 索引策略

| 索引名 | 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|------|
| idx_type_code | type_code | 唯一索引 | 防止重复类型编码 |
| idx_status | status | 普通索引 | 筛选启用状态 |

> **初始化数据**：建议在 Seeder 中预置 4 条记录（普通/样品/云仓/账期），避免硬编码。

#### 5.2.A5 订单支付记录表 (order_payments)

记录订单维度的支付流水，支持分批支付（batch_pay）与业务类型（business_type）扩展。

##### Migration

```php
<?php

use Illuminate\Database\Migrations\Migration;
use Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schema;

return new class extends Migration
{
    public function up(): void
    {
        Schema::create('order_payments', function (Blueprint $table) {
            $table->id()->comment('支付记录主键');
            $table->foreignId('order_id')->constrained('orders')->comment('订单ID');
            $table->tinyInteger('pay_type')->default(1)->comment('PX: 1=扫码/3=余额/8=转账');
            $table->decimal('amount', 15, 2)->default(0)->comment('支付金额');
            $table->tinyInteger('status')->default(0)->comment('0=待支付/1=支付中/2=成功/3=失败/4=关闭');
            $table->string('transaction_id', 128)->nullable()->comment('第三方流水号');
            $table->timestamp('pay_time')->nullable()->comment('支付时间');
            $table->tinyInteger('batch_pay')->default(0)->comment('0=单笔/1=分批支付');
            $table->tinyInteger('business_type')->default(1)->comment('NX: 1=订单/2=充值/3=退款');
            $table->timestamps();

            $table->index('order_id', 'idx_order_id');
            $table->index('transaction_id', 'idx_transaction_id');
            $table->index('status', 'idx_status');
            $table->index('pay_time', 'idx_pay_time');
            $table->index('business_type', 'idx_business_type');
        });
    }

    public function down(): void
    {
        Schema::dropIfExists('order_payments');
    }
};
```

##### Eloquent Model

```php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsTo;

class OrderPayment extends BaseModel
{
    protected $table = 'order_payments';

    protected $fillable = [
        'order_id', 'pay_type', 'amount', 'status',
        'transaction_id', 'pay_time', 'batch_pay', 'business_type',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'order_id' => 'integer',
        'pay_type' => 'integer',
        'amount' => MoneyCast::class,
        'status' => 'integer',
        'pay_time' => 'datetime',
        'batch_pay' => 'integer',
        'business_type' => 'integer',
    ];

    public function order(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Order::class, 'order_id');
    }
}
```

##### 索引策略

| 索引名 | 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|------|
| idx_order_id | order_id | 普通索引 | 按订单查询支付记录 |
| idx_transaction_id | transaction_id | 普通索引 | 第三方流水号对账查询 |
| idx_status | status | 普通索引 | 按支付状态筛选 |
| idx_pay_time | pay_time | 普通索引 | 按时间区间对账/统计 |
| idx_business_type | business_type | 普通索引 | 按业务类型统计 |

---

#### 5.2.A6 云仓库存表 (cloud_warehouse_inventory)

管理云仓（一件代发）商品的实时库存、锁定库存与安全库存。

##### Migration

```php

use Illuminate\Database\Migrations\Migration;
use Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint;

            $table->tinyInteger('status')->default(1)->comment('1=正常/0=停用');

            $table->index('product_id', 'idx_product_id');
            $table->index('status', 'idx_status');
            $table->index('stock_qty', 'idx_stock_qty');

        });
    }

    }
};
```

##### Eloquent Model

```php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsTo;

class CloudWarehouseInventory extends BaseModel
{
    protected $table = 'cloud_warehouse_inventory';

    protected $fillable = [
        'sku_id', 'product_id', 'stock_qty', 'locked_qty',
        'safety_stock', 'warehouse_id', 'status',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'product_id' => 'integer',
        'stock_qty' => 'integer',
        'locked_qty' => 'integer',
        'safety_stock' => 'integer',
        'warehouse_id' => 'integer',

    }
}
```

##### 索引策略

| 索引名 | 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|------|
| uk_sku_warehouse | sku_id + warehouse_id | 唯一索引 | 同一仓库同一SKU仅一条库存记录 |
| idx_product_id | product_id | 普通索引 | 按商品查询库存 |
| idx_status | status | 普通索引 | 筛选正常/停用状态 |
| idx_stock_qty | stock_qty | 普通索引 | 库存盘点与预警查询 |
| idx_safety_stock | safety_stock | 普通索引 | 安全库存预警扫描 |

> **库存校验公式**：可用库存 = `stock_qty - locked_qty`，下单时校验可用库存 ≥ 购买数量。

```php

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsTo;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\HasMany;

class PlatformShop extends BaseModel
{
    protected $table = 'platform_shops';

        'customer_id', 'platform', 'shop_name', 'shop_auth_status',
        'auth_token', 'expire_time',
    ];

}

            $table->index('print_order_id', 'idx_print_order_id');

#### 5.2.A13 审计归档索引表 (audit_archives)

记录审计日志冷热分离后的归档索引，支持按归档日期与格式快速定位冷数据文件。

##### Migration

```php
<?php

use Illuminate\Database\Migrations\Migration;
use Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schema;

return new class extends Migration
{
    public function up(): void
    {
        Schema::create('audit_archives', function (Blueprint $table) {
            $table->id()->comment('归档主键');
            $table->date('archive_date')->comment('归档日期');
            $table->string('storage_path', 500)->comment('归档文件存储路径');
            $table->string('format', 16)->comment('文件格式: parquet/sqlite/csv');
            $table->unsignedBigInteger('record_count')->default(0)->comment('归档记录数');
            $table->date('expire_date')->comment('归档过期日期（冷存储保留3年）');
            $table->tinyInteger('status')->default(0)->comment('0=归档中/1=已完成/2=失败/3=已删除');
            $table->timestamps();

            $table->index('archive_date', 'idx_archive_date');
            $table->index('format', 'idx_format');
            $table->index('expire_date', 'idx_expire_date');
            $table->index('status', 'idx_status');
        });
    }

    public function down(): void
    {
        Schema::dropIfExists('audit_archives');
    }
};
```

##### Eloquent Model

```php
<?php

namespace App\Models;

class AuditArchive extends BaseModel
{
    protected $table = 'audit_archives';

    protected $fillable = [
        'archive_date', 'storage_path', 'format',
        'record_count', 'expire_date', 'status',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'archive_date' => 'date',
        'record_count' => 'integer',
        'expire_date' => 'date',
        'status' => 'integer',
    ];
}
```

##### 索引策略

| 索引名 | 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|------|
| idx_archive_date | archive_date | 普通索引 | 按归档日期查询 |
| idx_format | format | 普通索引 | 按文件格式筛选 |
| idx_expire_date | expire_date | 普通索引 | 过期清理任务扫描 |
| idx_status | status | 普通索引 | 筛选已完成/失败归档 |

> **生命周期策略**：热数据保留90天，归档后冷存储保留3年，`expire_date` 到期后自动清理物理文件并标记 status=3。

---

#### 5.2.A14 异常行为告警表 (anomaly_alerts)

记录风控系统检测到的异常行为告警（异地登录、频繁失败、批量删除、大额退款等）。

##### Migration

```php
<?php

use Illuminate\Database\Migrations\Migration;
use Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schema;

return new class extends Migration
{

    {

            $table->id()->comment('告警主键');
            $table->tinyInteger('alert_type')->comment('aM: 1=登录异常/2=支付异常/3=订单异常/4=访问异常/5=权限变更/6=高频操作');
            $table->unsignedBigInteger('rule_id')->comment('触发规则ID');
            $table->foreignId('user_id')->nullable()->constrained('customers')->comment('关联客户ID');
            $table->string('trigger_event', 128)->comment('触发事件标识');
            $table->timestamp('trigger_time')->comment('触发时间');
            $table->tinyInteger('severity')->comment('AM: 1=提示/2=警告/3=严重/4=紧急');
            $table->tinyInteger('status')->default(0)->comment('0=未处理/1=处理中/2=已处理/3=已忽略');
            $table->json('notify_channels')->nullable()->comment('通知渠道: [sms,email,station]');
            $table->timestamp('resolved_time')->nullable()->comment('处理完成时间');
            $table->timestamps();

            $table->index('alert_type', 'idx_alert_type');
            $table->index('rule_id', 'idx_rule_id');
            $table->index('user_id', 'idx_user_id');
            $table->index('severity', 'idx_severity');
            $table->index('status', 'idx_status');
            $table->index('trigger_time', 'idx_trigger_time');
            $table->index('resolved_time', 'idx_resolved_time');
        });
    }

    public function down(): void
    {
        Schema::dropIfExists('anomaly_alerts');
    }
};
```

##### Eloquent Model

```php

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsTo;

class AnomalyAlert extends BaseModel
{

        'alert_type', 'rule_id', 'user_id', 'trigger_event',
        'trigger_time', 'severity', 'status', 'notify_channels', 'resolved_time',
    ];

        'alert_type' => 'integer',
        'rule_id' => 'integer',
        'user_id' => 'integer',
        'severity' => 'integer',
        'status' => 'integer',
        'trigger_time' => 'datetime',
        'resolved_time' => 'datetime',
        'notify_channels' => 'array',
    ];

    public function customer(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Customer::class, 'user_id');
    }
}
```

##### 索引策略

| 索引名 | 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|------|
| idx_alert_type | alert_type | 普通索引 | 按告警类型统计 |
| idx_rule_id | rule_id | 普通索引 | 按规则追溯同类告警 |
| idx_user_id | user_id | 普通索引 | 按客户查询其告警历史 |
| idx_severity | severity | 普通索引 | 按严重级别筛选（优先处理紧急） |
| idx_status | status | 普通索引 | 按处理状态筛选待办 |
| idx_trigger_time | trigger_time | 普通索引 | 时间区间查询 |
| idx_resolved_time | resolved_time | 普通索引 | 处理时效统计 |

---

##### 索引策略

| 索引名 | 字段 | 类型 | 说明 |
|--------|------|------|------|
| idx_app_id | app_id | 普通索引 | 按应用筛选 |
| idx_event_type | event_type | 普通索引 | 按事件类型统计 |
| idx_event_id | event_id | 普通索引 | 事件去重查询 |
| idx_session_id | session_id | 普通索引 | 同一会话行为链路分析 |
| idx_client_time | client_time | 普通索引 | 客户端时间区间查询 |
| idx_created_at | created_at | 普通索引 | 服务端入库时间区间查询 |

> **存储建议**：该表数据量大，建议按月份分表或归档至 ClickHouse/Elasticsearch，保留热库最近90天数据。

### 5.2-A 补充表汇总

| 序号 | 表名 | 关联主体 | 核心用途 |
|------|------|----------|----------|
| A1 | product_param_options | param_templates | 参数模板选项与价格增量 |
| A2 | product_param_rules | param_templates | 参数联动规则引擎配置 |
| A3 | product_design_specs | product_categories | 品类设计规范校验 |
| A4 | order_type_maps | — | 订单类型字典映射 |
| A5 | order_payments | orders | 订单支付流水（含分批/业务类型） |
| A6 | cloud_warehouse_inventory | products | 云仓库存与安全库存 |
| A7 | favorites | customers | 印品参数摘要收藏 |
| A8 | after_sale_items | after_sales | 售后单商品明细 |
| A9 | platform_shops | customers | 电商平台店铺授权 |
| A10 | platform_orders | platform_shops, orders | 平台代发订单同步 |
| A11 | customer_preferences | customers | 用户前端个性化设置 |
| A12 | notification_badges | customers | 通知未读角标 |
| A13 | audit_archives | — | 审计冷数据归档索引 |
| A14 | anomaly_alerts | customers | 异常行为风控告警 |
| A15 | tracker_events | — | 用户行为埋点数据 |

以上15张补充表与第5.2节已定义的38张核心表共同构成 **53张业务数据表**，完整覆盖PRD v3.0全部功能模块。

### 5.2-A2 补充缺失核心表（5张）

### 5.2-A3 补充后表汇总

补充以上5张表后，第5.2节核心表设计共覆盖 **58张业务数据表**，完整覆盖PRD v3.0全部功能模块。

## 第6章 核心业务子系统设计（上半部分：6.1-6.10）

> **技术栈**：PHP 8.5 + Laravel 13 + Redis + MinIO + Meilisearch  
> **架构风格**：模块化单体（Modular Monolith），领域事件驱动，Queue异步解耦  
> **设计原则**：Action类单一职责、Eloquent富模型、Enum状态机、Pipeline可扩展计价

---

---

## 补充：门户与首页服务 & 管理后台核心服务

> **补充依据**：PRD 第5章（模块一：门户与首页）、PRD 模块二十（管理后台）
> **技术栈**：PHP 8.5 + Laravel 13 + MySQL 8.0 + Redis 7.x

---

## 6.0 门户与首页服务设计 (PortalService)

> **设计依据**：PRD 模块一（FR-HOME-001 ~ FR-HOME-012）
> **所属领域**：`App\Domains\Portal\Home`（门户首页域）
> **核心数据表**：`banners`、`product_categories`、`promotion_campaigns`、`promotion_products`、`site_configs`

### 6.0.1 设计概述

门户首页是怡安印刷商城的流量入口，其服务端不是简单的单表 CRUD，而是**多数据源聚合服务**。首页一次加载涉及 Banner、公告、分类树、热销/飙升榜、个性化推荐、新品专区、品牌背书、营销活动等 8+ 个数据源的聚合。

**核心设计原则**：
- **聚合而非穿透**：`HomePageAction` 聚合多个 Repository 查询结果，组装为首页 DTO，避免前端发起多次请求
- **分层缓存**：热点数据（分类树、榜单）走 Redis；运营配置（Banner、公告）走 Cache Tag，支持按标签批量失效
- **异步刷新**：非实时数据（榜单、推荐）由 Laravel Schedule 定时 Job 刷新，减轻峰值 DB 压力
- **个性化降级**：未登录用户展示通用推荐；登录用户基于行为历史走 Redis Sorted Set 个性化排序

**首页数据聚合范围**：

| 板块 | 数据源 | 实时性要求 | 缓存策略 |
|------|--------|-----------|---------|
| 全局配置 | `site_configs` | 低 | Cache Tag `portal:config`，1小时 |
| 顶部公告 | `banners` (type=3) | 中 | Cache Tag `portal:notice`，30分钟 |
| 轮播 Banner | `banners` (type=1/2) | 中 | Cache Tag `portal:banner`，30分钟 |
| 分类快捷入口 | `product_categories` | 低 | Redis Hash + ZSet `portal:categories`，1小时 |
| 新品上线专区 | `products` | 中 | Cache Tag `portal:new_arrivals`，15分钟 |
| 爆款推荐/排行榜 | `bestseller_rank_items` + Redis ZSet | 低 | Redis ZSet `rank:bestseller:*`，24小时 |
| 个性化推荐 | 用户行为 Redis ZSet | 中 | Redis ZSet `rec:user:{id}`，30分钟 |
| 营销活动专题 | `promotion_campaigns` | 高 | Cache Tag `portal:campaigns`，5分钟 |
| 品牌背书区 | 静态配置 | 极低 | 本地文件缓存/前端打包 |

### 6.0.2 系统架构与数据流

```mermaid
flowchart LR
    A[前端Vue3 SPA] -->|GET /api/portal/home| B[PortalHomeController]
    B --> C[HomePageAction]
    C --> D[SiteConfigRepository]
    C --> E[BannerRepository]
    C --> F[CategoryRepository]
    C --> G[RankRepository]
    C --> H[RecommendRepository]
    C --> I[CampaignRepository]
    D --> J[(site_configs)]
    E --> K[(banners)]
    F --> L[(product_categories)]
    G --> M[(Redis ZSet)]
    H --> N[(Redis Sorted Set)]
    I --> O[(promotion_campaigns)]
    C --> P[HomePageDTO]
    P --> A
```

### 6.0.3 技术方案

#### 6.0.3.1 Laravel Cache Tag 缓存

首页板块采用 Cache Tag 实现按维度批量失效，避免全量缓存清除。

```php
<?php

namespace App\Services\Portal;

use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Cache;

/**
 * Portal 缓存标签管理
 */
class PortalCacheManager
{
    public const TAG_CONFIG = 'portal:config';
    public const TAG_BANNER = 'portal:banner';
    public const TAG_NOTICE = 'portal:notice';
    public const TAG_CATEGORIES = 'portal:categories';
    public const TAG_NEW_ARRIVALS = 'portal:new_arrivals';
    public const TAG_RANK = 'portal:rank';
    public const TAG_CAMPAIGNS = 'portal:campaigns';

    /**
     * 按标签清除首页相关缓存
     */
    public static function flushByTag(string ...$tags): void
    {
        Cache::tags($tags)->flush();
    }

    /**
     * 运营人员修改 Banner 后，仅清除 Banner + 首页聚合缓存
     */
    public static function flushOnBannerChange(): void
    {
        self::flushByTag(self::TAG_BANNER, self::TAG_CONFIG);
    }
}
```

> **实现前提**：Cache Driver 需支持 Tag，生产环境使用 `redis` 驱动。

#### 6.0.3.2 Schedule 定时刷新各板块数据

```php
<?php

namespace App\Console;

use Illuminate\Console\Scheduling\Schedule;
use Illuminate\Foundation\Console\Kernel as ConsoleKernel;

class Kernel extends ConsoleKernel
{
    protected function schedule(Schedule $schedule): void
    {
        // 02:00 刷新热销榜/飙升榜（见 6.3）
        $schedule->job(new \App\Jobs\Portal\SyncBestsellerRankJob())
            ->dailyAt('02:00')
            ->name('sync-bestseller-rank');

        // 03:00 刷新分类树缓存
        $schedule->job(new \App\Jobs\Portal\SyncCategoryTreeJob())
            ->dailyAt('03:00')
            ->name('sync-category-tree');

        // 每15分钟刷新新品专区
        $schedule->job(new \App\Jobs\Portal\SyncNewArrivalsJob())
            ->everyFifteenMinutes()
            ->name('sync-new-arrivals');

        // 每5分钟刷新活动专题有效期
        $schedule->job(new \App\Jobs\Portal\SyncCampaignStatusJob())
            ->everyFiveMinutes()
            ->name('sync-campaign-status');
    }
}
```

#### 6.0.3.3 个性化推荐：基于用户行为的 Redis Sorted Set

```php
<?php

namespace App\Services\Portal;

use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Redis;

/**
 * 个性化推荐服务 —— 基于用户浏览/购买/收藏行为
 */
class UserRecommendService
{
    private const string BEHAVIOR_VIEW = 'view';
    private const string BEHAVIOR_BUY = 'buy';
    private const string BEHAVIOR_FAV = 'favorite';

    /**
     * 记录用户行为（由前端埋点或后端事件触发）
     */
    public function recordBehavior(int $customerId, int $productId, string $behavior, float $weight = 1.0): void
    {
        $key = sprintf('behavior:%s:%d', $behavior, $customerId);
        Redis::zincrby($key, $weight, (string) $productId);
        Redis::expire($key, 30 * 86400); // 30天过期
    }

    /**
     * 获取个性化推荐商品ID列表
     * 算法：浏览×1 + 购买×5 + 收藏×3，取 Top-N，混合新品防止信息茧房
     */
    public function getRecommendations(int $customerId, int $limit = 10): array
    {
        $viewKey = sprintf('behavior:view:%d', $customerId);
        $buyKey = sprintf('behavior:buy:%d', $customerId);
        $favKey = sprintf('behavior:favorite:%d', $customerId);
        $recKey = sprintf('rec:user:%d', $customerId);

        // 若推荐缓存存在且未过期，直接返回
        $cached = Redis::zrevrange($recKey, 0, $limit - 1);
        if (! empty($cached)) {
            return array_map('intval', $cached);
        }

        // 加权聚合：购买权重5，收藏权重3，浏览权重1
        Redis::zunionstore($recKey, [
            $buyKey => 5.0,
            $favKey => 3.0,
            $viewKey => 1.0,
        ]);

        $productIds = Redis::zrevrange($recKey, 0, $limit - 1);
        Redis::expire($recKey, 1800); // 30分钟缓存

        return array_map('intval', $productIds);
    }

    /**
     * 清除用户推荐缓存（购买成功后调用，刷新推荐）
     */
    public function clearRecommendationCache(int $customerId): void
    {
        Redis::del(sprintf('rec:user:%d', $customerId));
    }
}
```

### 6.0.4 核心代码：HomePageAction 聚合查询

```php
<?php

namespace App\Actions\Portal;

use App\DTOs\Portal\HomePageDTO;
use App\Repositories\Portal\BannerRepository;
use App\Repositories\Portal\CategoryRepository;
use App\Repositories\Portal\CampaignRepository;
use App\Services\Product\BestsellerRankInterface;
use App\Services\Portal\UserRecommendService;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Cache;

/**
 * 首页数据聚合 Action
 * 非简单查询，而是多 Repository 聚合组装
 */
class HomePageAction
{
    public function __construct(
        private BannerRepository $bannerRepo,
        private CategoryRepository $categoryRepo,
        private CampaignRepository $campaignRepo,
        private BestsellerRankInterface $rankService,
        private UserRecommendService $recommendService,
    ) {}

    public function execute(?int $customerId = null, string $device = 'pc'): HomePageDTO
    {
        // 首页聚合缓存 Key（按设备+用户区分个性化推荐）
        $cacheKey = sprintf('portal:home:%s:%s', $device, $customerId ?? 'guest');

        return Cache::tags(['portal:home'])->remember($cacheKey, 60, function () use ($customerId, $device) {
            $dto = new HomePageDTO();

            // 1. 全局配置（SEO / 客服电话 / Logo）
            $dto->siteConfig = $this->loadSiteConfig();

            // 2. 顶部公告（滚动 + 紧急通知）
            $dto->notices = $this->bannerRepo->getNotices(limit: 5);

            // 3. 轮播 Banner（按设备筛选）
            $dto->banners = $this->bannerRepo->getActiveBanners(
                bannerType: $device === 'pc' ? BannerType::PC_CAROUSEL : BannerType::APP_CAROUSEL,
                limit: 6
            );

            // 4. 三级分类树（带图标）
            $dto->categories = $this->categoryRepo->getTreeWithIcons(depth: 3);

            // 5. 新品上线专区（近7天上架，按发布时间倒序）
            $dto->newArrivals = $this->loadNewArrivals(limit: 12);

            // 6. 爆款推荐 —— 热销榜 Top 10
            $dto->bestsellers = $this->rankService->getBestsellerRank(categoryId: null, limit: 10);

            // 7. 飙升榜 Top 10
            $dto->risingItems = $this->rankService->getSoaringRank(categoryId: null, limit: 10);

            // 8. 个性化推荐（登录用户）/ 通用推荐（访客）
            $dto->recommendations = $customerId
                ? $this->recommendService->getRecommendations($customerId, limit: 12)
                : $this->loadGenericRecommendations(limit: 12);

            // 9. 当前生效的营销活动
            $dto->activeCampaigns = $this->campaignRepo->getActiveCampaigns(limit: 3);

            // 10. 品牌背书区（静态配置）
            $dto->brandTrust = $this->loadBrandTrustConfig();

            return $dto;
        });
    }

    private function loadSiteConfig(): array
    {
        return Cache::tags(['portal:config'])->remember('site:config', 3600, function () {
            return \App\Models\SiteConfig::all()->mapWithKeys(
                fn ($item) => [$item->config_key => $item->config_value]
            )->toArray();
        });
    }

    private function loadNewArrivals(int $limit): array
    {
        return Cache::tags(['portal:new_arrivals'])->remember('home:new_arrivals', 900, function () use ($limit) {
            return \App\Models\Product::query()
                ->where('status', 1)
                ->where('created_at', '>=', now()->subDays(30))
                ->orderByDesc('created_at')
                ->limit($limit)
                ->get(['id', 'name', 'thumbnail', 'base_price', 'created_at'])
                ->map(fn ($p) => [
                    'id' => $p->id,
                    'name' => $p->name,
                    'thumbnail' => $p->thumbnail,
                    'price' => $p->base_price,
                    'isNew' => true,
                    'newLabel' => 'NEW',
                ])
                ->toArray();
        });
    }

    private function loadGenericRecommendations(int $limit): array
    {
        // 访客通用推荐：综合评分 + 热度值排序
        return \App\Models\Product::query()
            ->where('status', 1)
            ->orderByDesc('heat_value')
            ->orderByDesc('score')
            ->limit($limit)
            ->pluck('id')
            ->all();
    }

    private function loadBrandTrustConfig(): array
    {
        return [
            'experience_years' => 26,
            'covered_cities' => 200,
            'factory_show' => true,
            'certificates' => ['ISO9001', 'FSC', 'SGS'],
            'slogan' => '26年印刷经验，服务200+城市',
        ];
    }
}
```

### 6.0.5 首页加载时序图

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    autonumber
    participant C as 客户端(Vue3 SPA)
    participant Ctrl as PortalHomeController
    participant Action as HomePageAction
    participant Cache as Laravel Cache(Redis Tag)
    participant Repo as Banner/Category/Rank Repository
    participant DB as MySQL
    participant Rdc as Redis

    C->>Ctrl: GET /api/portal/home?device=pc
    Ctrl->>Action: execute(customerId, device)

    alt Cache Hit
        Action->>Cache: remember($cacheKey, 60s)
        Cache-->>Action: 返回缓存 DTO
    else Cache Miss
        Action->>Repo: 查询 site_configs / banners / categories
        Repo->>DB: SELECT ...
        DB-->>Repo: 结果集
        Repo-->>Action: Eloquent Collection

        Action->>Rdc: ZREVRANGE rank:bestseller:0 (0~9)
        Rdc-->>Action: 热销榜商品ID列表

        alt 已登录用户
            Action->>Rdc: ZREVRANGE rec:user:{id} (0~11)
            Rdc-->>Action: 个性化推荐ID列表
        else 访客
            Action->>DB: SELECT id FROM products ORDER BY heat_value DESC LIMIT 12
            DB-->>Action: 通用推荐列表
        end

        Action->>Cache: 写入聚合缓存 (portal:home Tag)
    end

    Action-->>Ctrl: HomePageDTO
    Ctrl-->>C: JSON 响应
```

### 6.0.6 关键业务规则

| 规则 | 实现 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| 首页聚合缓存 | `Cache::tags(['portal:home'])` | 按设备+用户ID区分缓存Key |
| 运营修改即时生效 | `PortalCacheManager::flushOnBannerChange()` | 按 Tag 批量失效，无需等TTL |
| 榜单数据每日刷新 | Schedule `dailyAt('02:00')` | 避免峰值计算 |
| 个性化推荐30分钟TTL | Redis ZSet `rec:user:{id}` | 平衡实时性与DB压力 |
| 访客推荐防信息茧房 | 按 `heat_value + score` 排序 | 未登录用户展示平台热门 |
| 新品定义 | `created_at >= now()->subDays(30)` | 30天内上架商品自动标记 NEW |

---

## 6.0-A Banner与公告服务

> **设计依据**：PRD 模块一（FR-HOME-002 ~ FR-HOME-003）
> **所属领域**：`App\Domains\Portal\Content`（门户内容域）
> **核心数据表**：`banners`（已存在 5.2.29 节，本节补充运营后台与多端适配）

### 6.0-A.1 数据库表补充说明

`banners` 表已在 **5.2.29** 节定义，本节补充其业务使用方式：

| banner_type | 业务含义 | 展示位置 | 多端差异 |
|-------------|---------|---------|---------|
| `1` | PC轮播 | 首页顶部通栏 | 支持多图轮播，宽高比 1920×600 |
| `2` | APP轮播 | H5/小程序首页 | 支持多图轮播，宽高比 750×400 |
| `3` | 顶部公告 | 全站顶部通知栏 | 单条滚动，紧急公告可 `is_top=1` 置顶 |
| `4` | 弹窗公告 | 首页首次访问弹层 | 按 `start_time` / `end_time` 控制有效期 |

### 6.0-A.2 运营后台配置接口

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Api\Admin;

use App\Http\Requests\Admin\BannerStoreRequest;
use App\Models\Banner;
use App\Services\Portal\PortalCacheManager;
use Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;

class BannerAdminController
{
    /**
     * Banner 列表（运营后台）
     * GET /api/admin/banners
     */
    public function index(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $query = Banner::query()
            ->when($request->input('banner_type'), fn ($q, $type) => $q->where('banner_type', $type))
            ->when($request->input('status') !== null, fn ($q, $status) => $q->where('status', $status))
            ->orderByDesc('sort_order')
            ->orderByDesc('id');

        return response()->json($query->paginate($request->input('pageSize', 20)));
    }

    /**
     * 创建/编辑 Banner
     * POST /api/admin/banners
     */
    public function store(BannerStoreRequest $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $data = $request->validated();
        $data['created_by'] = auth('admin')->id();

        $banner = Banner::updateOrCreate(['id' => $data['id'] ?? null], $data);

        // 清除对应缓存标签，即时生效
        PortalCacheManager::flushOnBannerChange();

        return response()->json(['id' => $banner->id, 'message' => '保存成功']);
    }

    /**
     * 切换状态
     * POST /api/admin/banners/{id}/toggle-status
     */
    public function toggleStatus(int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        $banner = Banner::findOrFail($id);
        $banner->status = $banner->status === 1 ? 0 : 1;
        $banner->save();

        PortalCacheManager::flushOnBannerChange();

        return response()->json(['status' => $banner->status, 'message' => '状态更新成功']);
    }

    /**
     * 调整排序权重
     * POST /api/admin/banners/{id}/sort
     */
    public function updateSort(int $id, Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $banner = Banner::findOrFail($id);
        $banner->sort_order = $request->input('sort_order', 0);
        $banner->save();

        PortalCacheManager::flushOnBannerChange();

        return response()->json(['message' => '排序更新成功']);
    }
}
```

### 6.0-A.3 多端适配策略

前端通过 `device` 参数区分 PC / Mobile，服务端返回对应尺寸图片：

```php
<?php

namespace App\Repositories\Portal;

use App\Enums\BannerType;
use App\Models\Banner;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Cache;

class BannerRepository
{
    /**
     * 获取生效中的 Banner 列表（按设备类型）
     */
    public function getActiveBanners(BannerType $bannerType, int $limit = 6): array
    {
        $cacheKey = sprintf('banners:%s:%d', $bannerType->value, $limit);

        return Cache::tags(['portal:banner'])->remember($cacheKey, 1800, function () use ($bannerType, $limit) {
            return Banner::query()
                ->where('banner_type', $bannerType)
                ->where('status', 1)
                ->where('start_time', '<=', now())
                ->where('end_time', '>=', now())
                ->orderByDesc('sort_order')
                ->limit($limit)
                ->get()
                ->map(fn (Banner $banner) => [
                    'id' => $banner->id,
                    'title' => $banner->title,
                    // 多端适配：PC 返回 image_url，移动端优先返回 mobile_image_url
                    'imageUrl' => $bannerType === BannerType::APP_CAROUSEL && $banner->mobile_image_url
                        ? $banner->mobile_image_url
                        : $banner->image_url,
                    'linkUrl' => $this->resolveLinkUrl($banner),
                    'targetId' => $banner->target_id,
                ])
                ->toArray();
        });
    }

    /**
     * 获取顶部公告（滚动 + 置顶优先）
     */
    public function getNotices(int $limit = 5): array
    {
        return Cache::tags(['portal:notice'])->remember('notices:active', 1800, function () use ($limit) {
            return Banner::query()
                ->where('banner_type', BannerType::NOTICE)
                ->where('status', 1)
                ->where('start_time', '<=', now())
                ->where('end_time', '>=', now())
                ->orderByDesc('is_top')
                ->orderByDesc('sort_order')
                ->limit($limit)
                ->get(['id', 'title', 'link_url', 'is_top'])
                ->toArray();
        });
    }

    /**
     * 链接解析：内部路由补全域名，外部链接保持原样
     */
    private function resolveLinkUrl(Banner $banner): ?string
    {
        return match ($banner->link_type->value) {
            2 => config('app.frontend_url') . $banner->link_url, // 内部路由
            3 => config('app.frontend_url') . '/product/' . $banner->target_id, // 商品详情
            4 => config('app.frontend_url') . '/campaign/' . $banner->target_id, // 活动页
            default => $banner->link_url,
        };
    }
}
```

### 6.0-A.4 点击统计

Banner 点击采用**异步累加**策略，避免阻塞跳转：

```php
<?php

namespace App\Jobs\Portal;

use App\Models\Banner;
use Illuminate\Bus\Queueable;
use Illuminate\Contracts\Queue\ShouldQueue;
use Illuminate\Foundation\Bus\Dispatchable;
use Illuminate\Queue\InteractsWithQueue;
use Illuminate\Queue\SerializesModels;

class IncrementBannerClickJob implements ShouldQueue
{
    use Dispatchable, InteractsWithQueue, Queueable, SerializesModels;

    public function __construct(public int $bannerId) {}

    public function handle(): void
    {
        Banner::where('id', $this->bannerId)->increment('click_count');
    }
}
```

前端在跳转前发送 `POST /api/app/banner/{id}/click` 触发 Job 派发即可。

---

## 6.0-B 分类树服务

> **设计依据**：PRD 模块一（FR-HOME-007）
> **所属领域**：`App\Domains\Product\Category`（商品分类域）
> **核心数据表**：`product_categories`（已存在 5.2.20 节）

### 6.0-B.1 设计概述

分类树是首页导航的核心入口，采用 **Redis Hash 存储节点元数据 + Redis ZSet 存储层级排序**，实现 O(1) 读取与灵活排序。三级分类树在印刷电商场景下数据量有限（通常 < 500 节点），全量缓存至 Redis 后完全避免递归查库。

### 6.0-B.2 三级分类树缓存（Redis Hash + ZSet）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Services\Portal;

use App\Models\ProductCategory;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Redis;

class CategoryTreeService
{
    private const string HASH_KEY = 'portal:categories:data';
    private const string ZSET_KEY_L1 = 'portal:categories:l1';
    private const string ZSET_KEY_PREFIX = 'portal:categories:l2:%d';

    /**
     * 刷新分类树缓存（由 Schedule 每日 03:00 触发）
     */
    public function rebuildCache(): void
    {
        Redis::del(self::HASH_KEY, self::ZSET_KEY_L1);

        $categories = ProductCategory::where('is_show', true)
            ->orderBy('sort_order')
            ->get();

        foreach ($categories as $cat) {
            // Hash 存储完整节点数据
            Redis::hset(self::HASH_KEY, (string) $cat->id, json_encode([
                'id' => $cat->id,
                'cdCategoryId' => $cat->cd_category_id,
                'name' => $cat->category_name,
                'parentId' => $cat->parent_id,
                'level' => $cat->level,
                'icon' => $cat->icon,
                'heatValue' => $cat->heat_value,
            ]));

            // ZSet 按层级维护排序关系
            if ($cat->level === 1) {
                Redis::zadd(self::ZSET_KEY_L1, $cat->sort_order, $cat->id);
            } elseif ($cat->level === 2) {
                $zsetKey = sprintf(self::ZSET_KEY_PREFIX, $cat->parent_id);
                Redis::zadd($zsetKey, $cat->sort_order, $cat->id);
            }
        }

        Redis::expire(self::HASH_KEY, 86400);
        Redis::expire(self::ZSET_KEY_L1, 86400);
    }

    /**
     * 从 Redis 读取三级分类树（O(N) 组装，N=节点数）
     */
    public function getTree(int $depth = 3): array
    {
        $allNodes = Redis::hgetall(self::HASH_KEY);
        if (empty($allNodes)) {
            $this->rebuildCache();
            $allNodes = Redis::hgetall(self::HASH_KEY);
        }

        $nodeMap = [];
        foreach ($allNodes as $id => $json) {
            $node = json_decode($json, true);
            $node['children'] = [];
            $nodeMap[(int) $id] = $node;
        }

        // 按 ZSet 顺序读取一级分类
        $l1Ids = Redis::zrange(self::ZSET_KEY_L1, 0, -1);
        $tree = [];

        foreach ($l1Ids as $l1Id) {
            $l1Id = (int) $l1Id;
            if (! isset($nodeMap[$l1Id])) continue;

            $l1Node = &$nodeMap[$l1Id];

            if ($depth >= 2) {
                $l2ZsetKey = sprintf(self::ZSET_KEY_PREFIX, $l1Id);
                $l2Ids = Redis::zrange($l2ZsetKey, 0, -1);
                foreach ($l2Ids as $l2Id) {
                    $l2Id = (int) $l2Id;
                    if (! isset($nodeMap[$l2Id])) continue;

                    $l2Node = &$nodeMap[$l2Id];

                    if ($depth >= 3) {
                        // 三级分类挂在二级下
                        foreach ($nodeMap as $id => &$candidate) {
                            if ($candidate['parentId'] === $l2Id) {
                                $l2Node['children'][] = &$candidate;
                            }
                        }
                    }

                    $l1Node['children'][] = $l2Node;
                }
            }

            $tree[] = $l1Node;
        }

        return $tree;
    }
}
```

### 6.0-B.4 分类图标 CDN 加速

分类图标为小体积静态资源，统一走 CDN + 本地缓存：

```php
<?php

namespace App\Services\Portal;

class CategoryIconService
{
    /**
     * 图标 URL 生成：优先 CDN，失败回源
     */
    public function getIconUrl(?string $iconPath, int $size = 64): string
    {
        if (empty($iconPath)) {
            return asset('images/category-default.png');
        }

        $cdnBase = config('services.cdn.url');
        $version = config('app.asset_version', 'v1');

        return sprintf('%s/categories/%s?w=%d&v=%s', $cdnBase, $iconPath, $size, $version);
    }
}
```

**前端加载策略**：
- 首屏分类图标：`<img loading="lazy">` + `srcset` 响应式
- CDN 失效：图标变更时更新 `asset_version`，强制刷新浏览器缓存

---

## 6.0-C 营销活动专题服务

> **设计依据**：PRD 模块一（FR-HOME-009）
> **所属领域**：`App\Domains\Portal\Campaign`（营销活动域）
> **核心数据表**：`promotion_campaigns`、`promotion_products`

### 6.0-C.1 专题页配置表

```php
<?php

use Illuminate\Database\Migrations\Migration;
use Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schema;

return new class extends Migration
{
    public function up(): void
    {
        Schema::create('promotion_campaigns', function (Blueprint $table) {
            $table->id()->comment('专题主键');
            $table->string('campaign_code', 64)->unique()->comment('活动编码');
            $table->string('campaign_name', 128)->comment('活动名称');
            $table->tinyInteger('campaign_type')->comment('1=限时折扣 2=满减 3=满赠 4=首单优惠');
            $table->string('page_template', 64)->default('default')->comment('页面模板标识');
            $table->string('banner_image', 500)->nullable()->comment('专题Banner图');
            $table->text('description')->nullable()->comment('活动描述');
            $table->timestamp('start_time')->comment('活动开始时间');
            $table->timestamp('end_time')->comment('活动结束时间');
            $table->tinyInteger('status')->default(1)->comment('1=未开始 2=进行中 3=已结束 0=禁用');
            $table->foreignId('poster_template_id')->nullable()->comment('海报模板ID');
            $table->string('share_title', 255)->nullable()->comment('分享标题');
            $table->string('share_desc', 500)->nullable()->comment('分享描述');
            $table->string('share_image_url', 500)->nullable()->comment('分享图片URL');
            $table->json('rules')->nullable()->comment('活动规则JSON');
            $table->timestamps();

            $table->index('campaign_code', 'idx_campaign_code');
            $table->index('campaign_type', 'idx_campaign_type');
            $table->index(['start_time', 'end_time'], 'idx_time_range');
            $table->index('status', 'idx_status');
        });

        Schema::create('promotion_products', function (Blueprint $table) {
            $table->id()->comment('主键');
            $table->foreignId('campaign_id')->constrained('promotion_campaigns')->comment('专题ID');
            $table->foreignId('product_id')->constrained('products')->comment('商品ID');
            $table->decimal('promotion_price', 12, 2)->nullable()->comment('活动价');
            $table->integer('stock_limit')->nullable()->comment('活动库存限制');
            $table->integer('sold_count')->default(0)->comment('已售数量');
            $table->integer('sort_order')->default(0)->comment('排序');
            $table->timestamps();

            $table->unique(['campaign_id', 'product_id'], 'uniq_campaign_product');
            $table->index('campaign_id', 'idx_campaign_id');
        });
    }

    public function down(): void
    {
        Schema::dropIfExists('promotion_products');
        Schema::dropIfExists('promotion_campaigns');
    }
};
```

#### campaign_stats 表（活动统计表）

```php
<?php

use Illuminate\Database\Migrations\Migration;
use Illuminate\Database\Schema\Blueprint;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schema;

return new class extends Migration
{
    public function up(): void
    {
        Schema::create('campaign_stats', function (Blueprint $table) {
            $table->id()->comment('统计主键');
            $table->foreignId('campaign_id')->constrained('promotion_campaigns')->comment('活动ID');
            $table->date('stat_date')->comment('统计日期');
            $table->unsignedInteger('uv')->default(0)->comment('独立访客数');
            $table->unsignedInteger('pv')->default(0)->comment('页面浏览量');
            $table->unsignedInteger('order_count')->default(0)->comment('参与活动订单数');
            $table->decimal('conversion_rate', 5, 2)->default(0.00)->comment('转化率%');
            $table->timestamps();

            $table->unique(['campaign_id', 'stat_date'], 'uk_campaign_date');
        });
    }

    public function down(): void
    {
        Schema::dropIfExists('campaign_stats');
    }
};
```
};
```

### 6.0-C.2 限时折扣倒计时（Redis TTL + 前端同步）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Services\Portal;

use App\Models\PromotionCampaign;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Redis;

class CampaignCountdownService
{
    private const string CAMPAIGN_TTL_KEY = 'campaign:ttl:%d';

    /**
     * 获取活动倒计时信息
     */
    public function getCountdown(int $campaignId): array
    {
        $campaign = PromotionCampaign::find($campaignId);
        if (! $campaign) {
            return ['status' => 'invalid', 'remainSeconds' => 0];
        }

        $now = now();
        $start = $campaign->start_time;
        $end = $campaign->end_time;

        if ($now < $start) {
            return [
                'status' => 'upcoming',
                'remainSeconds' => $start->diffInSeconds($now),
                'serverTime' => $now->toIso8601String(),
            ];
        }

        if ($now >= $start && $now <= $end) {
            $remainSeconds = $end->diffInSeconds($now);

            // 写入 Redis TTL 标记，用于前端轮询校准
            Redis::setex(sprintf(self::CAMPAIGN_TTL_KEY, $campaignId), $remainSeconds, 'active');

            return [
                'status' => 'active',
                'remainSeconds' => $remainSeconds,
                'serverTime' => $now->toIso8601String(),
            ];
        }

        return ['status' => 'ended', 'remainSeconds' => 0];
    }
}
```

**前端同步策略**：
- 首次加载读取服务端 `serverTime` 与本地时间计算差值（`serverOffset`）
- 倒计时使用客户端 `setInterval` 递减，避免每秒请求服务端
- 每分钟与服务端 `CampaignCountdownService` 校准一次，修正本地漂移

### 6.0-C.3 优惠券领取接口（分布式锁防超领）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Api\App;

use App\Models\Coupon;
use App\Models\CustomerCoupon;
use Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Redis;

class CouponClaimController
{
    /**
     * 领取优惠券（带分布式锁防超领）
     * POST /api/app/coupon/{couponId}/claim
     */
    public function claim(int $couponId, Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $customerId = auth('sanctum')->id();
        if (! $customerId) {
            return response()->json(['message' => '请先登录'], 401);
        }

        $lockKey = sprintf('lock:coupon:claim:%d:%d', $couponId, $customerId);
        $lock = Redis::set($lockKey, '1', 'EX', 10, 'NX');

        if (! $lock) {
            return response()->json(['message' => '操作过于频繁，请稍后重试'], 429);
        }

        try {
            return DB::transaction(function () use ($couponId, $customerId) {
                $coupon = Coupon::lockForUpdate()->find($couponId);

                if (! $coupon || $coupon->status !== 1) {
                    return response()->json(['message' => '优惠券不存在或已下架'], 404);
                }

                if ($coupon->valid_from > now() || $coupon->valid_to < now()) {
                    return response()->json(['message' => '优惠券不在有效期内'], 400);
                }

                if ($coupon->used_quantity >= $coupon->total_quantity) {
                    return response()->json(['message' => '优惠券已领完'], 410);
                }

                // 单人限领检查
                $alreadyClaimed = CustomerCoupon::where('customer_id', $customerId)
                    ->where('coupon_id', $couponId)
                    ->count();

                if ($alreadyClaimed >= $coupon->per_customer_limit) {
                    return response()->json(['message' => '您已达到该优惠券领取上限'], 400);
                }

                // 乐观锁防并发超领
                $updated = Coupon::where('id', $couponId)
                    ->where('version', $coupon->version)
                    ->increment('used_quantity');

                if (! $updated) {
                    Log::warning('[CouponClaim] 乐观锁冲突', ['coupon_id' => $couponId, 'customer_id' => $customerId]);
                    return response()->json(['message' => '领取人数过多，请稍后重试'], 409);
                }

                // 发放客户优惠券
                $customerCoupon = CustomerCoupon::create([
                    'customer_id' => $customerId,
                    'coupon_id' => $couponId,
                    'coupon_code' => $coupon->coupon_code,
                    'status' => 1, // 未使用
                    'valid_from' => $coupon->valid_from,
                    'valid_to' => $coupon->valid_to,
                ]);

                Log::info('[CouponClaim] 领取成功', [
                    'customer_id' => $customerId,
                    'coupon_id' => $couponId,
                    'customer_coupon_id' => $customerCoupon->id,
                ]);

                return response()->json([
                    'message' => '领取成功',
                    'customerCouponId' => $customerCoupon->id,
                ]);
            });
        } finally {
            Redis::del($lockKey);
        }
    }
}
```

### 6.0-C.4 关键业务规则

| 规则 | 实现 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| 活动状态自动流转 | Schedule `everyFiveMinutes` | 根据 `start_time`/`end_time` 自动更新 `status` |
| 倒计时校准 | `serverTime` + 客户端 `serverOffset` | 避免用户篡改本地时间 |
| 防超领 | Redis 分布式锁 + DB 乐观锁 (`version` 字段) | 双层防护 |
| 单人限领 | `per_customer_limit` | 运营后台可配置 |
| 活动库存 | `promotion_products.stock_limit` | 与商品主库存隔离 |

---

## 6.32 管理后台核心服务设计（Admin Core Service）

> **设计依据**：PRD 模块二十（FR-ADMIN-001 ~ FR-ADMIN-100）
> **所属领域**：`App\Domains\Admin`（管理后台域）
> **现状说明**：当前 SDD 中管理后台 API 分散于各模块（6.2.8 文件审核、6.4.3 售后管理、6.8.4 工单管理等），缺少 Admin 子系统的**统一架构设计**。本节补充其设计概述、RBAC 权限模型与关键表结构。

### 6.32.1 设计概述

管理后台采用 **RBAC（Role-Based Access Control）+ 数据权限范围** 双层权限模型：
- **功能权限**：基于 `admin_roles` + `admin_permissions` + 中间表，控制菜单/按钮/API 访问
- **数据权限**：基于 `data_scope` 字段（全部/本部门/本人/自定义），控制列表数据可见范围

**技术选型**：
- 认证：`auth:admin` Guard（Laravel Sanctum 独立 Guard）
- 权限：`spatie/laravel-permission`（社区成熟包，支持角色/权限/中间表）
- 操作审计：`admin_operation_logs` 表记录所有后台写操作
- 数据报表：ECharts + 后端聚合查询（短缓存 5 分钟）

### 6.32.2 服务边界与模块划分

```mermaid
flowchart TB
    subgraph AdminSPA["管理后台 Vue3 SPA"]
        A[登录页]
        B[工作台 Dashboard]
        C[业务管理]
        D[系统管理]
        E[数据报表]
    end

    subgraph AdminSvc["admin-svc (Laravel Domain)"]
        F[AuthAdminService]
        G[DashboardService]
        H[RBACService]
        I[AuditLogService]
        J[ReportService]
        K[OperationLogService]
    end

    subgraph OtherSvc["其他业务 Domain"]
        L[order-svc]
        M[product-svc]
        N[after-svc]
        O[ticket-svc]
    end

    AdminSPA --> AdminSvc
    AdminSvc --> OtherSvc
```

| 后台模块 | 对应 Service | 核心职责 | 数据范围 |
|---------|-------------|---------|---------|
| 登录认证 | `AuthAdminService` | 独立 Guard + Token 签发 | — |
| 工作台 | `DashboardService` | 待办事项/订单统计/快捷入口 | 按数据权限过滤 |
| 权限管理 | `RBACService` | 角色/权限/菜单/数据范围 | 超级管理员专属 |
| 操作审计 | `OperationLogService` | 记录所有 POST/PUT/DELETE | 全局可见 |
| 数据报表 | `ReportService` | 订单/财务/用户/商品报表 | 按部门范围过滤 |
| 运营干预 | `RankAdminService` | 热销榜置顶/隐藏/权重 | 全局可见 |
| 客服管理 | `AgentAllocationService` | 客服分配/状态/满意度 | 客服主管可见 |

### 6.32.3 RBAC 权限模型

```php
<?php

namespace App\Models\Admin;

use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsToMany;
use Illuminate\Foundation\Auth\User as Authenticatable;
use Spatie\Permission\Traits\HasRoles;

class AdminUser extends Authenticatable
{
    use HasFactory, HasRoles;

    protected $table = 'admin_users';

    protected $fillable = [
        'username', 'real_name', 'password', 'email', 'phone',
        'avatar', 'department_id', 'status', 'last_login_at', 'last_login_ip',
    ];

    protected $hidden = ['password'];

    protected $casts = [
        'status' => 'integer',
        'last_login_at' => 'datetime',
    ];

    /**
     * 数据权限范围（独立于功能权限）
     */
    public function dataScope(): int
    {
        return $this->getAttribute('data_scope') ?? 1;
    }
}
```

**数据权限范围枚举**：

| data_scope | 含义 | 数据过滤规则 |
|-----------|------|------------|
| `1` | 全部数据 | 无过滤 |
| `2` | 本部门数据 | `where department_id = ?` |
| `3` | 本人数据 | `where created_by = ?` |
| `4` | 自定义 | 读取 `admin_data_scope_custom` 关联表 |

### 6.32.4 关键表结构

#### admin_users（管理员账户）

```sql
CREATE TABLE admin_users (
    id BIGINT UNSIGNED PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    username VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL COMMENT '登录账号',
    real_name VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '真实姓名',
    password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '密码哈希',
    email VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '邮箱',
    phone VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '手机号',
    avatar VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '头像URL',
    department_id BIGINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '所属部门ID',
    data_scope TINYINT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '数据权限:1=全部 2=本部门 3=本人 4=自定义',
    status TINYINT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '1=启用 0=禁用',
    last_login_at DATETIME DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '最后登录时间',
    last_login_ip VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '最后登录IP',
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    UNIQUE KEY uk_username (username),
    KEY idx_department (department_id),
    KEY idx_status (status)
) ENGINE=InnoDB COMMENT='后台管理员表';
```

#### admin_roles / admin_permissions / admin_role_permission（RBAC 三表）

由 `spatie/laravel-permission` 自动生成，标准结构：

```sql
-- roles: id, name, guard_name, created_at, updated_at
-- permissions: id, name, guard_name, created_at, updated_at
-- model_has_roles: role_id, model_type, model_id
-- model_has_permissions: permission_id, model_type, model_id
-- role_has_permissions: permission_id, role_id
```

> 权限命名规范：`{domain}:{action}:{resource}`，例如 `order:view:all`、`product:edit:self`、`report:export:finance`。

#### admin_operation_logs（操作审计日志）

```sql
CREATE TABLE admin_operation_logs (
    id BIGINT UNSIGNED PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    admin_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL COMMENT '操作人ID',
    admin_name VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '操作人姓名',
    module VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL COMMENT '操作模块',
    action VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL COMMENT '操作动作',
    request_url VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL COMMENT '请求URL',
    request_method VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL COMMENT 'HTTP方法',
    request_params JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '请求参数(脱敏)',
    response_code INT DEFAULT 200 COMMENT '响应状态码',
    ip_address VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '操作IP',
    user_agent VARCHAR(512) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'UA',
    duration_ms INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '执行耗时(ms)',
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    KEY idx_admin_id (admin_id),
    KEY idx_module_action (module, action),
    KEY idx_created_at (created_at)
) ENGINE=InnoDB COMMENT='后台操作审计日志';
```

#### admin_dashboard_configs（工作台个性化配置）

```sql
CREATE TABLE admin_dashboard_configs (
    id BIGINT UNSIGNED PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    admin_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL COMMENT '管理员ID',
    widget_key VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL COMMENT '组件标识',
    widget_config JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '组件配置JSON',
    sort_order INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '排序',
    is_visible TINYINT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '是否显示',
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    UNIQUE KEY uk_admin_widget (admin_id, widget_key)
) ENGINE=InnoDB COMMENT='工作台个性化配置';
```

### 6.32.5 运营干预能力汇总

管理后台为前端首页提供的运营干预入口：

| 干预对象 | 后台路径 | 操作 | 缓存失效策略 |
|---------|---------|------|------------|
| Banner/公告 | 内容管理 → Banner管理 | 增删改查、排序、置顶 | `PortalCacheManager::flushOnBannerChange()` |
| 热销/飙升榜 | 运营管理 → 榜单干预 | 置顶、隐藏、权重调整 | 删除 `rank:bestseller:{id}` |
| 分类树 | 商品管理 → 分类管理 | 增删改查、排序、图标 | 触发 `SyncCategoryTreeJob` |
| 营销活动 | 营销管理 → 活动专题 | 创建、上下架、配置商品 | `Cache::tags(['portal:campaigns'])->flush()` |
| 首页推荐 | 运营管理 → 推荐位管理 | 手动配置推荐商品（覆盖算法） | `Cache::tags(['portal:home'])->flush()` |
| 全局配置 | 系统管理 → 站点配置 | SEO、客服电话、Logo、备案号 | `Cache::tags(['portal:config'])->flush()` |

### 6.32.6 关键业务规则

| 规则 | 实现 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| 超级管理员保护 | `role:name === super_admin` | 禁止删除、禁止修改角色 |
| 操作日志异步写入 | Laravel Queue `OperationLogJob` | 避免阻塞后台请求 |
| 敏感参数脱敏 | `preg_replace` 手机/身份证/密码 | 日志中存储脱敏数据 |
| 数据范围自动过滤 | Eloquent Global Scope `DataScopeScope` | 自动附加 `where` 条件 |
| 报表查询超时保护 | `DB::timeout(30)` | 防止复杂报表拖垮 DB |
| 登录失败锁定 | Redis `admin:login:fail:{ip}` 5次/15分钟 | 防暴力破解 |

---

### 6.0-D 数据表汇总

| 表名 | 所属模块 | 关键字段 | 说明 |
|------|---------|---------|------|
| `banners` | 6.0-A | `banner_type`, `link_type`, `mobile_image_url` | 多端适配 |
| `product_categories` | 6.0-B | `parent_id`, `level`, `icon`, `heat_value` | 三级分类树 |
| `promotion_campaigns` | 6.0-C | `campaign_type`, `page_template`, `rules(JSON)` | 活动专题配置 |
| `promotion_products` | 6.0-C | `campaign_id`, `promotion_price`, `stock_limit` | 活动商品关联 |
| `site_configs` | 6.0 | `config_key`, `config_value` | 全局站点配置 |
| `admin_users` | 6.32 | `data_scope`, `department_id`, `status` | 后台管理员 |
| `admin_operation_logs` | 6.32 | `module`, `action`, `request_params(JSON)` | 操作审计 |
| `admin_dashboard_configs` | 6.32 | `widget_key`, `widget_config(JSON)` | 工作台个性化 |
