#### 事件监听注册

```php
<?php

namespace App\Providers;

use App\Domains\AfterSale\Events\AfterSaleCreated;
use App\Domains\AfterSale\Events\AfterSaleStatusChanged;
use App\Domains\AfterSale\Events\AfterSaleTimeoutWarning;
use App\Domains\AfterSale\Listeners\SendAfterSaleNotification;
use App\Domains\AfterSale\Listeners\SyncAfterSaleStatistics;
use App\Domains\AfterSale\Listeners\AlertOverdueAfterSale;
use Illuminate\Foundation\Support\Providers\EventServiceProvider as ServiceProvider;

class EventServiceProvider extends ServiceProvider
{
    protected $listen = [
        AfterSaleCreated::class => [
            SendAfterSaleNotification::class,   // 发送客户/运营通知
            SyncAfterSaleStatistics::class,     // 更新统计缓存
        ],
        AfterSaleStatusChanged::class => [
            SendAfterSaleNotification::class,   // 发送进度变更通知
            SyncAfterSaleStatistics::class,     // 更新统计缓存
        ],
        AfterSaleTimeoutWarning::class => [
            AlertOverdueAfterSale::class,       // 运营告警 + 客户提醒
        ],
    ];
}
```

#### SendAfterSaleNotification 监听器

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Domains\AfterSale\Listeners;

use App\Domains\AfterSale\Events\AfterSaleCreated;
use App\Domains\AfterSale\Events\AfterSaleStatusChanged;
use App\Domains\AfterSale\Services\AfterSaleMessageService;
use App\Enums\AfterSaleStatus;
use App\Enums\AfterSaleType;
use App\Services\SmsService;

class SendAfterSaleNotification
{
    public function __construct(
        private AfterSaleMessageService $messageService,
        private SmsService $smsService,
    ) {}

    public function handleCreated(AfterSaleCreated $event): void
    {
        $afterSale = $event->afterSale;

        // 1. 站内信通知
        $this->messageService->sendSystemNotice(
            $afterSale,
            "您的售后申请已提交，售后单号：{$afterSale->after_sale_sn}，我们会尽快处理。"
        );

        // 2. 短信通知（异步发送，不阻塞主流程）
        $this->sendSms(
            $afterSale,
            'aftersale_submitted',
            [
                'after_sale_sn' => $afterSale->after_sale_sn,
                'type'          => $afterSale->type->label(),
            ]
        );
    }

    public function handleStatusChanged(AfterSaleStatusChanged $event): void
    {
        $afterSale = $event->afterSale;
        $current = $event->currentStatus;

        // --- 站内信 ---
        $notice = match ($current) {
            AfterSaleStatus::PROCESSING => match ($afterSale->type) {
                AfterSaleType::RETURN_REFUND => '您的退货退款申请已通过审核，请尽快寄回商品。',
                AfterSaleType::REPRINT       => '您的补印申请已通过审核，正在安排生产。',
                AfterSaleType::DISCOUNT      => '您的优惠货款申请已通过审核，正在安排退款。',
                default                      => '您的售后申请已进入处理中。',
            },
            AfterSaleStatus::SUSPENDED  => '您的售后申请需补充材料，请查看留言板。',
            AfterSaleStatus::COMPLETED  => '您的售后单已处理完成，如有疑问请联系客服。',
            AfterSaleStatus::CANCELLED  => "您的售后单已关闭，原因：{$afterSale->close_reason}。",
            AfterSaleStatus::REVOKED    => '您的售后申请未通过审核，可修改后重新提交。',
            default                     => null,
        };

        if ($notice !== null) {
            $this->messageService->sendSystemNotice($afterSale, $notice);
        }

        // --- 短信通知（关键状态才发短信，避免骚扰） ---
        $smsTemplate = match ($current) {
            AfterSaleStatus::PROCESSING => 'aftersale_processing',
            AfterSaleStatus::COMPLETED  => 'aftersale_completed',
            AfterSaleStatus::CANCELLED  => 'aftersale_cancelled',
            AfterSaleStatus::SUSPENDED  => 'aftersale_suspended',
            default                     => null,
        };

        if ($smsTemplate !== null) {
            $this->sendSms(
                $afterSale,
                $smsTemplate,
                [
                    'after_sale_sn' => $afterSale->after_sale_sn,
                    'status'        => $current->label(),
                ]
            );
        }
    }

    /**
     * 发送售后短信（内部封装手机号获取与降级逻辑）
     */
    private function sendSms(\App\Domains\AfterSale\Models\AfterSale $afterSale, string $templateCode, array $params): void
    {
        // 获取客户手机号
        $phone = $afterSale->customer?->mobile_phone;
        if (empty($phone)) {
            Log::warning('[AfterSaleNotify] 客户手机号为空，跳过短信发送', [
                'after_sale_id' => $afterSale->id,
            ]);
            return;
        }

        // 异步投递到队列，避免阻塞事件处理
        dispatch(function () use ($phone, $templateCode, $params) {
            $this->smsService->send($phone, $templateCode, $params);
        })->onQueue('sms');
    }
}
```

#### AlertOverdueAfterSale 监听器

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Domains\AfterSale\Listeners;

use App\Domains\AfterSale\Events\AfterSaleTimeoutWarning;
use App\Domains\AfterSale\Services\AfterSaleMessageService;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Notification;

class AlertOverdueAfterSale
{
    public function __construct(
        private AfterSaleMessageService $messageService,
    ) {}

    public function handle(AfterSaleTimeoutWarning $event): void
    {
        $afterSale = $event->afterSale;
        $type = $event->warningType;
        $hours = $event->overdueHours;

        // 记录告警日志
        Log::warning('[AfterSaleSLA] 售后单超时', [
            'after_sale_sn' => $afterSale->after_sale_sn,
            'type'          => $type,
            'overdue_hours' => $hours,
        ]);

        // 客户提醒
        $notice = match ($type) {
            'return_overdue'   => "提醒：您的退货物流已超期 {$hours} 小时，售后单即将自动关闭。",
            'reprint_overdue'  => "提醒：您的补印订单处理已超期 {$hours} 小时，请联系客服。",
            'refund_overdue'   => "提醒：您的退款处理已超期 {$hours} 小时，请联系客服。",
            'confirm_overdue'  => '提醒：您的售后单已完成超过7天，系统即将自动确认关闭。',
            default            => "提醒：您的售后单存在超时（{$hours}小时），请联系客服。",
        };

        $this->messageService->sendSystemNotice($afterSale, $notice);

        // 运营告警（可通过站内信/钉钉/企业微信发送）
        // Notification::send($admins, new AfterSaleOverdueAlert($afterSale, $type, $hours));
    }
}
```

#### Queue Job

##### AfterSaleSlaMonitorJob

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Domains\AfterSale\Jobs;

use App\Domains\AfterSale\Events\AfterSaleTimeoutWarning;
use App\Domains\AfterSale\Models\AfterSale;
use App\Enums\AfterSaleFlowStatus;
use App\Enums\AfterSaleStatus;
use App\Enums\AfterSaleType;
use Illuminate\Bus\Queueable;
use Illuminate\Contracts\Queue\ShouldQueue;
use Illuminate\Foundation\Bus\Dispatchable;
use Illuminate\Queue\InteractsWithQueue;
use Illuminate\Queue\SerializesModels;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;

/**
 * 售后SLA超时监控Job
 *
 * PRD: FR-AFTER-015
 * 调度频率：每4小时执行一次
 */
class AfterSaleSlaMonitorJob implements ShouldQueue
{
    use Dispatchable, InteractsWithQueue, Queueable, SerializesModels;

    /**
     * 各类型SLA承诺时长（小时）
     */
    private const SLA_HOURS = [
        'audit'   => 48,  // 审核SLA：48小时
        'return'  => 72,  // 退货验收SLA：3天 = 72小时
        'reprint' => 168, // 补印SLA：7天 = 168小时
        'refund'  => 48,  // 退款SLA：2天 = 48小时
        'confirm' => 168, // 完成确认SLA：7天 = 168小时
    ];

    /**
     * 提醒阈值比例（50%）
     */
    private const REMINDER_RATIO = 0.5;

    public function handle(): void
    {
        Log::info('[AfterSaleSlaMonitor] SLA扫描开始');

        $this->scanAuditOverdue();
        $this->scanProcessingOverdue();
        $this->scanCompletedUnconfirmed();

        Log::info('[AfterSaleSlaMonitor] SLA扫描结束');
    }

    /**
     * 扫描1：超48小时未审核（submitted状态）
     */
    private function scanAuditOverdue(): void
    {
        $threshold = now()->subHours(self::SLA_HOURS['audit']);
        $reminderThreshold = now()->subHours(self::SLA_HOURS['audit'] * self::REMINDER_RATIO);

        $items = AfterSale::where('status', AfterSaleStatus::SUBMITTED->value)
            ->where('created_at', '<', $reminderThreshold)
            ->get();

        foreach ($items as $afterSale) {
            $hours = $afterSale->created_at->diffInHours(now());
            $isAlert = $afterSale->created_at < $threshold;

            event(new AfterSaleTimeoutWarning(
                $afterSale,
                $isAlert ? 'audit_overdue' : 'audit_reminder',
                (int) $hours
            ));
        }
    }

    /**
     * 扫描2：处理中超时（processing状态，按类型区分）
     */
    private function scanProcessingOverdue(): void
    {
        $items = AfterSale::where('status', AfterSaleStatus::PROCESSING->value)
            ->whereNotNull('audited_at')
            ->get();

        foreach ($items as $afterSale) {
            $slaHours = $this->resolveSlaHours($afterSale);
            if ($slaHours === null) {
                continue;
            }

            $threshold = now()->subHours($slaHours);
            $reminderThreshold = now()->subHours($slaHours * self::REMINDER_RATIO);

            // 未到达提醒阈值，跳过
            if ($afterSale->audited_at >= $reminderThreshold) {
                continue;
            }

            $hours = $afterSale->audited_at->diffInHours(now());
            $isAlert = $afterSale->audited_at < $threshold;

            $warningType = match ($afterSale->type) {
                AfterSaleType::RETURN_REFUND => $isAlert ? 'return_overdue' : 'return_reminder',
                AfterSaleType::REPRINT       => $isAlert ? 'reprint_overdue' : 'reprint_reminder',
                AfterSaleType::DISCOUNT      => $isAlert ? 'refund_overdue' : 'refund_reminder',
                default                      => $isAlert ? 'processing_overdue' : 'processing_reminder',
            };

            event(new AfterSaleTimeoutWarning($afterSale, $warningType, (int) $hours));
        }
    }

    /**
     * 扫描3：完成后超7天未确认（completed状态超7天）
     */
    private function scanCompletedUnconfirmed(): void
    {
        $threshold = now()->subHours(self::SLA_HOURS['confirm']);

        $items = AfterSale::where('status', AfterSaleStatus::COMPLETED->value)
            ->whereNotNull('completed_at')
            ->where('completed_at', '<', $threshold)
            ->whereNull('closed_at') // 未关闭的才需要提醒
            ->get();

        foreach ($items as $afterSale) {
            $hours = $afterSale->completed_at->diffInHours(now());

            event(new AfterSaleTimeoutWarning(
                $afterSale,
                'confirm_overdue',
                (int) $hours
            ));
        }
    }

    /**
     * 根据售后类型和流程状态解析SLA时长
     */
    private function resolveSlaHours(AfterSale $afterSale): ?int
    {
        return match ($afterSale->type) {
            AfterSaleType::RETURN_REFUND => self::SLA_HOURS['return'],
            AfterSaleType::REPRINT       => self::SLA_HOURS['reprint'],
            AfterSaleType::DISCOUNT      => self::SLA_HOURS['refund'],
            default                      => null,
        };
    }
}
```

##### AfterSaleMonitorJob

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Domains\AfterSale\Jobs;

use App\Domains\AfterSale\Actions\CancelAfterSaleAction;
use App\Domains\AfterSale\Models\AfterSale;
use App\Enums\AfterSaleFlowStatus;
use App\Enums\AfterSaleStatus;
use App\Enums\AfterSaleType;
use Illuminate\Bus\Queueable;
use Illuminate\Contracts\Queue\ShouldQueue;
use Illuminate\Foundation\Bus\Dispatchable;
use Illuminate\Queue\InteractsWithQueue;
use Illuminate\Queue\SerializesModels;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;

/**
 * 售后自动关闭监控Job
 *
 * PRD: FR-AFTER-012-A（自动关闭）
 * 调度频率：每小时执行一次
 */
class AfterSaleMonitorJob implements ShouldQueue
{
    use Dispatchable, InteractsWithQueue, Queueable, SerializesModels;

    public function __construct(
        private CancelAfterSaleAction $cancelAction,
    ) {}

    public function handle(): void
    {
        Log::info('[AfterSaleMonitor] 自动关闭扫描开始');

        $this->closeOverdueReturn();
        $this->closeOverdueConfirm();
        $this->closeOverdueSupplement();

        Log::info('[AfterSaleMonitor] 自动关闭扫描结束');
    }

    /**
     * 场景1：超15天未提交退货物流 → 自动关闭
     */
    private function closeOverdueReturn(): void
    {
        $items = AfterSale::where('type', AfterSaleType::RETURN_REFUND->value)
            ->where('status', AfterSaleStatus::PROCESSING->value)
            ->where('process_flow_status', AfterSaleFlowStatus::PENDING_RETURN->value)
            ->whereNull('return_submit_time')
            ->where('audited_at', '<', now()->subDays(15))
            ->get();

        foreach ($items as $afterSale) {
            Log::info("[AfterSaleMonitor] 售后单 {$afterSale->after_sale_sn} 超时未退货，自动关闭");

            $this->cancelAction->execute($afterSale, [
                'auto'   => true,
                'reason' => '超时未寄回退货商品，系统自动关闭',
            ]);

            // 更新关闭原因（CancelAfterSaleAction默认用auto_return_timeout）
            $afterSale->update(['close_reason' => 'auto_return_timeout']);
        }
    }

    /**
     * 场景2：完成后超7天未确认 → 自动关闭（COMPLETED → CANCELLED）
     *
     * ⚠️ 注意：此场景需要状态机支持 COMPLETED → CANCELLED 流转
     */
    private function closeOverdueConfirm(): void
    {
        $items = AfterSale::where('status', AfterSaleStatus::COMPLETED->value)
            ->whereNotNull('completed_at')
            ->where('completed_at', '<', now()->subDays(7))
            ->whereNull('closed_at')
            ->get();

        foreach ($items as $afterSale) {
            Log::info("[AfterSaleMonitor] 售后单 {$afterSale->after_sale_sn} 完成后超7天未确认，自动关闭");

            // 状态机限制：COMPLETED不能直接→CANCELLED，需先绕过或修改状态机
            // 方案A（推荐）：直接update绕过状态机校验（自动关闭属于系统强制作业）
            $afterSale->update([
                'status'      => AfterSaleStatus::CANCELLED,
                'closed_at'   => now(),
                'close_reason'=> 'auto_confirm_timeout',
            ]);

            // 记录日志
            \App\Domains\AfterSale\Models\AfterSaleLog::create([
                'after_sale_id' => $afterSale->id,
                'action'        => 'cancel',
                'from_status'   => AfterSaleStatus::COMPLETED->value,
                'to_status'     => AfterSaleStatus::CANCELLED->value,
                'operator_type' => 'system',
                'remark'        => '完成后超7天未确认，系统自动关闭',
                'created_at'    => now(),
            ]);

            // 触发事件（可选，用于通知客户）
            event(new \App\Domains\AfterSale\Events\AfterSaleStatusChanged(
                $afterSale,
                AfterSaleStatus::COMPLETED,
                AfterSaleStatus::CANCELLED,
                '系统自动关闭：完成后超7天未确认'
            ));
        }
    }

    /**
     * 场景3：挂起超7天未补充材料 → 自动关闭
     */
    private function closeOverdueSupplement(): void
    {
        // 挂起状态且updated_at（最后更新时间）超过7天
        $items = AfterSale::where('status', AfterSaleStatus::SUSPENDED->value)
            ->where('updated_at', '<', now()->subDays(7))
            ->get();

        foreach ($items as $afterSale) {
            Log::info("[AfterSaleMonitor] 售后单 {$afterSale->after_sale_sn} 挂起超7天未补充，自动关闭");

            $this->cancelAction->execute($afterSale, [
                'auto'   => true,
                'reason' => '挂起超7天未补充材料，系统自动关闭',
            ]);

            $afterSale->update(['close_reason' => 'auto_supplement_timeout']);
        }
    }
}
```

---

### 6.40.8 关键业务规则

#### 1. 售后申请规则

| 规则编号 | 规则描述 |
|----------|----------|
| R-AFTER-001 | **订单状态限制**：仅已完成的订单可申请售后（`orders.status = completed`），生产中的订单不可售后。 |
| R-AFTER-002 | **时效限制**：订单完成后 **15个自然日** 内可申请售后，超期系统自动拒绝。 |
| R-AFTER-003 | **并发限制**：同一订单仅允许存在 **1个进行中** 的售后单（`status IN (submitted, processing, suspended)`），终态售后不影响新申请。 |
| R-AFTER-004 | **凭证限制**：凭证图片最多上传 **9张**，单张不超过 5MB，格式为 jpg/png。 |
| R-AFTER-005 | **金额限制**：退款金额不得超过原订单实付金额，且不能超过各商品退款金额之和。 |

#### 2. 审核规则

| 规则编号 | 规则描述 |
|----------|----------|
| R-AFTER-006 | **自动通过**：售后原因属于质量问题（印刷问题、裁切问题、后工问题、打包问题、贴错标签、原材料问题、少货）时，系统可配置自动通过审核。 |
| R-AFTER-007 | **需补充材料**：凭证不清晰、信息不完整时，运营可挂起并要求客户补充材料。 |
| R-AFTER-008 | **审核不通过**：客户原因（下错单、误活）且超过时效的，运营可驳回进入 `REVOKED`，客户可修改后重新提交。 |
| R-AFTER-009 | **终审驳回**：欺诈、恶意售后等特殊情况，运营可直接 `RejectAfterSaleAction` 进入 `CANCELLED` 终态。 |

#### 3. 退货物流规则

| 规则编号 | 规则描述 |
|----------|----------|
| R-AFTER-010 | **物流必填**：退货退款审核通过后，客户需在 **15个自然日** 内填写退货物流单号，否则自动关闭。 |
| R-AFTER-011 | **单号校验**：快递单号格式基础校验（长度 6-30 位字母数字），不支持重复提交。 |
| R-AFTER-012 | **仓库验收**：仓库收到退货后需在系统中确认，验收不通过可挂起并注明原因。 |

#### 4. 退款规则

| 规则编号 | 规则描述 |
|----------|----------|
| R-AFTER-013 | **退款路径优先级**：1.原路退回 > 2.余额 > 3.银行转账 > 4.现金红包。运营可 override。 |
| R-AFTER-014 | **退款时效**：审核通过后，退款需在 **2个工作日** 内到账（原路退回受支付渠道限制）。 |
| R-AFTER-015 | **无需退货**：优惠货款类型直接退款，无需客户寄回商品。 |

#### 5. 补印规则

| 规则编号 | 规则描述 |
|----------|----------|
| R-AFTER-016 | **排期生产**：补印审核通过后，自动生成生产工单，复用订单 FM 状态流转。 |
| R-AFTER-017 | **补印时效**：补印需在 **7个自然日** 内完成生产并发货。 |
| R-AFTER-018 | **不重复收款**：补印订单不收取额外费用，但需在系统中标记为补单（`order_sign` 补单位）。 |

#### 6. 自动关闭规则

| 规则编号 | 规则描述 |
|----------|----------|
| R-AFTER-019 | **退货超时**：客户提交售后后 **15天** 未填写退货物流单号 → 系统自动取消（`close_reason = auto_return_timeout`）。 |
| R-AFTER-020 | **确认超时**：售后单完成后 **7天** 客户未提出异议 → 系统自动关闭（`close_reason = auto_confirm_timeout`）。 |
| R-AFTER-021 | **挂起超时**：挂起状态超过 **7天** 客户未补充材料 → 系统自动取消（`close_reason = auto_supplement_timeout`）。 |

#### 7. SLA 监控规则

| 规则编号 | 规则描述 |
|----------|----------|
| R-AFTER-022 | **退货SLA**：退货退款从审核通过到仓库验收，承诺 **3天** 内完成（不含物流运输时间）。 |
| R-AFTER-023 | **补印SLA**：补印从审核通过到发货，承诺 **7天** 内完成。 |
| R-AFTER-024 | **退款SLA**：退款从审核通过到资金到账，承诺 **2天** 内完成。 |
| R-AFTER-025 | **预警阈值**：SLA 完成前 50% 时间发送预警，超期后每24小时重复提醒。 |

---

### 6.40.9 类图与时序图（Mermaid）

#### 类图

```mermaid
classDiagram
    direction TB

    class AfterSale {
        +int id
        +string after_sale_sn
        +int order_id
        +int customer_id
        +AfterSaleType type
        +AfterSaleReason reason
        +AfterSaleStatus status
        +AfterSaleFlowStatus process_flow_status
        +Money refund_amount
        +RefundMethod refund_method
        +array evidence_urls
        +string return_express_company
        +string return_express_number
        +DateTime return_submit_time
        +transitionTo(AfterSaleStatus target)
        +transitionFlowTo(AfterSaleFlowStatus target)
        +customerStatus() string
        +canBeRevokedByCustomer() bool
        +isClosed() bool
    }

    class AfterSaleItem {
        +int id
        +int after_sale_id
        +int order_item_id
        +int product_id
        +int quantity
        +AfterSaleReason reason
        +Money refund_amount
    }

    class AfterSaleMessage {
        +int id
        +int after_sale_id
        +int sender_type
        +int sender_id
        +string content
        +array attachments
        +DateTime read_at
        +markAsRead()
        +isSystem() bool
    }

    class AfterSaleLog {
        +int id
        +int after_sale_id
        +string action
        +string from_status
        +string to_status
        +int operator_id
        +string operator_type
        +string remark
        +array extra
    }

    class AfterSaleStatus {
        <<enumeration>>
        +SUBMITTED
        +PROCESSING
        +COMPLETED
        +SUSPENDED
        +REVOKED
        +CANCELLED
        +canTransitionTo(target) bool
        +isTerminal() bool
        +toCustomerStatus() string
    }

    class AfterSaleType {
        <<enumeration>>
        +RETURN_REFUND = 0
        +REPRINT = 1
        +DISCOUNT = 2
        +OTHER = 3
        +requiresReturn() bool
        +requiresReproduction() bool
        +isDirectRefund() bool
    }

    class AfterSaleFlowStatus {
        <<enumeration>>
        +PENDING_RETURN = 100
        +RETURNED = 101
        +canTransitionTo(target) bool
        +isTerminal() bool
    }

    class CreateAfterSaleAction {
        +execute(Order, array) AfterSale
    }

    class AuditAfterSaleAction {
        +execute(AfterSale, array) AfterSale
    }

    class SubmitReturnLogisticsAction {
        +execute(AfterSale, array) AfterSale
    }

    class WarehouseReceiveAction {
        +execute(AfterSale, array) AfterSale
    }

    class CompleteAfterSaleAction {
        +execute(AfterSale, array) AfterSale
    }

    class CancelAfterSaleAction {
        +execute(AfterSale, array) AfterSale
    }

    class RejectAfterSaleAction {
        +execute(AfterSale, array) AfterSale
    }

    class AfterSaleService {
        +customerList(int, array) Paginator
        +adminWorkbench(array) Paginator
        +detail(int, ?int) AfterSale
        +customerStatus(AfterSale) array
    }

    class AfterSaleStatisticsService {
        +byType() array
        +byReason() array
        +averageProcessHours() float
        +slaOverdueStats() array
        +dashboardOverview() array
    }

    class AfterSaleMessageService {
        +send(AfterSale, array) AfterSaleMessage
        +list(AfterSale, int) Paginator
        +sendSystemNotice(AfterSale, string) AfterSaleMessage
    }

    AfterSale "1" --> "*" AfterSaleItem : hasMany
    AfterSale "1" --> "*" AfterSaleMessage : hasMany
    AfterSale "1" --> "*" AfterSaleLog : hasMany
    AfterSale ..> AfterSaleStatus : uses
    AfterSale ..> AfterSaleType : uses
    AfterSale ..> AfterSaleFlowStatus : uses
    AfterSaleItem ..> AfterSaleReason : uses

    CreateAfterSaleAction ..> AfterSale : creates
    AuditAfterSaleAction ..> AfterSale : modifies
    SubmitReturnLogisticsAction ..> AfterSale : modifies
    WarehouseReceiveAction ..> AfterSale : modifies
    CompleteAfterSaleAction ..> AfterSale : modifies
    CancelAfterSaleAction ..> AfterSale : modifies
    RejectAfterSaleAction ..> AfterSale : modifies

    AfterSaleService ..> AfterSale : queries
    AfterSaleMessageService ..> AfterSaleMessage : creates
```

#### 售后申请时序图

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    actor Customer as 客户
    participant API as API Gateway
    participant CreateAction as CreateAfterSaleAction
    participant AfterSale as AfterSale模型
    participant DB as Database
    participant Event as EventDispatcher
    participant Listener as SendAfterSaleNotification

    Customer->>API: POST /api/after-sales (订单ID, 类型, 原因, 凭证)
    API->>CreateAction: execute(order, data)
    CreateAction->>DB: 校验订单状态 + 售后时效
    alt 校验失败
        CreateAction-->>API: DomainException
        API-->>Customer: 400 错误
    else 校验通过
        CreateAction->>DB: INSERT after_sales (事务)
        CreateAction->>DB: INSERT after_sale_items
        CreateAction->>DB: INSERT after_sale_logs
        CreateAction->>AfterSale: transitionTo(SUBMITTED)
        AfterSale->>AfterSale: canTransitionTo校验
        AfterSale->>DB: UPDATE status
        CreateAction->>Event: dispatch(AfterSaleCreated)
        Event->>Listener: handle()
        Listener->>DB: INSERT after_sale_messages (系统通知)
        CreateAction-->>API: AfterSaleDTO
        API-->>Customer: 201 售后单创建成功
    end
```

#### 售后审核时序图

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    actor Admin as 运营人员
    participant API as API Gateway
    participant AuditAction as AuditAfterSaleAction
    participant AfterSale as AfterSale模型
    participant DB as Database
    participant Event as EventDispatcher

    Admin->>API: POST /api/admin/after-sales/{id}/audit (result, remark)
    API->>AuditAction: execute(afterSale, data)
    AuditAction->>AfterSale: transitionTo(PROCESSING/SUSPENDED/REVOKED)
    AfterSale->>AfterSale: canTransitionTo校验
    alt 非法流转
        AfterSale-->>AuditAction: InvalidStateTransitionException
        AuditAction-->>API: 422
        API-->>Admin: 状态流转非法
    else 合法流转
        AfterSale->>DB: UPDATE status + timestamps
        AuditAction->>DB: INSERT after_sale_logs
        AuditAction->>Event: dispatch(AfterSaleStatusChanged)
        Event->>Event: 发送通知 / 更新统计
        AuditAction-->>API: AfterSaleDTO
        API-->>Admin: 200 审核完成
    end
```

#### 退货物流 + 仓库验收时序图

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    actor Customer as 客户
    actor Warehouse as 仓库人员
    participant API as API Gateway
    participant ReturnAction as SubmitReturnLogisticsAction
    participant ReceiveAction as WarehouseReceiveAction
    participant AfterSale as AfterSale模型
    participant DB as Database
    participant Event as EventDispatcher

    %% 客户提交物流
    Customer->>API: POST /api/after-sales/{id}/return (快递公司, 单号)
    API->>ReturnAction: execute(afterSale, data)
    ReturnAction->>AfterSale: 校验状态(PROCESSING + PENDING_RETURN)
    ReturnAction->>DB: UPDATE return_express_company, return_express_number
    ReturnAction->>DB: INSERT after_sale_logs
    ReturnAction-->>API: AfterSaleDTO
    API-->>Customer: 200 物流提交成功

    %% 仓库验收
    Warehouse->>API: POST /api/admin/after-sales/{id}/receive (result, remark)
    API->>ReceiveAction: execute(afterSale, data)
    ReceiveAction->>AfterSale: 校验流程状态(PENDING_RETURN)
    alt 验收通过
        ReceiveAction->>AfterSale: transitionFlowTo(RETURNED)
        AfterSale->>DB: UPDATE process_flow_status
        ReceiveAction->>DB: UPDATE warehouse_received_at, warehouse_remark
    else 验收不通过
        ReceiveAction->>AfterSale: transitionTo(SUSPENDED)
        AfterSale->>DB: UPDATE status
    end
    ReceiveAction->>DB: INSERT after_sale_logs
    ReceiveAction->>Event: dispatch(AfterSaleStatusChanged)
    ReceiveAction-->>API: AfterSaleDTO
    API-->>Warehouse: 200 验收处理完成
```

#### 自动关闭时序图（定时任务）

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Schedule as Laravel Schedule
    participant Monitor as AfterSaleMonitorJob
    participant AfterSale as AfterSale模型
    participant CancelAction as CancelAfterSaleAction
    participant DB as Database
    participant Event as EventDispatcher

    Schedule->>Monitor: 每小时执行
    Monitor->>DB: 查询超15天未退货的售后单
    loop 遍历超期售后单
        Monitor->>AfterSale: 加载模型
        Monitor->>CancelAction: execute(afterSale, [auto => true, reason => '超时未寄回'])
        CancelAction->>AfterSale: transitionTo(CANCELLED)
        AfterSale->>DB: UPDATE status, closed_at, close_reason
        CancelAction->>DB: INSERT after_sale_logs
        CancelAction->>Event: dispatch(AfterSaleStatusChanged)
    end

    Monitor->>DB: 查询完成后超7天未确认的售后单
    loop 遍历超期售后单
        Monitor->>CancelAction: execute(afterSale, [auto => true, reason => '完成后超时自动关闭'])
        CancelAction->>AfterSale: transitionTo(CANCELLED)
        AfterSale->>DB: UPDATE status, closed_at, close_reason
        CancelAction->>DB: INSERT after_sale_logs
        CancelAction->>Event: dispatch(AfterSaleStatusChanged)
    end
```

#### SLA 超时预警时序图

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Schedule as Laravel Schedule
    participant SLAJob as AfterSaleSlaMonitorJob
    participant AfterSale as AfterSale模型
    participant Event as EventDispatcher
    participant Listener as AlertOverdueAfterSale
    participant DB as Database

    Schedule->>SLAJob: 每4小时执行
    SLAJob->>DB: 查询处理中超时的售后单
    loop 遍历超时售后单
        SLAJob->>AfterSale: 计算超时时长
        SLAJob->>Event: dispatch(AfterSaleTimeoutWarning)
        Event->>Listener: handle()
        Listener->>DB: INSERT after_sale_messages (系统提醒客户)
        Listener->>Listener: 记录告警日志 / 通知运营
    end
```

## 6.41 物流与配送子系统设计 (LogisticsService)

> **技术栈**：PHP 8.5 + Laravel 13.x
> **设计原则**：第三方快递/专线物流为核心，多地址运费折扣，轨迹同步异步化，配送区域围栏化管理。
> **边界说明**：门店自营配送已在 6.14/6.39 中覆盖，本节聚焦第三方快递/专线物流。

---

### 6.41.1 设计概述

物流与配送子系统承担订单出仓后的全链路物流管理能力，核心设计原则如下：

1. **多地址运费折扣**：首地址按标准运费计算，附加地址享折扣（如 7 折），公式为 `totalFee = 首地址标准运费 + Σ(附加地址标准运费 × 折扣率)`。
2. **物流状态机内聚**：`DeliveryStatus` Backed Enum 提供 `canTransitionTo()` 与 `isTerminal()` 方法，禁止在 Service / Controller 中分散判断。
3. **轨迹同步异步化**：对接快递鸟/快递100/各家官方 API，通过 `SyncExpressTracksJob` 定时拉取，缓存 24 小时，超 48 小时无更新自动标记异常。
4. **配送区域围栏化**：大区+小区+多边形围栏（经纬度数组），支持地理编码与配送限制检查。
5. **专线与快递双轨**：`DeliveryType` 区分专线（自有物流）、快递（第三方）、云仓、门店自提，专线轨迹通过自有系统同步。
6. **金额统一 MoneyCast**：所有运费、费用字段使用 `MoneyCast`（分↔元），与订单系统保持一致。

```mermaid
graph TB
    subgraph 客户端
        C1[下单选择配送] --> C2[多地址设置]
        C2 --> C3[运费计算]
        C3 --> C4[物流轨迹查询]
    end

    subgraph 运营端
        O1[快递公司管理] --> O2[配送区域配置]
        O2 --> O3[异常预警处理]
    end

    subgraph 领域层
        A1[CalculateShippingFeeAction] --> S1[ShippingFeeCalculator]
        A2[CreateDeliveryAction] --> S2[LogisticsService]
        A3[SyncExpressTracksAction] --> S3[ExpressTrackSyncService]
        S3 --> J1[SyncExpressTracksJob]
        S4[DeliveryAreaService] --> O2
    end

    C1 --> S1
    C2 --> A2
    C4 --> S3
    O1 --> S2
```

---

### 6.41.2 枚举定义

#### DeliveryStatus (物流状态)

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Enums;

/**
 * 物流状态枚举
 * PRD键名: order_deliveries.status
 * 0=待揽收 / 1=已揽收 / 2=运输中 / 3=派送中 / 4=已签收 / 5=异常 / 6=已退回
 */
enum DeliveryStatus: int
{
    case PENDING_PICKUP = 0;   // 待揽收
    case PICKED_UP      = 1;   // 已揽收
    case IN_TRANSIT     = 2;   // 运输中
    case OUT_FOR_DELIVERY = 3; // 派送中
    case DELIVERED      = 4;   // 已签收
    case EXCEPTION      = 5;   // 异常
    case RETURNED       = 6;   // 已退回

    public function label(): string
    {
        return match ($this) {
            self::PENDING_PICKUP   => '待揽收',
            self::PICKED_UP        => '已揽收',
            self::IN_TRANSIT       => '运输中',
            self::OUT_FOR_DELIVERY => '派送中',
            self::DELIVERED        => '已签收',
            self::EXCEPTION        => '异常',
            self::RETURNED         => '已退回',
        };
    }

    /**
     * 是否允许状态流转到目标状态
     */
    public function canTransitionTo(self $target): bool
    {
        return match ([$this, $target]) {
            // 待揽收 -> 已揽收 / 异常
            [self::PENDING_PICKUP, self::PICKED_UP],
            [self::PENDING_PICKUP, self::EXCEPTION] => true,

            // 已揽收 -> 运输中 / 异常
            [self::PICKED_UP, self::IN_TRANSIT],
            [self::PICKED_UP, self::EXCEPTION] => true,

            // 运输中 -> 派送中 / 异常 / 已退回
            [self::IN_TRANSIT, self::OUT_FOR_DELIVERY],
            [self::IN_TRANSIT, self::EXCEPTION],
            [self::IN_TRANSIT, self::RETURNED] => true,

            // 派送中 -> 已签收 / 异常 / 已退回
            [self::OUT_FOR_DELIVERY, self::DELIVERED],
            [self::OUT_FOR_DELIVERY, self::EXCEPTION],
            [self::OUT_FOR_DELIVERY, self::RETURNED] => true,

            // 异常 -> 运输中 / 已退回（恢复或退回）
            [self::EXCEPTION, self::IN_TRANSIT],
            [self::EXCEPTION, self::RETURNED] => true,

            // 已退回为终态
            default => false,
        };
    }

    /**
     * 是否为终态
     */
    public function isTerminal(): bool
    {
        return in_array($this, [self::DELIVERED, self::RETURNED], true);
    }

    /**
     * 映射为客户侧展示状态（对应 orders.out_status_name）
     */
    public function toCustomerOutStatus(): int
    {
        return match ($this) {
            self::PENDING_PICKUP   => 4, // 已发货
            self::PICKED_UP        => 4, // 已发货
            self::IN_TRANSIT       => 8, // 配送中
            self::OUT_FOR_DELIVERY => 8, // 配送中
            self::DELIVERED        => 9, // 已完成
            self::EXCEPTION        => 8, // 配送中（异常保持配送中，客服跟进）
            self::RETURNED         => 5, // 已取消（退回视同取消）
        };
    }
}
```

#### DeliveryType (配送方式)

> **注意**：本枚举已在 SDD 第 4.3 节（ch01）定义，此处完整复现以确保一致性。

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Enums;

/**
 * 配送方式枚举
 * PRD键名: iM / deliveryType
 * 0=专线 / 1=快递 / 2=云仓 / 3=门店自提
 */
enum DeliveryType: int
{
    case SPECIAL_LINE    = 0; // 专线物流
    case EXPRESS         = 1; // 快递
    case CLOUD_WAREHOUSE = 2; // 云仓
    case SELF_PICKUP     = 3; // 门店自提

    public function label(): string
    {
        return match ($this) {
            self::SPECIAL_LINE    => '专线物流',
            self::EXPRESS         => '快递',
            self::CLOUD_WAREHOUSE => '云仓配送',
            self::SELF_PICKUP     => '门店自提',
        };
    }

    /**
     * 是否为第三方快递（需要对接快递鸟/快递100）
     */
    public function isThirdPartyExpress(): bool
    {
        return $this === self::EXPRESS;
    }

    /**
     * 是否需要物流轨迹同步
     */
    public function requiresTrackSync(): bool
    {
        return in_array($this, [self::SPECIAL_LINE, self::EXPRESS, self::CLOUD_WAREHOUSE], true);
    }
}
```

#### ExpressCompany (快递公司)

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Enums;

/**
 * 快递公司枚举
 * PRD: 支持顺丰、圆通、中通等多家快递
 */
enum ExpressCompany: string
{
    case SF         = 'shunfeng';    // 顺丰速运
    case YTO        = 'yuantong';    // 圆通速递
    case ZTO        = 'zhongtong';   // 中通快递
    case STO        = 'shentong';    // 申通快递
    case EMS        = 'ems';         // EMS
    case YUNDA      = 'yunda';       // 韵达速递
    case JD         = 'jd';          // 京东物流
    case DEBANG     = 'debang';      // 德邦快递
    case JT         = 'jitu';        // 极兔速递
    case SPECIAL    = 'zhuanxian';   // 怡安专线（自有）

    public function label(): string
    {
        return match ($this) {
            self::SF      => '顺丰速运',
            self::YTO     => '圆通速递',
            self::ZTO     => '中通快递',
            self::STO     => '申通快递',
            self::EMS     => 'EMS',
            self::YUNDA   => '韵达速递',
            self::JD      => '京东物流',
            self::DEBANG  => '德邦快递',
            self::JT      => '极兔速递',
            self::SPECIAL => '怡安专线',
        };
    }

    /**
     * 快递鸟/快递100 对应的查询编码
     */
    public function queryCode(): string
    {
        return match ($this) {
            self::SF      => 'SF',
            self::YTO     => 'YTO',
            self::ZTO     => 'ZTO',
            self::STO     => 'STO',
            self::EMS     => 'EMS',
            self::YUNDA   => 'YD',
            self::JD      => 'JD',
            self::DEBANG  => 'DBK',
            self::JT      => 'JT',
            self::SPECIAL => 'YIAN',
        };
    }

    /**
     * 是否支持电子面单
     */
    public function supportsElectronicWaybill(): bool
    {
        return $this !== self::SPECIAL;
    }
}
```

#### DeliveryTimeliness (配送时效)

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Enums;

/**
 * 配送时效枚举（位掩码）
 * PRD键名: GM / deliveryTimeliness
 * 1=当日发 / 2=同城快递 / 4=半日达
 */
enum DeliveryTimeliness: int
{
    case SAME_DAY_SHIP  = 1; // 当日发
    case SAME_CITY      = 2; // 同城快递
    case HALF_DAY       = 4; // 半日达

    public function label(): string
    {
        return match ($this) {
            self::SAME_DAY_SHIP => '当日发',
            self::SAME_CITY     => '同城快递',
            self::HALF_DAY      => '半日达',
        };
    }

    /**
     * 解码位掩码为枚举数组
     */
    public static function decode(int $mask): array
    {
        $result = [];
        foreach (self::cases() as $case) {
            if ($mask & $case->value) {
                $result[] = $case;
            }
        }
        return $result;
    }

    /**
     * 编码枚举数组为位掩码
     */
    public static function encode(array $cases): int
    {
        $mask = 0;
        foreach ($cases as $case) {
            if ($case instanceof self) {
                $mask |= $case->value;
            }
        }
        return $mask;
    }

    /**
     * 位掩码是否包含当前标志
     */
    public function inMask(int $mask): bool
    {
        return (bool) ($mask & $this->value);
    }
}
```

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Enums;

/**

 */
enum AddressType: int
{
    case DELIVERY = 0; // 收货地址
    case INVOICE  = 1; // 发票地址
    case RETURN   = 2; // 退货地址

    public function label(): string
    {
        return match ($this) {
            self::DELIVERY => '收货地址',
            self::INVOICE  => '发票地址',
            self::RETURN   => '退货地址',
        };
    }
}
```

### 6.41.4 Eloquent 模型

#### OrderDelivery 模型

> **说明**：本模型已在 SDD 5.2.31 节定义，此处复现完整字段与关联，新增 `transitionTo()` 状态流转方法。

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Domains\Logistics\Models;

use App\Domains\Common\Castables\MoneyCast;
use App\Enums\DeliveryStatus;
use App\Models\Order;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsTo;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\HasMany;

class OrderDelivery extends Model
{
    use HasFactory;

    protected $table = 'order_deliveries';

    protected $fillable = [
        'order_id', 'express_company', 'tracking_no', 'status',
        'factory_code', 'delivery_time', 'signed_at',
        'sign_image', 'sign_type', 'signer_name',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'status'        => DeliveryStatus::class,
        'factory_code'  => 'integer',
        'delivery_time' => 'datetime',
        'signed_at'     => 'datetime',
    ];

    public function order(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Order::class, 'order_id');
    }

    public function expressTracks(): HasMany
    {
        return $this->hasMany(ExpressTrack::class, 'order_delivery_id');
    }

    /**
     * 状态流转（带合法性校验）
     *
     * @throws \InvalidArgumentException
     */
    public function transitionTo(DeliveryStatus $target, ?string $remark = null): void
    {
        $current = $this->status;

        if (! $current->canTransitionTo($target)) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException(
                "物流单 {$this->tracking_no} 不允许从 {$current->label()} 流转到 {$target->label()}"
            );
        }

        $this->update([
            'status'    => $target,
            'signed_at' => $target === DeliveryStatus::DELIVERED ? now() : $this->signed_at,
        ]);

        // 触发物流状态变更事件
        event(new \App\Domains\Logistics\Events\DeliveryStatusChanged($this, $current, $target, $remark));
    }

    /**
     * 查询作用域：待揽收
     */
    public function scopePendingPickup($query)
    {
        return $query->where('status', DeliveryStatus::PENDING_PICKUP);
    }

    /**
     * 查询作用域：运输中（含已揽收、运输中、派送中）
     */
    public function scopeInTransit($query)
    {
        return $query->whereIn('status', [
            DeliveryStatus::PICKED_UP->value,
            DeliveryStatus::IN_TRANSIT->value,
            DeliveryStatus::OUT_FOR_DELIVERY->value,
        ]);
    }

    /**
     * 查询作用域：异常
     */
    public function scopeException($query)
    {
        return $query->where('status', DeliveryStatus::EXCEPTION);
    }
}
```

#### OrderMultiDelivery 模型

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Domains\Logistics\Models;

use App\Domains\Common\Castables\MoneyCast;
use App\Enums\DeliveryStatus;
use App\Models\Order;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsTo;

class OrderMultiDelivery extends Model
{
    protected $table = 'order_multi_deliveries';

    protected $fillable = [
        'order_id', 'address_id', 'receiver_name', 'phone',
        'province_name', 'city_name', 'county_name', 'detail_address',
        'quantity', 'fee', 'discount_rate', 'express_company', 'tracking_no',
        'status', 'ship_status', 'is_primary', 'shipped_at', 'signed_at',
        'sign_image', 'sign_type', 'signer_name',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'order_id'      => 'integer',
        'address_id'    => 'integer',
        'quantity'      => 'integer',
        'fee'           => MoneyCast::class,
        'discount_rate' => MoneyCast::class,
        'status'        => DeliveryStatus::class,
        'is_primary'    => 'boolean',
        'shipped_at'    => 'datetime',
        'signed_at'     => 'datetime',
    ];

    public function order(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Order::class, 'order_id');
    }

    /**
     * 是否为首地址
     */
    public function isPrimary(): bool
    {
        return $this->is_primary;
    }

    /**
     * 计算折扣后运费（元）
     */
    public function discountedFee(): float
    {
        return $this->fee->toFloat() * (float) $this->discount_rate;
    }
}
```

#### ExpressTrack 模型

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Domains\Logistics\Models;

use App\Enums\DeliveryStatus;
use App\Models\Order;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model;
use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Relations\BelongsTo;

class ExpressTrack extends Model
{
    protected $table = 'express_tracks';

    protected $fillable = [
        'order_id', 'order_delivery_id', 'express_company', 'tracking_no',
        'status', 'tracks', 'last_event_at', 'synced_at', 'cached_until',
    ];

    protected $casts = [
        'status'       => DeliveryStatus::class,
        'tracks'       => 'array',
        'last_event_at' => 'datetime',
        'synced_at'    => 'datetime',
        'cached_until' => 'datetime',
    ];

    public function order(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(Order::class, 'order_id');
    }

    public function orderDelivery(): BelongsTo
    {
        return $this->belongsTo(OrderDelivery::class, 'order_delivery_id');
    }

    /**
     * 查询作用域：缓存已过期
     */
    public function scopeCacheExpired($query)
    {
        return $query->where(function ($q) {
            $q->whereNull('cached_until')
              ->orWhere('cached_until', '<=', now());
        });
    }

    /**
     * 查询作用域：超48小时无更新
     */
    public function scopeStale($query, int $hours = 48)
    {
        return $query->whereNotNull('last_event_at')
                     ->where('last_event_at', '<=', now()->subHours($hours))
                     ->where('status', '!=', DeliveryStatus::DELIVERED);
    }

    /**
     * 刷新缓存过期时间（默认24小时）
     */
    public function refreshCache(int $ttlHours = 24): void
    {
        $this->update(['cached_until' => now()->addHours($ttlHours)]);
    }
}
```

### 6.41.5 Action 类

#### CalculateShippingFeeAction

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Domains\Logistics\Actions;

use App\Domains\Common\ValueObjects\Money;
use App\Domains\Logistics\Models\OrderMultiDelivery;
use App\Domains\Logistics\Services\ShippingFeeCalculator;
use App\Models\Order;

/**
 * 计算运费 Action
 * FR-LOG-002 / FR-LOG-022-A / FR-LOG-022-C
 */
class CalculateShippingFeeAction
{
    public function __construct(
        private ShippingFeeCalculator $calculator,
    ) {}

    /**
     * 执行运费计算
     *
     * @param Order $order 订单
     * @param array $addresses 地址数组，每项含 address_id, quantity, province_name, city_name...
     * @param float $additionalDiscountRate 附加地址折扣率（默认0.7即7折）
     * @return array {
     *   perAddressFee: array, // 每个地址的运费明细
     *   totalFee: Money,      // 总运费
     * }
     */
    public function execute(Order $order, array $addresses, float $additionalDiscountRate = 0.7): array
    {
        $perAddressFee = [];
        $totalFee = Money::zero();

        foreach ($addresses as $index => $address) {
            $isPrimary = $index === 0;
            $baseFee = $this->calculator->calculate(
                order: $order,
                province: $address['province_name'] ?? '',
                city: $address['city_name'] ?? '',
                county: $address['county_name'] ?? '',
                weight: $order->weight ?? 0,
                quantity: $address['quantity'] ?? 1,
            );

            $discountRate = $isPrimary ? 1.0 : $additionalDiscountRate;
            $discountedFee = $baseFee->multiply($discountRate);

            $perAddressFee[] = [
                'address_id'     => $address['address_id'] ?? null,
                'is_primary'     => $isPrimary,
                'base_fee'       => $baseFee,
                'discount_rate'  => $discountRate,
                'discounted_fee' => $discountedFee,
            ];

            $totalFee = $totalFee->add($discountedFee);
        }

        return [
            'perAddressFee' => $perAddressFee,
            'totalFee'      => $totalFee,
        ];
    }
}
```

#### CreateDeliveryAction

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Domains\Logistics\Actions;

use App\Domains\Logistics\Models\OrderDelivery;
use App\Domains\Logistics\Models\OrderMultiDelivery;
use App\Enums\DeliveryStatus;
use App\Models\Order;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;

/**
 * 创建物流单 Action
 * 支持单地址与多地址配送
 */
class CreateDeliveryAction
{
    /**
     * 创建主物流单
     */
    public function execute(
        Order $order,
        string $expressCompany,
        ?string $trackingNo = null,
        ?int $factoryCode = null,
    ): OrderDelivery {
        return DB::transaction(function () use ($order, $expressCompany, $trackingNo, $factoryCode) {
            $delivery = OrderDelivery::create([
                'order_id'        => $order->id,
                'express_company' => $expressCompany,
                'tracking_no'     => $trackingNo,
                'status'          => DeliveryStatus::PENDING_PICKUP,
                'factory_code'    => $factoryCode,
                'delivery_time'   => $this->estimateDeliveryTime($order),
            ]);

            return $delivery;
        });
    }

    /**
     * 创建多地址配送记录
     *
     * @param Order $order
     * @param array $addresses 地址明细数组
     */
    public function executeMulti(Order $order, array $addresses): void
    {
        DB::transaction(function () use ($order, $addresses) {
            OrderMultiDelivery::where('order_id', $order->id)->delete();

            foreach ($addresses as $index => $addr) {
                OrderMultiDelivery::create([
                    'order_id'        => $order->id,
                    'address_id'      => $addr['address_id'],
                    'receiver_name'   => $addr['receiver_name'],
                    'phone'           => $addr['phone'],
                    'province_name'   => $addr['province_name'],
                    'city_name'       => $addr['city_name'],
                    'county_name'     => $addr['county_name'],
                    'detail_address'  => $addr['detail_address'],
                    'quantity'        => $addr['quantity'] ?? 0,
                    'fee'             => $addr['fee'] ?? 0,
                    'discount_rate'   => $addr['discount_rate'] ?? ($index === 0 ? 1.0 : 0.7),
                    'express_company' => $addr['express_company'] ?? null,
                    'tracking_no'     => $addr['tracking_no'] ?? null,
                    'status'          => DeliveryStatus::PENDING_PICKUP,
                    'is_primary'      => $index === 0,
                ]);
            }
        });
    }

    /**
     * 预估配送时间（根据配送区域与时效）
     */
    private function estimateDeliveryTime(Order $order): ?\Carbon\Carbon
    {
        // 从配送区域服务获取预计天数
        $days = app(\App\Domains\Logistics\Services\DeliveryAreaService::class)
            ->getDeliveryDays($order->province_name, $order->city_name);

        return $days ? now()->addDays($days) : null;
    }
}
```

#### UpdateExpressTrackAction

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Domains\Logistics\Actions;

use App\Domains\Logistics\Models\ExpressTrack;
use App\Enums\DeliveryStatus;

/**
 * 更新物流轨迹 Action
 * 由 SyncExpressTracksJob 调用
 */
class UpdateExpressTrackAction
{
    /**
     * 执行轨迹更新
     *
     * @param ExpressTrack $expressTrack
     * @param array $tracks 从第三方API拉取的轨迹数组
     * @param DeliveryStatus $latestStatus 最新状态
     */
    public function execute(
        ExpressTrack $expressTrack,
        array $tracks,
        DeliveryStatus $latestStatus,
    ): void {
        $lastEvent = $tracks[0] ?? null;

        $expressTrack->update([
            'tracks'        => $tracks,
            'status'        => $latestStatus,
            'last_event_at' => $lastEvent['time'] ?? now(),
            'synced_at'     => now(),
        ]);

        $expressTrack->refreshCache();

        // 同步更新 order_deliveries 状态
        if ($expressTrack->orderDelivery) {
            $current = $expressTrack->orderDelivery->status;
            if ($current->canTransitionTo($latestStatus)) {
                $expressTrack->orderDelivery->transitionTo($latestStatus);
            }
        }

        // 触发轨迹更新事件
        event(new \App\Domains\Logistics\Events\ExpressTrackUpdated($expressTrack, $latestStatus));
    }
}
```

#### SyncExpressTracksAction

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Domains\Logistics\Actions;

use App\Domains\Logistics\Models\ExpressTrack;
use App\Domains\Logistics\Services\ExpressTrackSyncService;
use App\Enums\DeliveryStatus;

/**
 * 批量同步物流轨迹 Action
 * 由定时任务或命令调用
 */
class SyncExpressTracksAction
{
    public function __construct(
        private ExpressTrackSyncService $syncService,
        private UpdateExpressTrackAction $updateAction,
    ) {}

    /**
     * 执行批量同步
     *
     * @param int $batchSize 每批处理数量
     * @return array { synced: int, failed: int }
     */
    public function execute(int $batchSize = 50): array
    {
        $tracks = ExpressTrack::cacheExpired()
            ->whereNotIn('status', [
                DeliveryStatus::DELIVERED->value,
                DeliveryStatus::RETURNED->value,
            ])
            ->limit($batchSize)
            ->get();

        $synced = 0;
        $failed = 0;

        foreach ($tracks as $expressTrack) {
            try {
                $result = $this->syncService->fetch(
                    company: $expressTrack->express_company,
                    trackingNo: $expressTrack->tracking_no,
                );

                if ($result !== null) {
                    $this->updateAction->execute(
                        $expressTrack,
                        $result['tracks'],
                        $result['status'],
                    );
                    $synced++;
                }
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                \Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log::error('物流轨迹同步失败', [
                    'tracking_no' => $expressTrack->tracking_no,
                    'error'       => $e->getMessage(),
                ]);
                $failed++;
            }
        }

        return ['synced' => $synced, 'failed' => $failed];
    }
}
```
