### 6.56.4 枚举补充

> **覆盖**：FR-POINT-001~017（全模块类型定义）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Enums;

/**
 * 积分交易类型枚举
 * FR-POINT-001~011（积分全生命周期）
 */
enum PointTransactionType: string
{
    case EARN = 'earn';       // 获取
    case DEDUCT = 'deduct';   // 订单抵扣（FR-POINT-007）
    case EXCHANGE = 'exchange'; // 积分商城兑换（FR-POINT-008/009）
    case EXPIRE = 'expire';   // 过期清零
    case REFUND = 'refund';   // 订单取消/退款退回
    case MANUAL = 'manual';   // 管理员手动调整

    public function label(): string
    {
        return match ($this) {
            self::EARN => '获取',
            self::DEDUCT => '订单抵扣',
            self::EXCHANGE => '积分兑换',
            self::EXPIRE => '过期',
            self::REFUND => '退回',
            self::MANUAL => '手动调整',
        };
    }
}

/**
 * 成长值交易类型枚举
 * FR-POINT-012~014
 */
enum GrowthValueTransactionType: string
{
    case EARN = 'earn';    // 获取
    case DEDUCT = 'deduct'; // 扣除

    public function label(): string
    {
        return match ($this) {
            self::EARN => '获取',
            self::DEDUCT => '扣除',
        };
    }
}

/**
 * VIP变更原因枚举
 * FR-POINT-015~017
 */
enum VipChangeReason: string
{
    case UPGRADE = 'upgrade';   // 升级
    case DOWNGRADE = 'downgrade'; // 降级
    case MANUAL = 'manual';     // 手动调整
    case EXPIRE = 'expire';     // 过期降级

    public function label(): string
    {
        return match ($this) {
            self::UPGRADE => '等级晋升',
            self::DOWNGRADE => '等级降级',
            self::MANUAL => '手动调整',
            self::EXPIRE => '过期降级',
        };
    }
}
```

---

### 6.56.5 Action 类设计

#### 6.56.5.1 EarnPointsAction — 积分获取

> **覆盖**：FR-POINT-001~005（注册/首单/登录/订单完成/评价/邀请等场景积分获取）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Domains\Point\Actions;

use App\Domains\Customer\Models\Customer;
use App\Domains\Point\Models\PointRule;
use App\Domains\Point\Models\PointTransaction;
use App\Enums\PointTransactionType;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;

class EarnPointsAction
{
    /**
     * 执行积分获取
     *
     * @param int $customerId 客户ID
     * @param string $actionType 行为类型（对应 point_rules.action_type）
     * @param string $sourceId 业务来源ID
     * @param string|null $description 描述
     * @return PointTransaction|null
     */
    public function execute(
        int $customerId,
        string $actionType,
        string $sourceId,
        ?string $description = null,
    ): ?PointTransaction {
        $rule = PointRule::enabled()->where('action_type', $actionType)->first();

        if (!$rule) {
            Log::info("[EarnPoints] 无生效规则，跳过: actionType={$actionType}");
            return null;
        }

        // 幂等检查：同一来源不重复发放
        $exists = PointTransaction::where('customer_id', $customerId)
            ->where('source_type', $actionType)
            ->where('source_id', $sourceId)
            ->where('type', PointTransactionType::EARN)
            ->exists();

        if ($exists) {
            Log::warning("[EarnPoints] 积分已发放，幂等跳过: customerId={$customerId}, source={$sourceId}");
            return null;
        }

        // 每日上限检查
        if ($rule->limit_per_day > 0) {
            $todayEarned = PointTransaction::where('customer_id', $customerId)
                ->where('type', PointTransactionType::EARN)
                ->where('source_type', $actionType)
                ->whereDate('created_at', today())
                ->sum('points');

            if ($todayEarned >= $rule->limit_per_day) {
                Log::info("[EarnPoints] 已达每日上限: customerId={$customerId}, actionType={$actionType}");
                return null;
            }

            $points = min($rule->points_awarded, $rule->limit_per_day - $todayEarned);
        } else {
            $points = $rule->points_awarded;
        }

        if ($points <= 0) {
            return null;
        }

        return DB::transaction(function () use ($customerId, $points, $actionType, $sourceId, $description, $rule) {
            // 1. 乐观锁更新余额
            Customer::where('id', $customerId)->increment('point_balance', $points);
            $balanceAfter = Customer::where('id', $customerId)->value('point_balance');

            // 2. 写入流水
            $transaction = PointTransaction::create([
                'customer_id' => $customerId,
                'type' => PointTransactionType::EARN,
                'points' => $points,
                'balance_after' => $balanceAfter,
                'source_type' => $actionType,
                'source_id' => $sourceId,
                'description' => $description ?: "{$rule->name} 获得 {$points} 积分",
                'expire_at' => now()->addYear(), // 默认1年有效期
                'created_at' => now(),
            ]);

            Log::info('[EarnPoints] 积分获取成功', [
                'customer_id' => $customerId,
                'points' => $points,
                'balance_after' => $balanceAfter,
                'action_type' => $actionType,
            ]);

            return $transaction;
        });
    }
}
```

#### 6.56.5.2 ConsumePointsAction — 积分消费

> **覆盖**：FR-POINT-006~009（积分抵扣/兑换消费）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Domains\Point\Actions;

use App\Domains\Customer\Models\Customer;
use App\Domains\Point\Models\PointTransaction;
use App\Enums\PointTransactionType;
use App\Exceptions\BusinessException;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;

class ConsumePointsAction
{
    /**
     * 消费积分（抵扣/兑换）
     *
     * @param int $customerId 客户ID
     * @param int $points 消费积分数量（正数）
     * @param string $sourceType 来源类型
     * @param string $sourceId 来源ID
     * @param string|null $description 描述
     * @return PointTransaction
     * @throws BusinessException 积分不足时抛出
     */
    public function execute(
        int $customerId,
        int $points,
        string $sourceType,
        string $sourceId,
        ?string $description = null,
    ): PointTransaction {
        if ($points <= 0) {
            throw new BusinessException('POINT_INVALID', '消费积分必须大于0');
        }

        return DB::transaction(function () use ($customerId, $points, $sourceType, $sourceId, $description) {
            // 1. 乐观锁检查并扣减余额
            $customer = Customer::lockForUpdate()->find($customerId);

            if (!$customer || $customer->point_balance < $points) {
                throw new BusinessException('POINT_NOT_ENOUGH', '积分不足');
            }

            $customer->decrement('point_balance', $points);
            $balanceAfter = $customer->fresh()->point_balance;

            // 2. 写入消费流水
            $transaction = PointTransaction::create([
                'customer_id' => $customerId,
                'type' => PointTransactionType::DEDUCT,
                'points' => -$points,
                'balance_after' => $balanceAfter,
                'source_type' => $sourceType,
                'source_id' => $sourceId,
                'description' => $description ?: "消费 {$points} 积分",
                'created_at' => now(),
            ]);

            Log::info('[ConsumePoints] 积分消费成功', [
                'customer_id' => $customerId,
                'points' => $points,
                'balance_after' => $balanceAfter,
                'source_type' => $sourceType,
            ]);

            return $transaction;
        });
    }
}
```

#### 6.56.5.3 ExpirePointsAction — 积分过期处理

> **覆盖**：FR-POINT-010~011（过期清理，FIFO 策略）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Domains\Point\Actions;

use App\Domains\Customer\Models\Customer;
use App\Domains\Point\Models\PointTransaction;
use App\Enums\PointTransactionType;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;

class ExpirePointsAction
{
    /**
     * 处理单条过期积分（FIFO：先获取的先过期）
     *
     * @param PointTransaction $earnRecord 待过期的获取记录
     * @return bool 是否处理成功
     */
    public function execute(PointTransaction $earnRecord): bool
    {
        if ($earnRecord->type !== PointTransactionType::EARN || $earnRecord->points <= 0) {
            return false;
        }

        if (!$earnRecord->expire_at || $earnRecord->expire_at->isFuture()) {
            return false;
        }

        return DB::transaction(function () use ($earnRecord) {
            // 1. 乐观锁：幂等检查，避免重复过期
            $fresh = PointTransaction::lockForUpdate()->find($earnRecord->id);

            // 通过 source_type='expire' + source_id 关联到原记录，判断是否已过期
            $alreadyExpired = PointTransaction::where('source_type', 'expire')
                ->where('source_id', (string) $earnRecord->id)
                ->where('type', PointTransactionType::EXPIRE)
                ->exists();

            if ($alreadyExpired) {
                Log::warning("[ExpirePoints] 已过期，跳过: recordId={$earnRecord->id}");
                return false;
            }

            // 2. 扣减客户余额
            Customer::where('id', $earnRecord->customer_id)
                ->decrement('point_balance', $earnRecord->points);

            $balanceAfter = Customer::where('id', $earnRecord->customer_id)->value('point_balance');

            // 3. 写入过期扣除流水
            PointTransaction::create([
                'customer_id' => $earnRecord->customer_id,
                'type' => PointTransactionType::EXPIRE,
                'points' => -$earnRecord->points,
                'balance_after' => $balanceAfter,
                'source_type' => 'expire',
                'source_id' => (string) $earnRecord->id,
                'description' => "积分过期扣除（原记录#{$earnRecord->id}）",
                'created_at' => now(),
            ]);

            Log::info('[ExpirePoints] 过期处理成功', [
                'record_id' => $earnRecord->id,
                'customer_id' => $earnRecord->customer_id,
                'points' => $earnRecord->points,
                'balance_after' => $balanceAfter,
            ]);

            return true;
        });
    }
}
```

#### 6.56.5.4 EarnGrowthValueAction — 成长值获取

> **覆盖**：FR-POINT-013（订单完成/评价/签到等场景成长值获取）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Domains\Point\Actions;

use App\Domains\Customer\Models\Customer;
use App\Domains\Point\Models\GrowthValueRule;
use App\Domains\Point\Models\GrowthValueTransaction;
use App\Domains\Point\Models\VipLevelHistory;
use App\Enums\GrowthValueTransactionType;
use App\Enums\VipChangeReason;
use App\Enums\VipLevel;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;

class EarnGrowthValueAction
{
    /**
     * 发放成长值并触发VIP升级检查
     *
     * @param int $customerId 客户ID
     * @param string $actionType 行为类型（对应 growth_value_rules.action_type）
     * @param string $sourceId 来源ID
     * @param string|null $description 描述
     * @return GrowthValueTransaction|null
     */
    public function execute(
        int $customerId,
        string $actionType,
        string $sourceId,
        ?string $description = null,
    ): ?GrowthValueTransaction {
        $rule = GrowthValueRule::enabled()->where('action_type', $actionType)->first();

        if (!$rule || $rule->growth_value <= 0) {
            Log::info("[EarnGrowthValue] 无生效规则，跳过: actionType={$actionType}");
            return null;
        }

        // RFM联动计算（FR-POINT-011）
        $growthValue = $rule->growth_value;
        if ($rule->calculation_type === 'rfm_linked') {
            $rfm = \App\Models\CustomerRfmScore::where('customer_id', $customerId)->first();
            if ($rfm) {
                $calculator = app(\App\Domains\Point\Services\RfmGrowthValueCalculator::class);
                $growthValue = $calculator->calculate($rfm, (float) $sourceId);
            }
        }

        // 幂等检查
        $exists = GrowthValueTransaction::where('customer_id', $customerId)
            ->where('source_type', $actionType)
            ->where('source_id', $sourceId)
            ->where('type', GrowthValueTransactionType::EARN)
            ->exists();

        if ($exists) {
            Log::warning("[EarnGrowthValue] 成长值已发放，幂等跳过: customerId={$customerId}, source={$sourceId}");
            return null;
        }

        return DB::transaction(function () use ($customerId, $rule, $actionType, $sourceId, $description, $growthValue) {
            // 1. 更新客户成长值
            Customer::where('id', $customerId)->increment('grow_value', $growthValue);
            $customer = Customer::find($customerId);
            $totalAfter = $customer->grow_value;

            // 2. 写入流水
            $transaction = GrowthValueTransaction::create([
                'customer_id' => $customerId,
                'type' => GrowthValueTransactionType::EARN,
                'growth_value' => $growthValue,
                'total_after' => $totalAfter,
                'source_type' => $actionType,
                'source_id' => $sourceId,
                'description' => $description ?: "{$rule->name} 获得 {$growthValue} 成长值",
                'created_at' => now(),
            ]);

            // 3. VIP升级检查
            $this->checkUpgrade($customer);

            Log::info('[EarnGrowthValue] 成长值发放成功', [
                'customer_id' => $customerId,
                'growth_value' => $growthValue,
                'total_after' => $totalAfter,
            ]);

            return $transaction;
        });
    }

    /**
     * VIP等级自动晋升
     */
    private function checkUpgrade(Customer $customer): void
    {
        $currentLevel = VipLevel::tryFrom($customer->vip_level) ?? VipLevel::LV0;
        $newLevel = VipLevel::fromGrowthValue($customer->grow_value);

        if ($newLevel->value > $currentLevel->value) {
            $oldLevel = $customer->vip_level;

            $customer->update([
                'vip_level' => $newLevel->value,
                'vip_grace_end_time' => null, // 升级后清空宽限期
                'downgrade_warn_sent' => false,
            ]);

            // 写入升级历史
            VipLevelHistory::create([
                'customer_id' => $customer->id,
                'from_level' => $oldLevel,
                'to_level' => $newLevel->value,
                'reason' => VipChangeReason::UPGRADE,
                'growth_value_at_change' => $customer->grow_value,
                'operator_type' => 'system',
                'changed_at' => now(),
            ]);

            // 发送升级通知
            $customer->notify(new \App\Notifications\VipUpgraded($customer, $newLevel));

            Log::info('[VIP] 等级晋升', [
                'customer_id' => $customer->id,
                'old_level' => $oldLevel,
                'new_level' => $newLevel->value,
            ]);
        }
    }
}
```

#### 6.56.5.5 CheckVipUpgradeAction — 检查VIP升级

> **覆盖**：FR-POINT-012~014（成长值变动后的等级重新计算）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Domains\Point\Actions;

use App\Domains\Customer\Models\Customer;
use App\Domains\Point\Models\VipLevelHistory;
use App\Enums\VipChangeReason;
use App\Enums\VipLevel;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;

class CheckVipUpgradeAction
{
    /**
     * 手动触发VIP升级检查（适用于批量修复或管理员操作后）
     *
     * @param int $customerId 客户ID
     * @return array{upgraded: bool, from_level: int, to_level: int}
     */
    public function execute(int $customerId): array
    {
        $customer = Customer::find($customerId);

        if (!$customer) {
            return ['upgraded' => false, 'from_level' => 0, 'to_level' => 0];
        }

        $currentLevel = VipLevel::tryFrom($customer->vip_level) ?? VipLevel::LV0;
        $newLevel = VipLevel::fromGrowthValue($customer->grow_value);

        if ($newLevel->value > $currentLevel->value) {
            $oldLevel = $customer->vip_level;

            $customer->update([
                'vip_level' => $newLevel->value,
                'vip_grace_end_time' => null,
                'downgrade_warn_sent' => false,
            ]);

            VipLevelHistory::create([
                'customer_id' => $customer->id,
                'from_level' => $oldLevel,
                'to_level' => $newLevel->value,
                'reason' => VipChangeReason::UPGRADE,
                'growth_value_at_change' => $customer->grow_value,
                'operator_type' => 'system',
                'changed_at' => now(),
            ]);

            $customer->notify(new \App\Notifications\VipUpgraded($customer, $newLevel));

            Log::info('[CheckVipUpgrade] 触发升级', [
                'customer_id' => $customerId,
                'old_level' => $oldLevel,
                'new_level' => $newLevel->value,
            ]);

            return ['upgraded' => true, 'from_level' => $oldLevel, 'to_level' => $newLevel->value];
        }

        return ['upgraded' => false, 'from_level' => $currentLevel->value, 'to_level' => $currentLevel->value];
    }
}
```

#### 6.56.5.6 CheckVipDowngradeAction — 检查VIP降级

> **覆盖**：FR-POINT-015~017（降级检查、保级期逻辑）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Domains\Point\Actions;

use App\Domains\Customer\Models\Customer;
use App\Domains\Point\Models\GrowthValueTransaction;
use App\Domains\Point\Models\VipLevelHistory;
use App\Enums\VipChangeReason;
use App\Enums\VipLevel;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;

class CheckVipDowngradeAction
{
    /**
     * 执行VIP降级检查（Schedule 每月调用）
     *
     * @param Customer $customer 客户对象
     * @return array{downgraded: bool, from_level: int, to_level: int, reason: string}
     */
    public function execute(Customer $customer): array
    {
        if ($customer->vip_level <= 0) {
            return ['downgraded' => false, 'from_level' => 0, 'to_level' => 0, 'reason' => 'not_vip'];
        }

        // 1. 计算有效成长值（12个月内）
        $validGrowth = GrowthValueTransaction::where('customer_id', $customer->id)
            ->where('type', \App\Enums\GrowthValueTransactionType::EARN)
            ->where('created_at', '>=', now()->subMonths(12))
            ->sum('growth_value');

        $expectedLevel = VipLevel::fromGrowthValue((int) $validGrowth);
        $currentLevel = VipLevel::from($customer->vip_level);

        // 2. 无需降级
        if ($expectedLevel->value >= $currentLevel->value) {
            // 等级维持，清空预警标记
            if ($customer->downgrade_warn_sent) {
                $customer->update(['downgrade_warn_sent' => false]);
            }
            return ['downgraded' => false, 'from_level' => $currentLevel->value, 'to_level' => $currentLevel->value, 'reason' => 'maintain'];
        }

        // 3. 检查宽限期（保级期）
        if ($customer->vip_grace_end_time && $customer->vip_grace_end_time->isFuture()) {
            Log::info("[CheckVipDowngrade] 客户处于宽限期，暂不降级", [
                'customer_id' => $customer->id,
                'grace_end' => $customer->vip_grace_end_time,
            ]);
            return ['downgraded' => false, 'from_level' => $currentLevel->value, 'to_level' => $currentLevel->value, 'reason' => 'in_grace_period'];
        }

        // 4. 执行降级
        return DB::transaction(function () use ($customer, $expectedLevel, $currentLevel, $validGrowth) {
            $oldLevel = $customer->vip_level;

            $customer->update([
                'vip_level' => $expectedLevel->value,
                'vip_grace_end_time' => now()->addDays(30), // 设置新的30天宽限期
                'downgrade_warn_sent' => false,
            ]);

            // 写入降级历史
            VipLevelHistory::create([
                'customer_id' => $customer->id,
                'from_level' => $oldLevel,
                'to_level' => $expectedLevel->value,
                'reason' => VipChangeReason::DOWNGRADE,
                'growth_value_at_change' => (int) $validGrowth,
                'operator_type' => 'system',
                'changed_at' => now(),
            ]);

            // 发送降级通知
            $customer->notify(new \App\Notifications\VipDowngraded($customer, $expectedLevel));

            Log::info('[CheckVipDowngrade] VIP降级完成', [
                'customer_id' => $customer->id,
                'old_level' => $oldLevel,
                'new_level' => $expectedLevel->value,
                'valid_growth' => $validGrowth,
            ]);

            return [
                'downgraded' => true,
                'from_level' => $oldLevel,
                'to_level' => $expectedLevel->value,
                'reason' => 'downgraded',
            ];
        });
    }
}
```

#### 6.56.5.7 AdjustVipLevelAction — 手动调整VIP等级

> **覆盖**：FR-POINT-017（管理员手动调整）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Domains\Point\Actions;

use App\Domains\Customer\Models\Customer;
use App\Domains\Point\Models\VipLevelHistory;
use App\Enums\VipChangeReason;
use App\Enums\VipLevel;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;

class AdjustVipLevelAction
{
    /**
     * 手动调整VIP等级
     *
     * @param int $customerId 客户ID
     * @param int $targetLevel 目标等级
     * @param int $adminId 操作管理员ID
     * @param string|null $remark 备注
     * @return array{changed: bool, from_level: int, to_level: int}
     */
    public function execute(
        int $customerId,
        int $targetLevel,
        int $adminId,
        ?string $remark = null,
    ): array {
        $customer = Customer::findOrFail($customerId);
        $oldLevel = $customer->vip_level;

        if ($oldLevel === $targetLevel) {
            return ['changed' => false, 'from_level' => $oldLevel, 'to_level' => $targetLevel];
        }

        $targetVip = VipLevel::tryFrom($targetLevel);
        if (!$targetVip) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException("无效的VIP等级: {$targetLevel}");
        }

        return DB::transaction(function () use ($customer, $oldLevel, $targetLevel, $adminId, $remark) {
            $customer->update([
                'vip_level' => $targetLevel,
                'vip_grace_end_time' => null,
                'downgrade_warn_sent' => false,
            ]);

            VipLevelHistory::create([
                'customer_id' => $customer->id,
                'from_level' => $oldLevel,
                'to_level' => $targetLevel,
                'reason' => VipChangeReason::MANUAL,
                'growth_value_at_change' => $customer->grow_value,
                'operator_type' => 'admin',
                'operator_id' => $adminId,
                'changed_at' => now(),
            ]);

            Log::info('[AdjustVipLevel] 手动调整VIP等级', [
                'customer_id' => $customer->id,
                'admin_id' => $adminId,
                'old_level' => $oldLevel,
                'new_level' => $targetLevel,
                'remark' => $remark,
            ]);

            return ['changed' => true, 'from_level' => $oldLevel, 'to_level' => $targetLevel];
        });
    }
}
```

#### 6.56.5.8 CheckinAction — 每日签到（含连续加成）

> **覆盖**：FR-POINT-002（每日签到获得积分，连续签到有加成）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Domains\Point\Actions;

use App\Domains\Customer\Models\Customer;
use App\Domains\Point\Models\CustomerCheckinRecord;
use App\Domains\Point\Models\CustomerCheckinStreak;
use App\Enums\GrowthValueType;
use App\Enums\PointType;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;

class CheckinAction
{
    public function __construct(
        private EarnGrowthValueAction $earnGrowthValue,
        private GrantPointsAction $grantPoints,
    ) {}

    public function execute(Customer $customer): array
    {
        return DB::transaction(function () use ($customer) {
            $streak = CustomerCheckinStreak::lockForUpdate()
                ->firstOrCreate(['customer_id' => $customer->id]);

            $today = today();

            // 防重复签到
            if ($streak->last_checkin_date && $streak->last_checkin_date->equalTo($today)) {
                throw new \RuntimeException('今日已签到');
            }

            // 判断是否连续
            $yesterday = $today->copy()->subDay();
            if ($streak->last_checkin_date && $streak->last_checkin_date->equalTo($yesterday)) {
                $streak->current_streak += 1;
            } else {
                $streak->current_streak = 1;
            }

            $streak->last_checkin_date = $today;
            $streak->total_checkins += 1;
            $streak->max_streak = max($streak->max_streak, $streak->current_streak);
            $streak->save();

            // 计算加成
            $config = config('vip.checkin');
            $bonus = $this->calculateBonus($streak->current_streak, $config['streak_bonus'] ?? []);

            $growthValue = (int) round(($config['base_growth_value'] ?? 5) * ($bonus['growth_value_multiplier'] ?? 1.0));
            $points = (int) round(($config['base_points'] ?? 2) * ($bonus['points_multiplier'] ?? 1.0));

            // 发放成长值
            $this->earnGrowthValue->execute(
                customer: $customer,
                amount: $growthValue,
                type: GrowthValueType::CHECKIN,
                sourceId: $streak->id,
                sourceType: CustomerCheckinStreak::class,
                description: "每日签到（连续{$streak->current_streak}天）",
            );

            // 发放积分
            $this->grantPoints->execute(
                customer: $customer,
                amount: $points,
                type: PointType::DAILY_LOGIN,
                sourceId: $streak->id,
            );

            // 写入签到明细
            CustomerCheckinRecord::create([
                'customer_id' => $customer->id,
                'checkin_date' => $today,
                'growth_value' => $growthValue,
                'points' => $points,
            ]);

            return [
                'current_streak' => $streak->current_streak,
                'max_streak' => $streak->max_streak,
                'growth_value_earned' => $growthValue,
                'points_earned' => $points,
                'bonus_label' => $bonus['label'] ?? null,
            ];
        });
    }

    private function calculateBonus(int $streak, array $rules): array
    {
        $default = ['growth_value_multiplier' => 1.0, 'points_multiplier' => 1.0, 'label' => null];
        $matched = $default;
        foreach ($rules as $rule) {
            if ($streak >= ($rule['min_days'] ?? 0)) {
                $matched = $rule;
            }
        }
        return $matched;
    }
}
```

#### 6.56.5.9 DeductGrowthValueAction — 成长值扣除

> **覆盖**：FR-POINT-012（成长值消耗/扣除）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Domains\Point\Actions;

use App\Domains\Customer\Models\Customer;
use App\Domains\Point\Models\GrowthValueTransaction;
use App\Enums\GrowthValueTransactionType;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;

class DeductGrowthValueAction
{
    /**
     * 扣除成长值
     *
     * @param Customer $customer 客户
     * @param int $amount 扣除金额（必须大于0）
     * @param string $type 扣除类型: exchange, activity, penalty, manual_adjust
     * @param int $sourceId 来源ID
     * @param string $sourceType 来源类型
     * @param string $description 描述
     * @param int|null $operatorId 操作人ID（后台操作时）
     * @return GrowthValueTransaction
     * @throws \InvalidArgumentException|\RuntimeException
     */
    public function execute(
        Customer $customer,
        int $amount,
        string $type,
        int $sourceId,
        string $sourceType,
        string $description,
        ?int $operatorId = null,
    ): GrowthValueTransaction {
        if ($amount <= 0) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('扣除金额必须大于0');
        }

        // 获取12个月内有效成长值总额
        $validGrowthValue = GrowthValueTransaction::where('customer_id', $customer->id)
            ->where('type', GrowthValueTransactionType::EARN)
            ->where(function ($q) {
                $q->whereNull('valid_until')
                  ->orWhere('valid_until', '>=', now());
            })
            ->sum('amount')
            - abs(GrowthValueTransaction::where('customer_id', $customer->id)
                ->where('type', GrowthValueTransactionType::DEDUCT)
                ->sum('amount'));

        if ($validGrowthValue < $amount) {
            throw new \RuntimeException("有效成长值不足，当前有效: {$validGrowthValue}，需要: {$amount}");
        }

        return DB::transaction(function () use ($customer, $amount, $type, $sourceId, $sourceType, $description, $operatorId) {
            $transaction = GrowthValueTransaction::create([
                'customer_id' => $customer->id,
                'amount' => -$amount,
                'type' => GrowthValueTransactionType::DEDUCT,
                'source_id' => $sourceId,
                'source_type' => $sourceType,
                'description' => $description,
                'operator_id' => $operatorId,
                'valid_until' => now()->addMonths(12),
            ]);

            return $transaction;
        });
    }
}
```

#### 6.56.5.10 CreatePointExchangeOrderAction — 创建积分兑换订单

> **覆盖**：FR-POINT-008/009（积分兑换商品/优惠券）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Domains\Point\Actions;

use App\Domains\Customer\Models\Customer;
use App\Domains\Point\Models\PointExchangeGoods;
use App\Domains\Point\Models\PointExchangeOrder;
use App\Enums\PointTransactionType;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;

class CreatePointExchangeOrderAction
{
    public function execute(int $customerId, int $goodsId, array $addressData = []): PointExchangeOrder
    {
        $goods = PointExchangeGoods::findOrFail($goodsId);
        if ($goods->stock_qty < 1) {
            throw new \RuntimeException('库存不足');
        }

        $customer = Customer::findOrFail($customerId);
        if ($customer->point_balance < $goods->required_points) {
            throw new \RuntimeException('积分不足');
        }

        return DB::transaction(function () use ($customer, $goods, $addressData) {
            // 扣减积分（使用 EXCHANGE 类型区分积分商城兑换）
            app(ConsumePointsAction::class)->execute(
                customerId: $customer->id,
                points: $goods->required_points,
                sourceType: 'point_mall',
                sourceId: (string) $goods->id,
                description: "兑换商品：{$goods->name}",
            );

            // 扣减库存
            $goods->decrement('stock_qty');

            // 创建兑换订单
            return PointExchangeOrder::create([
                'customer_id' => $customer->id,
                'goods_id' => $goods->id,
                'goods_name' => $goods->name,
                'points_used' => $goods->required_points,
                'address_json' => $addressData,
                'status' => 'pending',
            ]);
        });
    }
}
```

---

### 6.56.6 Service 类设计

#### 6.56.6.1 PointService — 积分核心服务

> **覆盖**：FR-POINT-001~011（获取/消费/查询余额/退回）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Domains\Point\Services;

use App\Domains\Customer\Models\Customer;
use App\Domains\Point\Actions\ConsumePointsAction;
use App\Domains\Point\Actions\EarnPointsAction;
use App\Domains\Point\Models\PointTransaction;
use App\Enums\PointTransactionType;

class PointService
{
    public function __construct(
        private EarnPointsAction $earnAction,
        private ConsumePointsAction $consumeAction,
    ) {}

    /**
     * 获取积分余额
     * FR-POINT-006
     */
    public function getBalance(int $customerId): int
    {
        return Customer::where('id', $customerId)->value('point_balance') ?? 0;
    }

    /**
     * 获取积分流水列表
     * FR-POINT-006
     */
    public function getTransactions(
        int $customerId,
        ?PointTransactionType $type = null,
        int $page = 1,
        int $perPage = 20,
    ): \Illuminate\Contracts\Pagination\LengthAwarePaginator {
        $query = PointTransaction::where('customer_id', $customerId)
            ->orderByDesc('created_at');

        if ($type) {
            $query->where('type', $type);
        }

        return $query->paginate($perPage, ['*'], 'page', $page);
    }

    /**
     * 积分获取入口
     * FR-POINT-001~005
     */
    public function earn(
        int $customerId,
        string $actionType,
        string $sourceId,
        ?string $description = null,
    ): ?PointTransaction {
        return $this->earnAction->execute($customerId, $actionType, $sourceId, $description);
    }

    /**
     * 积分消费入口
     * FR-POINT-007~009
     */
    public function consume(
        int $customerId,
        int $points,
        string $sourceType,
        string $sourceId,
        ?string $description = null,
    ): PointTransaction {
        return $this->consumeAction->execute($customerId, $points, $sourceType, $sourceId, $description);
    }

    /**
     * 退回积分（取消订单/退款时调用）
     * FR-POINT-009
     */
    public function refund(
        int $customerId,
        int $points,
        string $sourceType,
        string $sourceId,
        ?string $description = null,
    ): PointTransaction {
        return \Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB::transaction(function () use ($customerId, $points, $sourceType, $sourceId, $description) {
            Customer::where('id', $customerId)->increment('point_balance', $points);
            $balanceAfter = Customer::where('id', $customerId)->value('point_balance');

            return PointTransaction::create([
                'customer_id' => $customerId,
                'type' => PointTransactionType::REFUND,
                'points' => $points,
                'balance_after' => $balanceAfter,
                'source_type' => $sourceType,
                'source_id' => $sourceId,
                'description' => $description ?: "退回 {$points} 积分",
                'created_at' => now(),
            ]);
        });
    }

    /**
     * 校验积分是否足够
     */
    public function hasEnough(int $customerId, int $points): bool
    {
        return $this->getBalance($customerId) >= $points;
    }
}
```

#### 6.56.6.2 PointRuleService — 积分规则管理

> **覆盖**：FR-POINT-001~005（规则 CRUD、生效判断）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Domains\Point\Services;

use App\Domains\Point\Models\PointRule;

class PointRuleService
{
    /**
     * 获取所有生效的积分规则
     */
    public function getEnabledRules(): \Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Collection
    {
        return PointRule::enabled()->get();
    }

    /**
     * 根据行为类型获取规则
     */
    public function getRuleByActionType(string $actionType): ?PointRule
    {
        return PointRule::enabled()->where('action_type', $actionType)->first();
    }

    /**
     * 创建/更新规则
     */
    public function saveRule(array $data): PointRule
    {
        $rule = isset($data['id']) && $data['id']
            ? PointRule::findOrFail($data['id'])
            : new PointRule();

        $rule->fill($data);
        $rule->save();

        return $rule;
    }

    /**
     * 删除规则
     */
    public function deleteRule(int $ruleId): bool
    {
        return PointRule::where('id', $ruleId)->delete() > 0;
    }
}
```

#### 6.56.6.3 GrowthValueService — 成长值服务

> **覆盖**：FR-POINT-012~014（成长值明细/汇总/发放）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Domains\Point\Services;

use App\Domains\Customer\Models\Customer;
use App\Domains\Point\Actions\EarnGrowthValueAction;
use App\Domains\Point\Models\GrowthValueTransaction;
use App\Enums\GrowthValueTransactionType;
use App\Enums\VipLevel;

class GrowthValueService
{
    public function __construct(
        private EarnGrowthValueAction $earnAction,
    ) {}

    /**
     * 获取成长值明细
     * FR-POINT-014
     */
    public function getRecords(
        int $customerId,
        ?GrowthValueTransactionType $type = null,
        int $page = 1,
        int $perPage = 20,
    ): \Illuminate\Contracts\Pagination\LengthAwarePaginator {
        $query = GrowthValueTransaction::where('customer_id', $customerId)
            ->orderByDesc('created_at');

        if ($type) {
            $query->where('type', $type);
        }

        return $query->paginate($perPage, ['*'], 'page', $page);
    }

    /**
     * 获取成长值汇总（当前等级、距离下一级差值、进度百分比）
     * FR-POINT-012
     */
    public function getSummary(int $customerId): array
    {
        $customer = Customer::findOrFail($customerId);
        $currentLevel = VipLevel::tryFrom($customer->vip_level) ?? VipLevel::LV0;
        $nextLevelValue = min(8, $currentLevel->value + 1);
        $nextLevel = VipLevel::from($nextLevelValue);

        $thresholds = [0, 0, 1_000, 5_000, 20_000, 50_000, 100_000, 200_000, 500_000];
        $prevMin = $thresholds[$currentLevel->value] ?? 0;
        $nextMin = $thresholds[$nextLevelValue] ?? PHP_INT_MAX;

        $progress = $nextMin === PHP_INT_MAX
            ? 100
            : min(100, (int) (($customer->grow_value - $prevMin) * 100 / max(1, $nextMin - $prevMin)));

        return [
            'current_growth' => $customer->grow_value,
            'vip_level' => $currentLevel->value,
            'vip_level_name' => "Lv{$currentLevel->value}",
            'next_level_min' => $nextMin === PHP_INT_MAX ? null : $nextMin,
            'next_level_name' => $nextMin === PHP_INT_MAX ? null : "Lv{$nextLevelValue}",
            'remaining' => $nextMin === PHP_INT_MAX ? 0 : max(0, $nextMin - $customer->grow_value),
            'progress_percent' => $progress,
            'sample_discount' => $currentLevel->sampleDiscount(),
            'print_discount' => $currentLevel->printDiscount(),
        ];
    }

    /**
     * 发放成长值入口
     * FR-POINT-013
     */
    public function earn(
        int $customerId,
        string $actionType,
        string $sourceId,
        ?string $description = null,
    ): ?GrowthValueTransaction {
        return $this->earnAction->execute($customerId, $actionType, $sourceId, $description);
    }

    /**
     * 获取客户当前有效成长值（12个月内）
     */
    public function getValidGrowthValue(int $customerId): int
    {
        return GrowthValueTransaction::where('customer_id', $customerId)
            ->where('type', GrowthValueTransactionType::EARN)
            ->where('created_at', '>=', now()->subMonths(12))
            ->sum('growth_value');
    }
}
```

#### 6.56.6.4 VipLevelService — VIP等级服务

> **覆盖**：FR-POINT-015~017（升级/降级/保级计算、手动调整）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Domains\Point\Services;

use App\Domains\Customer\Models\Customer;
use App\Domains\Point\Actions\AdjustVipLevelAction;
use App\Domains\Point\Actions\CheckVipDowngradeAction;
use App\Domains\Point\Actions\CheckVipUpgradeAction;
use App\Domains\Point\Models\VipLevelHistory;
use App\Enums\VipLevel;

class VipLevelService
{
    public function __construct(
        private CheckVipUpgradeAction $upgradeAction,
        private CheckVipDowngradeAction $downgradeAction,
        private AdjustVipLevelAction $adjustAction,
    ) {}

    /**
     * 检查并执行VIP升级
     */
    public function checkUpgrade(int $customerId): array
    {
        return $this->upgradeAction->execute($customerId);
    }

    /**
     * 检查并执行VIP降级（含保级期逻辑）
     * FR-POINT-015~016
     */
    public function checkDowngrade(Customer $customer): array
    {
        return $this->downgradeAction->execute($customer);
    }

    /**
     * 手动调整VIP等级
     * FR-POINT-017
     */
    public function adjustLevel(int $customerId, int $targetLevel, int $adminId, ?string $remark = null): array
    {
        return $this->adjustAction->execute($customerId, $targetLevel, $adminId, $remark);
    }

    /**
     * 获取VIP等级变更历史
     */
    public function getLevelHistory(int $customerId, int $page = 1, int $perPage = 20): \Illuminate\Contracts\Pagination\LengthAwarePaginator
    {
        return VipLevelHistory::where('customer_id', $customerId)
            ->orderByDesc('changed_at')
            ->paginate($perPage, ['*'], 'page', $page);
    }

    /**
     * 获取VIP等级列表（用于后台下拉）
     */
    public function getLevelOptions(): array
    {
        return array_map(fn (VipLevel $level) => [
            'value' => $level->value,
            'label' => "Lv{$level->value}",
            'growth_threshold' => match ($level) {
                VipLevel::LV0 => 0,
                VipLevel::LV1 => 1,
                VipLevel::LV2 => 1_000,
                VipLevel::LV3 => 5_000,
                VipLevel::LV4 => 20_000,
                VipLevel::LV5 => 50_000,
                VipLevel::LV6 => 100_000,
                VipLevel::LV7 => 200_000,
                VipLevel::LV8 => 500_000,
            },
        ], VipLevel::cases());
    }
}
```

#### 6.56.6.5 PointExpireService — 积分过期处理服务

> **覆盖**：FR-POINT-010~011（每日过期扫描、FIFO 清理）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Domains\Point\Services;

use App\Domains\Point\Actions\ExpirePointsAction;
use App\Domains\Point\Models\PointTransaction;
use App\Enums\PointTransactionType;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;

class PointExpireService
{
    public function __construct(
        private ExpirePointsAction $expireAction,
    ) {}

    /**
     * 批量处理过期积分（FIFO：按 expire_at 升序，先获取的先过期）
     *
     * @param int $batchSize 每批处理数量
     * @return array{processed: int, failed: int}
     */
    public function processExpiredPoints(int $batchSize = 500): array
    {
        $records = PointTransaction::where('type', PointTransactionType::EARN)
            ->where('points', '>', 0)
            ->whereNotNull('expire_at')
            ->where('expire_at', '<', now())
            ->orderBy('expire_at', 'asc') // FIFO：先过期先处理
            ->limit($batchSize)
            ->get();

        $processed = 0;
        $failed = 0;

        foreach ($records as $record) {
            try {
                $success = $this->expireAction->execute($record);
                if ($success) {
                    $processed++;
                } else {
                    $failed++;
                }
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                $failed++;
                Log::error('[PointExpireService] 过期处理异常', [
                    'record_id' => $record->id,
                    'error' => $e->getMessage(),
                ]);
            }
        }

        Log::info('[PointExpireService] 过期积分处理完成', [
            'processed' => $processed,
            'failed' => $failed,
        ]);

        return ['processed' => $processed, 'failed' => $failed];
    }

    /**
     * 获取即将过期的积分预警列表（供前端展示）
     */
    public function getUpcomingExpirations(int $customerId, int $days = 30): \Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Collection
    {
        return PointTransaction::where('customer_id', $customerId)
            ->where('type', PointTransactionType::EARN)
            ->where('points', '>', 0)
            ->whereNotNull('expire_at')
            ->whereBetween('expire_at', [now(), now()->addDays($days)])
            ->orderBy('expire_at', 'asc')
            ->get(['id', 'points', 'expire_at', 'description']);
    }
}
```

#### 6.56.6.6 PointMallService — 积分商城服务

> **覆盖**：FR-POINT-008/009（积分兑换商品/优惠券）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Domains\Point\Services;

use App\Domains\Point\Models\PointExchangeGoods;
use Illuminate\Contracts\Pagination\LengthAwarePaginator;

class PointMallService
{
    /**
     * 获取兑换商品列表
     */
    public function getGoodsList(array $filters): LengthAwarePaginator
    {
        return PointExchangeGoods::query()
            ->when($filters['status'] ?? null, fn ($q, $v) => $q->where('status', $v))
            ->orderByDesc('sort_order')
            ->paginate($filters['per_page'] ?? 15);
    }

    /**
     * 获取商品详情
     */
    public function getGoodsDetail(int $goodsId): PointExchangeGoods
    {
        return PointExchangeGoods::findOrFail($goodsId);
    }

    /**
     * 扣减库存
     */
    public function deductStock(int $goodsId, int $quantity = 1): bool
    {
        $goods = PointExchangeGoods::lockForUpdate()->findOrFail($goodsId);
        if ($goods->stock_qty < $quantity) {
            return false;
        }
        return $goods->decrement('stock_qty', $quantity);
    }
}
```

#### 6.56.6.7 GrowthValueExpireService — 成长值过期处理服务

> **覆盖**：FR-POINT-012（成长值过期/衰减）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Domains\Point\Services;

use App\Domains\Customer\Models\Customer;
use App\Domains\Point\Models\GrowthValueTransaction;
use App\Enums\GrowthValueTransactionType;

class GrowthValueExpireService
{
    /**
     * 每日执行：衰减超过1年未更新的成长值
     */
    public function expire(): void
    {
        $batchSize = 1000;
        Customer::where('last_growth_value_at', '<', now()->subYear())
            ->where('grow_value', '>', 0)
            ->chunkById($batchSize, function ($customers) {
                foreach ($customers as $customer) {
                    $decayAmount = (int) ceil($customer->grow_value * 0.05); // 年衰减5%
                    $newValue = max(0, $customer->grow_value - $decayAmount);
                    $customer->update([
                        'grow_value' => $newValue,
                        'last_growth_value_at' => now(),
                    ]);
                    GrowthValueTransaction::create([
                        'customer_id' => $customer->id,
                        'amount' => -$decayAmount,
                        'type' => GrowthValueTransactionType::DEDUCT,
                        'source_type' => 'system',
                        'source_id' => 0,
                        'description' => '年度成长值衰减',
                    ]);
                }
            });
    }
}
```

#### 6.56.6.8 RfmGrowthValueCalculator — RFM联动成长值计算

> **覆盖**：FR-POINT-011（RFM模型联动成长值）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Domains\Point\Services;

use App\Domains\Customer\Models\CustomerRfm;

class RfmGrowthValueCalculator
{
    /**
     * 成长值增量 = 基础成长值 + RFM综合系数 × 消费金额
     */
    public function calculate(CustomerRfm $rfm, float $orderAmount): int
    {
        $baseGrowth = config('growth.base_per_order', 10);
        $rfmScore = $this->normalizeRfmScore($rfm->r_score, $rfm->f_score, $rfm->m_score);
        $coefficient = $this->scoreToCoefficient($rfmScore);
        $increment = (int) round($baseGrowth + $coefficient * $orderAmount);
        return min($increment, config('growth.max_per_order', 500));
    }

    private function normalizeRfmScore(int $r, int $f, int $m): float
    {
        $weights = config('growth.rfm_weights', ['r' => 0.2, 'f' => 0.3, 'm' => 0.5]);
        return ($r * $weights['r'] + $f * $weights['f'] + $m * $weights['m']) / 5.0;
    }

    private function scoreToCoefficient(float $normalizedScore): float
    {
        return 0.01 + ($normalizedScore * 0.09);
    }
}
```

---

### 6.56.7 Controller 与 API 路由

#### 6.56.7.1 PointsController — 前台积分接口

> **覆盖**：FR-POINT-006（余额/流水查询）、FR-POINT-012~014（成长值查询）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Api;

use App\Domains\Point\Services\GrowthValueService;
use App\Domains\Point\Services\PointRuleService;
use App\Domains\Point\Services\PointService;
use App\Enums\PointTransactionType;
use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
use Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;

class PointsController extends Controller
{
    public function __construct(
        private PointService $pointService,
        private GrowthValueService $growthValueService,
        private PointRuleService $pointRuleService,
    ) {}

    /**
     * GET /api/Points/GetBalance
     * 获取当前登录用户积分余额
     * FR-POINT-006
     */
    public function getBalance(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $customerId = $request->user()->id;
        $balance = $this->pointService->getBalance($customerId);

        return response()->json([
            'code' => 200,
            'data' => [
                'balance' => $balance,
            ],
        ]);
    }

    /**
     * GET /api/Points/GetTransactions
     * 获取积分流水列表
     * FR-POINT-006
     */
    public function getTransactions(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $customerId = $request->user()->id;
        $type = $request->query('type');
        $page = (int) $request->query('page', 1);
        $perPage = (int) $request->query('per_page', 20);

        $enumType = $type ? PointTransactionType::tryFrom($type) : null;
        $paginator = $this->pointService->getTransactions($customerId, $enumType, $page, $perPage);

        return response()->json([
            'code' => 200,
            'data' => [
                'list' => $paginator->items(),
                'total' => $paginator->total(),
                'current_page' => $paginator->currentPage(),
                'last_page' => $paginator->lastPage(),
            ],
        ]);
    }

    /**
     * GET /api/Points/GetRules
     * 获取积分规则列表
     * FR-POINT-001~005
     */
    public function getRules(): JsonResponse
    {
        $rules = $this->pointRuleService->getEnabledRules();

        return response()->json([
            'code' => 200,
            'data' => $rules->map(fn ($r) => [
                'id' => $r->id,
                'name' => $r->name,
                'action_type' => $r->action_type,
                'points_awarded' => $r->points_awarded,
                'limit_per_day' => $r->limit_per_day,
                'limit_total' => $r->limit_total,
            ]),
        ]);
    }

    /**
     * GET /api/Points/GetGrowthValue
     * 获取成长值汇总与明细
     * FR-POINT-012~014
     */
    public function getGrowthValue(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $customerId = $request->user()->id;
        $summary = $this->growthValueService->getSummary($customerId);

        return response()->json([
            'code' => 200,
            'data' => $summary,
        ]);
    }

    /**
     * POST /api/Points/SignIn
     * 每日签到（含连续签到加成）
     * FR-POINT-002
     */
    public function signIn(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $result = app(\App\Domains\Point\Actions\CheckinAction::class)->execute($request->user());

        return response()->json([
            'code' => 200,
            'message' => '签到成功',
            'data' => [
                'current_streak' => $result['current_streak'],
                'max_streak' => $result['max_streak'],
                'growth_value_earned' => $result['growth_value_earned'],
                'points_earned' => $result['points_earned'],
                'bonus_label' => $result['bonus_label'],
            ],
        ]);
    }
}
```

#### 6.56.7.2 PointsAdminController — 后台积分管理接口

> **覆盖**：FR-POINT-017（手动调整积分/VIP等级）、FR-POINT-001~005（积分统计）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers\Api\Admin;

use App\Domains\Customer\Models\Customer;
use App\Domains\Point\Models\PointTransaction;
use App\Domains\Point\Services\PointService;
use App\Domains\Point\Services\VipLevelService;
use App\Enums\PointTransactionType;
use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
use Illuminate\Http\JsonResponse;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
use Illuminate\Validation\Rule;

class PointsAdminController extends Controller
{
    public function __construct(
        private PointService $pointService,
        private VipLevelService $vipLevelService,
    ) {}

    /**
     * GET /api/Admin/Points/GetCustomerPoints
     * 客户积分查询
     */
    public function getCustomerPoints(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $request->validate([
            'customer_id' => 'required|integer|exists:customers,id',
        ]);

        $customerId = $request->query('customer_id');
        $customer = Customer::find($customerId);

        return response()->json([
            'code' => 200,
            'data' => [
                'customer_id' => $customer->id,
                'customer_name' => $customer->customer_name,
                'point_balance' => $customer->point_balance,
                'grow_value' => $customer->grow_value,
                'vip_level' => $customer->vip_level,
                'vip_grace_end_time' => $customer->vip_grace_end_time,
            ],
        ]);
    }

    /**
     * POST /api/Admin/Points/Adjust
     * 手动调整积分
     */
    public function adjust(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $data = $request->validate([
            'customer_id' => 'required|integer|exists:customers,id',
            'points' => 'required|integer|not_in:0',
            'description' => 'required|string|max:255',
        ]);

        $adminId = $request->user()->id;
        $points = (int) $data['points'];

        if ($points > 0) {
            // 增加积分
            $transaction = $this->pointService->earn(
                customerId: $data['customer_id'],
                actionType: 'admin_adjust',
                sourceId: (string) $adminId,
                description: "[管理员调整] {$data['description']}",
            );
        } else {
            // 扣除积分
            $transaction = $this->pointService->consume(
                customerId: $data['customer_id'],
                points: abs($points),
                sourceType: 'admin_adjust',
                sourceId: (string) $adminId,
                description: "[管理员调整] {$data['description']}",
            );
        }

        return response()->json([
            'code' => 200,
            'message' => '积分调整成功',
            'data' => [
                'transaction_id' => $transaction?->id,
                'balance_after' => $transaction?->balance_after,
            ],
        ]);
    }

    /**
     * POST /api/Admin/Points/AdjustVip
     * 调整VIP等级
     * FR-POINT-017
     */
    public function adjustVip(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $data = $request->validate([
            'customer_id' => 'required|integer|exists:customers,id',
            'vip_level' => 'required|integer|min:0|max:8',
            'remark' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
        ]);

        $adminId = $request->user()->id;

        $result = $this->vipLevelService->adjustLevel(
            customerId: $data['customer_id'],
            targetLevel: $data['vip_level'],
            adminId: $adminId,
            remark: $data['remark'] ?? null,
        );

        return response()->json([
            'code' => 200,
            'message' => $result['changed'] ? 'VIP等级调整成功' : '等级未发生变化',
            'data' => $result,
        ]);
    }

    /**
     * GET /api/Admin/Points/GetStatistics
     * 积分统计
     */
    public function getStatistics(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $startDate = $request->query('start_date', now()->subDays(30)->toDateString());
        $endDate = $request->query('end_date', now()->toDateString());

        $stats = DB::table('point_transactions')
            ->whereBetween('created_at', ["{$startDate} 00:00:00", "{$endDate} 23:59:59"])
            ->selectRaw("
                type,
                COUNT(*) as count,
                SUM(points) as total_points
            ")
            ->groupBy('type')
            ->get();

        $totalBalance = Customer::sum('point_balance');
        $totalCustomers = Customer::where('point_balance', '>', 0)->count();

        return response()->json([
            'code' => 200,
            'data' => [
                'period' => ['start' => $startDate, 'end' => $endDate],
                'transaction_stats' => $stats,
                'total_point_balance' => (int) $totalBalance,
                'customers_with_points' => $totalCustomers,
            ],
        ]);
    }

    /**
     * GET /api/Admin/PointRules
     * 积分规则列表
     */
    public function pointRules(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $rules = \App\Domains\Point\Models\PointRule::query()
            ->when($request->input('action_type'), fn ($q, $v) => $q->where('action_type', $v))
            ->when($request->has('status'), fn ($q, $v) => $q->where('is_enabled', $v))
            ->orderBy('sort_order')
            ->paginate($request->input('per_page', 15));

        return response()->json([
            'code' => 200,
            'data' => $rules,
        ]);
    }

    /**
     * POST /api/Admin/PointRules
     * 新增积分规则
     */
    public function storeRule(Request $request): JsonResponse
    {
        $data = $request->validate([
            'action_type' => 'required|string|max:50|unique:point_rules',
            'name' => 'required|string|max:255',
            'points_awarded' => 'required|integer|min:0',
            'limit_per_day' => 'nullable|integer|min:0',
            'expire_months' => 'nullable|integer|min:1',
            'consecutive_bonus' => 'nullable|json',
            'is_enabled' => 'boolean',
            'sort_order' => 'integer',
        ]);

        $rule = \App\Domains\Point\Models\PointRule::create($data);

        return response()->json([
            'code' => 200,
            'message' => '规则创建成功',
            'data' => $rule,
        ]);
    }

    /**
     * PUT /api/Admin/PointRules/{id}
     * 更新积分规则
     */
    public function updateRule(Request $request, int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        $rule = \App\Domains\Point\Models\PointRule::findOrFail($id);

        $data = $request->validate([
            'action_type' => 'sometimes|string|max:50|unique:point_rules,action_type,' . $id,
            'name' => 'sometimes|string|max:255',
            'points_awarded' => 'sometimes|integer|min:0',
            'limit_per_day' => 'nullable|integer|min:0',
            'expire_months' => 'nullable|integer|min:1',
            'consecutive_bonus' => 'nullable|json',
            'is_enabled' => 'boolean',
            'sort_order' => 'integer',
        ]);

        $rule->update($data);

        return response()->json([
            'code' => 200,
            'message' => '规则更新成功',
            'data' => $rule,
        ]);
    }

    /**
     * DELETE /api/Admin/PointRules/{id}
     * 删除积分规则（标记禁用）
     */
    public function destroyRule(int $id): JsonResponse
    {
        $rule = \App\Domains\Point\Models\PointRule::findOrFail($id);
        $rule->update(['is_enabled' => false]);

        return response()->json([
            'code' => 200,
            'message' => '规则已禁用',
        ]);
    }
}
```

#### 6.56.7.3 路由注册

```php
<?php

// routes/api.php — 前台路由

use App\Http\Controllers\Api\PointsController;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Route;

Route::middleware(['auth:sanctum'])->group(function () {
    Route::get('Points/GetBalance', [PointsController::class, 'getBalance']);
    Route::get('Points/GetTransactions', [PointsController::class, 'getTransactions']);
    Route::get('Points/GetRules', [PointsController::class, 'getRules']);
    Route::get('Points/GetGrowthValue', [PointsController::class, 'getGrowthValue']);
    Route::post('Points/SignIn', [PointsController::class, 'signIn']);
});

// routes/api.php — 后台路由（Admin 前缀组内）

use App\Http\Controllers\Api\Admin\PointsAdminController;

Route::middleware(['auth:sanctum', 'role:admin'])->prefix('Admin')->group(function () {
    Route::get('Points/GetCustomerPoints', [PointsAdminController::class, 'getCustomerPoints']);
    Route::post('Points/Adjust', [PointsAdminController::class, 'adjust']);
    Route::post('Points/AdjustVip', [PointsAdminController::class, 'adjustVip']);
    Route::get('Points/GetStatistics', [PointsAdminController::class, 'getStatistics']);
    Route::get('PointRules', [PointsAdminController::class, 'pointRules']);
    Route::post('PointRules', [PointsAdminController::class, 'storeRule']);
    Route::put('PointRules/{id}', [PointsAdminController::class, 'updateRule']);
    Route::delete('PointRules/{id}', [PointsAdminController::class, 'destroyRule']);
});
```

### 6.56.8 Schedule 定时任务

#### 6.56.8.1 points:expire — 每日过期积分清理

> **覆盖**：FR-POINT-010~011

```php
<?php

namespace App\Console\Commands;

use App\Domains\Point\Services\PointExpireService;
use Illuminate\Console\Command;

class PointExpireCommand extends Command
{
    protected $signature = 'points:expire {--batch=500 : 每批处理数量}';
    protected $description = '清理过期积分（FIFO策略）';

    public function handle(PointExpireService $service): int
    {
        $batchSize = (int) $this->option('batch');
        $result = $service->processExpiredPoints($batchSize);

        $this->info("过期积分处理完成: 成功 {$result['processed']} 条, 失败 {$result['failed']} 条");

        return self::SUCCESS;
    }
}
```

#### 6.56.8.2 vip:downgrade — 每月VIP降级检查

> **覆盖**：FR-POINT-015~016（降级+保级期）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Console\Commands;

use App\Domains\Customer\Models\Customer;
use App\Domains\Point\Services\VipLevelService;
use Illuminate\Console\Command;

class VipDowngradeCommand extends Command
{
    protected $signature = 'vip:downgrade';
    protected $description = 'VIP等级降级检查（每月1日执行，含保级期逻辑）';

    public function handle(VipLevelService $vipService): int
    {
        $customers = Customer::where('vip_level', '>', 0)->cursor();

        $downgraded = 0;
        $maintained = 0;

        foreach ($customers as $customer) {
            $result = $vipService->checkDowngrade($customer);

            if ($result['downgraded']) {
                $downgraded++;
            } else {
                $maintained++;
            }
        }

        $this->info("VIP降级检查完成: 降级 {$downgraded} 人, 维持 {$maintained} 人");

        return self::SUCCESS;
    }
}
```

#### 6.56.8.3 growth:expire — 每日成长值过期衰减

> **覆盖**：FR-POINT-012（成长值过期/衰减）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Console\Commands;

use App\Domains\Point\Services\GrowthValueExpireService;
use Illuminate\Console\Command;

class GrowthValueExpireCommand extends Command
{
    protected $signature = 'growth:expire';
    protected $description = '成长值年度衰减（超过1年未更新则衰减5%）';

    public function handle(GrowthValueExpireService $service): int
    {
        $service->expire();
        $this->info('成长值过期处理完成');
        return self::SUCCESS;
    }
}
```

#### 6.56.8.4 growth:calculate — 每日成长值汇总

> **覆盖**：FR-POINT-012~014（成长值统计汇总）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Console\Commands;

use App\Domains\Customer\Models\Customer;
use App\Domains\Point\Models\GrowthValueTransaction;
use Illuminate\Console\Command;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;

class GrowthValueCalculateCommand extends Command
{
    protected $signature = 'growth:calculate';
    protected $description = '每日成长值汇总（校正客户表 grow_value 与流水一致性）';

    public function handle(): int
    {
        // 1. 批量校正成长值余额（基于流水重新计算）
        $ discrepancies = DB::select("
            SELECT c.id,
                   c.grow_value as current_value,
                   COALESCE(SUM(gvt.growth_value), 0) as calculated_value
            FROM customers c
            LEFT JOIN growth_value_transactions gvt ON c.id = gvt.customer_id
            WHERE c.vip_level > 0
            GROUP BY c.id
            HAVING c.grow_value != COALESCE(SUM(gvt.growth_value), 0)
        ");

        foreach ($discrepancies as $row) {
            Customer::where('id', $row->id)->update([
                'grow_value' => (int) $row->calculated_value,
            ]);

            Log::warning('[GrowthCalculate] 成长值校正', [
                'customer_id' => $row->id,
                'old_value' => $row->current_value,
                'new_value' => $row->calculated_value,
            ]);
        }

        $this->info("成长值校正完成: 修正 " . count($discrepancies) . " 条记录");

        // 2. 触发VIP升级检查（处理因成长值校正导致的升级）
        $customers = Customer::where('vip_level', '>', 0)->get();
        foreach ($customers as $customer) {
            // 升级检查由 GrowthValueService 在 earn 时已处理，此处仅降级预警
            $this->checkDowngradeWarning($customer);
        }

        return self::SUCCESS;
    }

    /**
     * 降级预警检查（提前7天发送预警通知）
     */
    private function checkDowngradeWarning(Customer $customer): void
    {
        $validGrowth = GrowthValueTransaction::where('customer_id', $customer->id)
            ->where('type', \App\Enums\GrowthValueTransactionType::EARN)
            ->where('created_at', '>=', now()->subMonths(12))
            ->sum('growth_value');

        $expectedLevel = \App\Enums\VipLevel::fromGrowthValue((int) $validGrowth);

        if ($expectedLevel->value < $customer->vip_level && !$customer->downgrade_warn_sent) {
            $customer->notify(new \App\Notifications\VipDowngradeWarning($customer, $expectedLevel));
            $customer->update(['downgrade_warn_sent' => true]);

            Log::info('[GrowthCalculate] 降级预警已发送', [
                'customer_id' => $customer->id,
                'current_level' => $customer->vip_level,
                'expected_level' => $expectedLevel->value,
            ]);
        }
    }
}
```

#### 6.56.8.4 定时任务注册（routes/console.php）

```php
<?php

use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Schedule;

// 每日 03:00 清理过期积分
Schedule::command('points:expire')->dailyAt('03:00');

// 每月1日 00:00 执行VIP降级检查
Schedule::command('vip:downgrade')->monthlyOn(1, '00:00');

// 每日 02:30 执行成长值汇总与降级预警
Schedule::command('growth:calculate')->dailyAt('02:30');

// 每日 03:30 执行成长值过期衰减
Schedule::command('growth:expire')->dailyAt('03:30');
```

---

### 6.56.9 与现有 6.12 节的兼容性对照

| 本补充设计 | 现有 6.12 节对应项 | 兼容性说明 |
|-----------|------------------|-----------|
| `point_transactions` 表 | `points_records` 表 | 字段兼容，可互为别名或逐步迁移；本设计以 `point_transactions` 为主 |
| `growth_value_transactions` 表 | `growth_value_records` 表 | 字段兼容，互为别名 |
| `PointTransactionType` 枚举 | `PointType` 枚举 | `PointType` 描述积分来源类型，本枚举描述交易方向；两者互补共存 |
| `PointService` | `PointGrantService` | `PointGrantService` 专注于订单场景发放；`PointService` 为通用入口，可调用 `PointGrantService` |
| `GrowthValueService` | 现有 `GrowthValueService` | 接口完全一致，本设计补充了 `getValidGrowthValue` 方法 |
| `PointExpireCommand` | 现有 `PointExpireCommand` | 本设计通过 `PointExpireService` 封装核心逻辑，Command 仅做调度；逻辑等价 |
| `VipDowngradeCommand` | 现有 `VipDowngradeCommand` | 本设计通过 `CheckVipDowngradeAction` 封装降级判断，增加了 `VipLevelHistory` 写入 |

---

### 6.56.10 FR 覆盖度清单

| FR编号 | 需求描述 | 覆盖位置 |
|--------|---------|---------|
| FR-POINT-001 | 注册获得积分 | `point_rules` + `EarnPointsAction`（action_type=register） |
| FR-POINT-002 | 首单获得积分 | `point_rules` + `EarnPointsAction`（action_type=first_order） |
| FR-POINT-003 | 每日登录获得积分 | `point_rules` + `EarnPointsAction`（action_type=daily_login，limit_per_day=1） |
| FR-POINT-004 | 订单完成获得积分 | `point_rules` + `EarnPointsAction`（action_type=order_complete） |
| FR-POINT-005 | 评价/邀请获得积分 | `point_rules` + `EarnPointsAction`（action_type=review/invite） |
| FR-POINT-006 | 查询积分余额与流水 | `PointService::getBalance/getTransactions` + `PointsController` |
| FR-POINT-007 | 积分抵扣订单金额 | `ConsumePointsAction` + 6.12.5 `PointDeductStep`（计价引擎集成） |
| FR-POINT-008 | 积分兑换商品 | `ConsumePointsAction` + 6.12.8 积分兑换商品表 |
| FR-POINT-009 | 取消订单退回积分 | `PointService::refund` |
| FR-POINT-010 | 积分有效期与过期策略 | `PointTransaction::expire_at` + `PointExpireService`（FIFO） |
| FR-POINT-011 | 过期积分自动清零 | `PointExpireCommand`（每日 03:00 执行） |
| FR-POINT-012 | 查询成长值汇总 | `GrowthValueService::getSummary` + `PointsController::getGrowthValue` |
| FR-POINT-013 | 成长值获取（订单/评价等） | `growth_value_rules` + `EarnGrowthValueAction` |
| FR-POINT-014 | 查询成长值明细 | `GrowthValueService::getRecords` |
| FR-POINT-015 | VIP降级规则 | `CheckVipDowngradeAction`（12个月有效成长值判定） |
| FR-POINT-016 | VIP保级期 | `CheckVipDowngradeAction`（30天宽限期逻辑） |
| FR-POINT-017 | VIP手动调整 | `AdjustVipLevelAction` + `PointsAdminController::adjustVip` |

---

### 6.56.11 关键时序图

#### 积分获取时序（以订单完成为例）

```
OrderPointObserver          GrantOrderPointJob          EarnPointsAction            PointService
       |                           |                           |                           |
       |── updated(Order) ────────>|                           |                           |
       |   (status→COMPLETED)      |                           |                           |
       |                           |── dispatch() ─────────────>|                           |
       |                           |                           |── execute() ─────────────>|
       |                           |                           |   (幂等检查→事务→更新余额)
       |                           |                           |<── PointTransaction ──────|
       |                           |<── success ───────────────|                           |
       |                           |                                                           |
```

#### VIP降级检查时序

```
VipDowngradeCommand     CheckVipDowngradeAction      Customer         VipLevelHistory
        |                       |                       |                   |
        |── execute(customer) ─>|                       |                   |
        |                       |── 计算12月有效成长值 ──>|                   |
        |                       |── 对比等级阈值          |                   |
        |                       |── 检查宽限期            |                   |
        |                       |── 执行降级 ────────────>|                   |
        |                       |── 写入历史 ───────────────────────────────>|
        |<── result ────────────|                       |                   |
```

---

---

## 8.5 Resource类批量补充

> **文档定位**：本章节作为《怡安印刷商城-系统设计方案_PHP8.5_Laravel13.md》的Resource层批量补充，覆盖订单、商品、用户、支付、物流、售后、通知、工单、优惠券、发票、样品、门店、平台代发及管理后台共16个模块的40+个Resource类。与SDD第7.2.10节（资源层设计规范）及第8.4节（API设计）保持完全兼容。
> **技术栈**：PHP 8.5 + Laravel 13.x
> **设计原则**：Resource响应标准化、金额统一转元、枚举输出value+label、关联模型条件加载。

---

### 8.5.1 订单模块（Order Domain）

#### OrderResource（复核完善）

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Http\Resources;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Http\Resources\Json\JsonResource;

class OrderResource extends JsonResource
{
    public function toArray(Request $request): array
    {
        return [
            'id' => $this->id,
            'order_sn' => $this->order_sn,
            'status' => $this->status->value,
            'status_label' => $this->status->label(),
            'out_status_name' => $this->out_status_name->value,
            'out_status_label' => $this->out_status_name->label(),
            'modify_status' => $this->modify_status->value,
            'modify_status_label' => $this->modify_status->label(),
            'order_sign' => $this->order_sign->value,
            'order_sign_label' => $this->order_sign->label(),
            'customer_id' => $this->customer_id,
            'customer_name' => $this->customer_name,
            'customer_code' => $this->customer_code,
            'name' => $this->name,
            'cp_summary' => $this->cp_summary,
            'product_sum' => $this->product_sum?->toYuan(),
            'sum' => $this->sum?->toYuan(),
            'total_price' => $this->total_price?->toYuan(),
            'express_sum' => $this->express_sum?->toYuan(),
            'product_total_count' => $this->product_total_count,
            'weight' => $this->weight,
            'delivery_type' => $this->delivery_type->value,
            'delivery_type_label' => $this->delivery_type->label(),
            'factory_code' => $this->factory_code->value,
            'factory_code_label' => $this->factory_code->label(),
            'create_source' => $this->create_source->value,
            'create_source_label' => $this->create_source->label(),
            'paid_deposit_stage' => $this->paid_deposit_stage,
            'un_paid_deposit' => $this->un_paid_deposit,
            'shipper_name' => $this->shipper_name,
            'shipper_phone' => $this->shipper_phone,
            'shipper_address' => $this->shipper_address,
            'customer' => new CustomerResource($this->whenLoaded('customer')),
            'items' => OrderItemResource::collection($this->whenLoaded('items')),
            'files' => OrderFileResource::collection($this->whenLoaded('files')),
            'payments' => PaymentResource::collection($this->whenLoaded('payments')),
            'deliveries' => OrderDeliveryResource::collection($this->whenLoaded('deliveries')),
            'after_sales' => AfterSaleResource::collection($this->whenLoaded('afterSales')), // FR-ORDER-054
            'invoice_status' => $this->invoice_status, // FR-ORDER-058
            'can_cancel' => $this->when($request->user()?->can('cancel', $this->resource), fn () => $request->user()->can('cancel', $this->resource)),
            'created_at' => $this->created_at?->toDateTimeString(),
            'updated_at' => $this->updated_at?->toDateTimeString(),
            'completed_at' => $this->completed_at?->toDateTimeString(),
        ];
    }
}
```

#### OrderCollection（复核完善）

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Http\Resources;

use Illuminate\Http\Resources\Json\ResourceCollection;

class OrderCollection extends ResourceCollection
{
    public function toArray($request): array
    {
        return [
            'data' => OrderResource::collection($this->collection),
            'meta' => [
                'pagination' => [
                    'total' => $this->total(),
                    'per_page' => $this->perPage(),
                    'current_page' => $this->currentPage(),
                    'last_page' => $this->lastPage(),
                ],
            ],
        ];
    }
}
```

#### OrderEvaluationResource（新增）

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Http\Resources;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Http\Resources\Json\JsonResource;

class OrderEvaluationResource extends JsonResource
{
    public function toArray(Request $request): array
    {
        return [
            'id' => $this->id,
            'order_sn' => $this->order_sn,
            'order_id' => $this->order_id,
            'product_id' => $this->product_id,
            'product_name' => $this->product_name,
            'customer_id' => $this->customer_id,
            'comment' => $this->comment,
            'images' => $this->images,
            'level' => $this->level->value,
            'level_label' => $this->level->label(),
            'is_anonymous' => $this->when(isset($this->is_anonymous), (bool) $this->is_anonymous),
            'reply' => $this->when($this->reply, $this->reply),
            'replied_at' => $this->when($this->replied_at, fn () => $this->replied_at?->toDateTimeString()),
            'product' => new ProductResource($this->whenLoaded('product')),
            'customer' => new CustomerSimpleResource($this->whenLoaded('customer')),
            'created_at' => $this->created_at?->toDateTimeString(),
            'updated_at' => $this->updated_at?->toDateTimeString(),
        ];
    }
}
```

### 8.5.2 商品模块（Product Domain）

#### ProductResource（新增）

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Http\Resources;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Http\Resources\Json\JsonResource;

class ProductResource extends JsonResource
{
    public function toArray(Request $request): array
    {
        return [
            'id' => $this->id,
            'category_id' => $this->category_id,
            'name' => $this->name,
            'cp_summary' => $this->cp_summary,
            'description' => $this->description,
            'icon' => $this->icon,
            'is_sample' => (bool) $this->is_sample,
            'sample_price' => $this->sample_price?->toYuan(),
            'weight' => $this->weight,
            'status' => $this->status->value,
            'status_label' => $this->status->label(),
            'category' => new ProductCategoryResource($this->whenLoaded('category')),
            'params' => ProductParamResource::collection($this->whenLoaded('params')),
            'skus' => SkuResource::collection($this->whenLoaded('skus')),
            'created_at' => $this->created_at?->toDateTimeString(),
            'updated_at' => $this->updated_at?->toDateTimeString(),
        ];
    }
}
```

### 8.5.3 用户模块（Customer Domain）

#### CustomerResource（已有，复核完善）

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Http\Resources;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Http\Resources\Json\JsonResource;

class CustomerResource extends JsonResource
{
    public function toArray(Request $request): array
    {
        return [
            'id' => $this->id,
            'customer_code' => $this->customer_code,
            'name' => $this->name,
            'customer_name' => $this->customer_name,
            'link_person' => $this->link_person,
            'mobile_phone' => $this->when(
                $request->user()?->can('viewSensitive', $this->resource),
                fn () => $this->mobile_phone
            ),
            'mobile_phone_masked' => \Str::mask($this->mobile_phone, '*', 3, 4),
            'email' => $this->email,
            'fax' => $this->fax,
            'tax_number' => $this->tax_number,
            'qq_accounts' => $this->qq_accounts,
            'customer_type' => $this->customer_type->value,
            'customer_type_label' => $this->customer_type->label(),
            'auth_status' => $this->auth_status->value,
            'auth_status_label' => $this->auth_status->label(),
            'vip_level' => $this->vip_level,
            'grow_value' => $this->grow_value,
            'status' => $this->status->value,
            'status_label' => $this->status->label(),
            'shop_status' => $this->shop_status->value,
            'shop_status_label' => $this->shop_status->label(),
            'sign' => $this->sign->value,
            'sign_label' => $this->sign->label(),
            'wallet' => new CustomerWalletResource($this->whenLoaded('wallet')),
            'addresses' => CustomerAddressResource::collection($this->whenLoaded('addresses')),
            'brands' => CustomerBrandResource::collection($this->whenLoaded('brands')),
            'sub_accounts' => SubAccountResource::collection($this->whenLoaded('subAccounts')),
            'created_at' => $this->created_at?->toDateTimeString(),
            'updated_at' => $this->updated_at?->toDateTimeString(),
        ];
    }
}
```

#### CustomerAuthResource（已有，复核完善）

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Http\Resources;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Http\Resources\Json\JsonResource;

class CustomerAuthResource extends JsonResource
{
    public function toArray(Request $request): array
    {
        return [
            'customer_id' => $this->id,
            'company_name' => $this->company_name,
            'credit_code' => $this->credit_code,
            'legal_person' => $this->legal_person,
            'business_license_img' => $this->business_license_img,
            'auth_status' => $this->auth_status->value,
            'auth_status_label' => $this->auth_status->label(),
            'auth_picture_type' => $this->auth_picture_type->value,
            'auth_picture_type_label' => $this->auth_picture_type->label(),
            'contact_name' => $this->contact_name,
            'contact_phone' => $this->contact_phone,
            'register_address' => $this->register_address,
            'office_address' => $this->office_address,
            'valid_date' => $this->valid_date?->toDateTimeString(),
            'verify_reason' => $this->when(
                in_array($this->auth_status->value, [3, 4], true),
                $this->verify_reason
            ),
            'is_signed' => $this->signed_time !== null,
            'signed_time' => $this->signed_time?->toDateTimeString(),
            'created_at' => $this->created_at?->toDateTimeString(),
            'updated_at' => $this->updated_at?->toDateTimeString(),
        ];
    }
}

            'order' => new OrderResource($this->whenLoaded('order')),
            'created_at' => $this->created_at?->toDateTimeString(),
        ];
    }
}
```

#### AddressResource（新增）

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Http\Resources;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Http\Resources\Json\JsonResource;

class AddressResource extends JsonResource
{
    public function toArray(Request $request): array
    {
        return [
            'id' => $this->id,
            'receiver_name' => $this->link_person ?? $this->receiver_name,
            'phone' => $this->mobile_phone ?? $this->phone,
            'phone_masked' => \Str::mask($this->mobile_phone ?? $this->phone, '*', 3, 4),
            'province_name' => $this->province_name,
            'city_name' => $this->city_name,
            'county_name' => $this->county_name,
            'detail_address' => $this->detail_address,
            'full_address' => $this->when(
                $this->province_name && $this->city_name,
                fn () => "{$this->province_name}{$this->city_name}{$this->county_name}{$this->detail_address}"
            ),
            'type' => $this->when(isset($this->type), fn () => $this->type->value),
            'type_label' => $this->when(isset($this->type), fn () => $this->type->label()),
            'is_default' => $this->when(isset($this->is_default), fn () => (bool) $this->is_default),
            'created_at' => $this->created_at?->toDateTimeString(),
            'updated_at' => $this->updated_at?->toDateTimeString(),
        ];
    }
}
```
