### 8.5.6 售后模块（AfterSale Domain）

#### AfterSaleResource（新增）

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Http\Resources;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Http\Resources\Json\JsonResource;

class AfterSaleResource extends JsonResource
{
    public function toArray(Request $request): array
    {
        return [
            'id' => $this->id,
            'order_id' => $this->order_id,
            'order_sn' => $this->order_sn,
            'customer_id' => $this->customer_id,
            'type' => $this->type->value,
            'type_label' => $this->type->label(),
            'reason' => $this->reason->value,
            'reason_label' => $this->reason->label(),
            'reason_desc' => $this->reason_desc,
            'status' => $this->status->value,
            'status_label' => $this->status->label(),
            'refund_amount' => $this->refund_amount?->toYuan(),
            'refund_channel' => $this->refund_channel?->value,
            'refund_channel_label' => $this->refund_channel?->label(),
            'evidence_urls' => $this->evidence_urls,
            'return_express_company' => $this->return_express_company,
            'return_express_number' => $this->return_express_number,
            'return_time' => $this->return_time?->toDateTimeString(),
            'order' => new OrderResource($this->whenLoaded('order')),
            'items' => AfterSaleItemResource::collection($this->whenLoaded('items')),
            'messages' => AfterSaleMessageResource::collection($this->whenLoaded('messages')),
            'created_at' => $this->created_at?->toDateTimeString(),
            'updated_at' => $this->updated_at?->toDateTimeString(),
        ];
    }
}
```

#### AfterSaleItemResource（新增）

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Http\Resources;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Http\Resources\Json\JsonResource;

class AfterSaleItemResource extends JsonResource
{
    public function toArray(Request $request): array
    {

            'order_item_id' => $this->order_item_id,

            'product_name' => $this->product_name,
            'cp_summary' => $this->cp_summary,
            'quantity' => $this->quantity,
            'unit_price' => $this->unit_price?->toYuan(),
            'refund_amount' => $this->refund_amount?->toYuan(),
            'reason' => $this->reason->value,
            'reason_label' => $this->reason->label(),
            'after_sale' => new AfterSaleResource($this->whenLoaded('afterSale')),
            'order_item' => new OrderItemResource($this->whenLoaded('orderItem')),
            'created_at' => $this->created_at?->toDateTimeString(),
            'updated_at' => $this->updated_at?->toDateTimeString(),
        ];
    }
}
```

```php
            'scene_type' => $this->scene_type,
            'scene_type_label' => $this->when($this->scene_type, fn () => \App\Enums\NotificationSceneType::tryFrom($this->scene_type)?->label()),
            'channel_type' => $this->channel_type->value,
            'channel_type_label' => $this->channel_type->label(),
            'is_read' => (bool) $this->is_read,

            'related_id' => $this->related_id,
            'related_type' => $this->related_type,
            'customer' => new CustomerSimpleResource($this->whenLoaded('customer')),
            'created_at' => $this->created_at?->toDateTimeString(),
        ];
    }
}
```

### 8.5.8 工单模块（Ticket Domain）

#### TicketResource（新增）

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Http\Resources;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Http\Resources\Json\JsonResource;

class TicketResource extends JsonResource
{
    public function toArray(Request $request): array
    {
        return [
            'id' => $this->id,
            'ticket_no' => $this->ticket_no,
            'customer_id' => $this->customer_id,
            'subject' => $this->subject,
            'content' => $this->content,
            'ticket_category' => $this->ticket_category->value,
            'ticket_category_label' => $this->ticket_category->label(),
            'complaint_type' => $this->complaint_type->value,
            'complaint_type_label' => $this->complaint_type->label(),
            'priority' => $this->priority->value,
            'priority_label' => $this->priority->label(),
            'status' => $this->status->value,
            'status_label' => $this->status->label(),
            'assigned_to' => $this->assigned_to,
            'assigned_at' => $this->assigned_at?->toDateTimeString(),
            'sla_deadline' => $this->sla_deadline?->toDateTimeString(),
            'is_overdue' => $this->when($this->sla_deadline, fn () => now()->greaterThan($this->sla_deadline)),
            'customer' => new CustomerSimpleResource($this->whenLoaded('customer')),
            'replies' => TicketReplyResource::collection($this->whenLoaded('replies')),
            'category' => new TicketCategoryResource($this->whenLoaded('category')),
            'created_at' => $this->created_at?->toDateTimeString(),
            'updated_at' => $this->updated_at?->toDateTimeString(),
        ];
    }
}
```

### 8.5.9 优惠券模块（Coupon Domain）

#### CouponResource（新增）

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Http\Resources;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Http\Resources\Json\JsonResource;

class CouponResource extends JsonResource
{
    public function toArray(Request $request): array
    {
        return [
            'id' => $this->id,
            'coupon_code' => $this->coupon_code,
            'coupon_name' => $this->coupon_name,
            'coupon_type' => $this->coupon_type->value,
            'coupon_type_label' => $this->coupon_type->label(),
            'amount' => $this->amount?->toYuan(),
            'min_order_amount' => $this->min_order_amount?->toYuan(),
            'max_discount_amount' => $this->max_discount_amount?->toYuan(),
            'start_time' => $this->start_time?->toDateTimeString(),
            'end_time' => $this->end_time?->toDateTimeString(),
            'total_quantity' => $this->total_quantity,
            'remain_quantity' => $this->remain_quantity,
            'usage_limit_per_user' => $this->usage_limit_per_user,
            'scope_type' => $this->scope_type->value,
            'scope_type_label' => $this->scope_type->label(),
            'scope_ids' => $this->scope_ids,
            'status' => $this->status->value,
            'status_label' => $this->status->label(),
            'is_valid' => $this->when(
                $this->start_time && $this->end_time,
                fn () => now()->between($this->start_time, $this->end_time) && $this->remain_quantity > 0
            ),
            'created_at' => $this->created_at?->toDateTimeString(),
            'updated_at' => $this->updated_at?->toDateTimeString(),
        ];
    }
}
```

```php
            'created_at' => $this->created_at?->toDateTimeString(),

}
```

```php
            'province' => $this->province,
            'city' => $this->city,
            'district' => $this->district,
            'address' => $this->address,
            'full_address' => $this->when(
                $this->province && $this->city,
                fn () => "{$this->province}{$this->city}{$this->district}{$this->address}"
            ),
            'contact_phone' => $this->contact_phone,
            'manager_name' => $this->manager_name,
            'latitude' => $this->latitude,
            'longitude' => $this->longitude,
            'status' => $this->status->value,
            'status_label' => $this->status->label(),
            'services' => StoreServiceResource::collection($this->whenLoaded('services')),
            'created_at' => $this->created_at?->toDateTimeString(),
            'updated_at' => $this->updated_at?->toDateTimeString(),
        ];
    }
}
```

```php
declare(strict_types=1);
```

```php
use Illuminate\Http\Resources\Json\JsonResource;

class AdminContentResource extends JsonResource
{
    public function toArray(Request $request): array
    {
        return [
            'id' => $this->id,
            'content_type' => $this->content_type->value,
            'content_type_label' => $this->content_type->label(),
            'title' => $this->title,
            'content' => $this->when(
                $request->user()?->can('viewAdminContent', $this->resource),
                $this->content
            ),
            'cover_image' => $this->cover_image,
            'sort_order' => $this->sort_order,
            'status' => $this->status->value,
            'status_label' => $this->status->label(),
            'publish_time' => $this->publish_time?->toDateTimeString(),
            'view_count' => $this->view_count ?? 0,
            'created_at' => $this->created_at?->toDateTimeString(),
            'updated_at' => $this->updated_at?->toDateTimeString(),
        ];
    }
}
```

#### FinancialStatementResource（新增）

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Http\Resources;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Http\Resources\Json\JsonResource;

class FinancialStatementResource extends JsonResource
{
    public function toArray(Request $request): array
    {
        return [
            'id' => $this->id,
            'statement_no' => $this->statement_no,
            'statement_type' => $this->statement_type->value,
            'statement_type_label' => $this->statement_type->label(),
            'period_start' => $this->period_start?->toDateTimeString(),
            'period_end' => $this->period_end?->toDateTimeString(),
            'total_income' => $this->total_income?->toYuan(),
            'total_expense' => $this->total_expense?->toYuan(),
            'total_profit' => $this->when($this->total_income !== null && $this->total_expense !== null, fn () => $this->total_income?->toYuan() - $this->total_expense?->toYuan()),
            'order_count' => $this->order_count,
            'refund_amount' => $this->refund_amount?->toYuan(),
            'status' => $this->status->value,
            'status_label' => $this->status->label(),
            'generated_by' => $this->generated_by,
            'generated_at' => $this->generated_at?->toDateTimeString(),
            'created_at' => $this->created_at?->toDateTimeString(),
            'updated_at' => $this->updated_at?->toDateTimeString(),
        ];
    }
}
```

#### ReportResource（新增）

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Http\Resources;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Http\Resources\Json\JsonResource;

class ReportResource extends JsonResource
{
    public function toArray(Request $request): array
    {
        return [
            'id' => $this->id,
            'report_name' => $this->report_name,
            'report_type' => $this->report_type->value,
            'report_type_label' => $this->report_type->label(),
            'period' => $this->period,
            'dimensions' => $this->dimensions,
            'metrics' => $this->metrics,
            'data_summary' => $this->data_summary,
            'chart_config' => $this->chart_config,
            'status' => $this->status->value,
            'status_label' => $this->status->label(),
            'created_by' => $this->created_by,
            'created_at' => $this->created_at?->toDateTimeString(),
            'updated_at' => $this->updated_at?->toDateTimeString(),
        ];
    }
}
```

#### DashboardOverviewResource（新增）

```php
<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Http\Resources;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Http\Resources\Json\JsonResource;

class DashboardOverviewResource extends JsonResource
{
    public function toArray(Request $request): array
    {
        return [
            'today' => [
                'order_count' => $this->today_order_count ?? 0,
                'order_amount' => $this->today_order_amount?->toYuan() ?? '0.00',
                'paid_amount' => $this->today_paid_amount?->toYuan() ?? '0.00',
                'new_customer_count' => $this->today_new_customer_count ?? 0,
            ],
            'pending' => [
                'pending_payment_orders' => $this->pending_payment_orders ?? 0,
                'pending_ship_orders' => $this->pending_ship_orders ?? 0,
                'pending_audit_orders' => $this->pending_audit_orders ?? 0,
                'pending_after_sales' => $this->pending_after_sales ?? 0,
                'pending_tickets' => $this->pending_tickets ?? 0,
            ],
            'trend' => [
                'seven_day_order_amount' => $this->seven_day_order_amount ?? [],
                'seven_day_order_count' => $this->seven_day_order_count ?? [],
            ],
            'ranking' => [
                'top_products' => $this->when(isset($this->top_products), $this->top_products),
                'top_customers' => $this->when(isset($this->top_customers), $this->top_customers),
            ],
            'updated_at' => $this->updated_at?->toDateTimeString(),
        ];
    }
}
```

---

### 8.5.15 补充Resource映射汇总表

| 模块 | Resource类 | 对应Model | 状态 |
|------|-----------|-----------|------|
| 订单 | `OrderResource` | `Order` | 复核完善 |
| 订单 | `OrderCollection` | `Order` (集合) | 复核完善 |
| 订单 | `OrderItemResource` | `OrderItem` | 复核完善 |
| 订单 | `OrderDeliveryResource` | `OrderMultiDelivery` | 复核完善 |
| 订单 | `OrderEvaluationResource` | `OrderEvaluation` | 新增 |
| 商品 | `ProductResource` | `Product` | 新增 |
| 商品 | `ProductCollection` | `Product` (集合) | 新增 |
| 商品 | `ProductCategoryResource` | `ProductCategory` | 复核完善 |
| 商品 | `SkuResource` | `Sku` | 新增 |
| 商品 | `ProductParamResource` | `ProductParam` | 新增 |
| 用户 | `CustomerResource` | `Customer` | 复核完善 |
| 用户 | `CustomerAddressResource` | `CustomerAddress` | 复核完善 |
| 用户 | `CustomerBrandResource` | `CustomerBrand` | 复核完善 |
| 用户 | `SubAccountResource` | `SubAccount` | 复核完善 |
| 用户 | `CustomerAuthResource` | `Customer` (认证视图) | 复核完善 |
| 支付 | `PaymentResource` | `Payment` | 复核完善 |
| 支付 | `PayOrderResource` | `PayOrder` | 新增 |
| 支付 | `WalletTransactionResource` | `WalletTransaction` | 新增 |
| 物流 | `DeliveryResource` | `OrderMultiDelivery` | 新增 |
| 物流 | `ExpressTrackResource` | `ExpressLog` | 新增 |
| 物流 | `AddressResource` | `CustomerAddress` | 新增 |
| 售后 | `AfterSaleResource` | `AfterSale` | 新增 |
| 售后 | `AfterSaleItemResource` | `AfterSaleItem` | 新增 |
| 售后 | `AfterSaleMessageResource` | `AfterSaleMessage` | 新增 |
| 通知 | `NotificationResource` | `Notification` | 新增 |
| 通知 | `NotificationTemplateResource` | `NotificationTemplate` | 新增 |
| 工单 | `TicketResource` | `Ticket` | 新增 |
| 工单 | `TicketReplyResource` | `TicketReply` | 新增 |
| 工单 | `TicketCategoryResource` | `TicketCategory` | 新增 |
| 优惠券 | `CouponResource` | `Coupon` | 新增 |
| 优惠券 | `CustomerCouponResource` | `CustomerCoupon` | 新增 |
| 发票 | `InvoiceResource` | `Invoice` | 新增 |
| 发票 | `InvoiceItemResource` | `InvoiceItem` | 新增 |
| 样品 | `SampleProductResource` | `SampleProduct` | 复核完善 |
| 样品 | `SampleOrderResource` | `SampleOrder` | 新增 |
| 门店 | `StoreResource` | `Store` | 新增 |
| 门店 | `StoreServiceResource` | `StoreService` | 新增 |
| 平台代发 | `PlatformShopResource` | `PlatformShop` | 新增 |
| 平台代发 | `PlatformOrderResource` | `PlatformOrder` | 新增 |
| 管理后台 | `AdminContentResource` | `Banner` / `News` / `HelpFaq` | 新增 |
| 管理后台 | `FinancialStatementResource` | `FinancialStatement` | 新增 |
| 管理后台 | `ReportResource` | `Report` | 新增 |
| 管理后台 | `DashboardOverviewResource` | 聚合数据 | 新增 |

---

> **说明**：
> 1. 所有金额字段统一通过 Money ValueObject 的 `toYuan()` 方法输出，确保前端接收到的金额单位为「元」且保留2位小数。
> 2. 所有状态/枚举字段统一输出 `value`（原始码值）和 `label`（中文标签），前端可根据需要选择使用。
> 3. 关联模型统一使用 `$this->whenLoaded()` 包裹，避免 N+1 查询问题。
> 4. 敏感字段（如手机号、密码）统一使用 `$this->when()` 做权限控制，未授权时自动隐藏。
> 5. 时间字段统一使用 `toDateTimeString()` 格式输出（`Y-m-d H:i:s`），与前端 dayjs 解析完全兼容。

---

## 8.6 FormRequest验证类批量补充

> 本章补充所有核心 API 对应的 FormRequest 验证类，覆盖订单、商品、用户、支付、物流、售后、通知、工单、优惠券、发票、样品、门店、平台代发及管理后台共 14 个模块。
> 
> 设计规范：
> - `authorize()` 使用 `auth('customer')`（C端）或 `auth('admin')`（管理后台），公开接口返回 `true`。
> - `rules()` 使用 Laravel 原生验证规则，字段名统一 `snake_case`。
> - `messages()` 提供中文错误提示。
> - 命名空间按模块细分：`App\Http\Requests\{Module}`。

---

### 8.6.1 订单模块

#### `CreateOrderRequest` — 创建订单

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Order;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class CreateOrderRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'items' => ['required', 'array', 'min:1'],
            'items.*.product_id' => ['required', 'integer', 'exists:products,id'],
            'items.*.quantity' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:1', 'max:99999'],
            'items.*.spec' => ['required', 'array'],
            'delivery_address_id' => ['required', 'integer', 'exists:customer_addresses,id'],
            'coupon_id' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'exists:coupons,id'],
            'pay_channel' => ['required', 'string', 'in:wechat,alipay,pre_deposit,transfer'],
            'remark' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:500'],
            'invoice_title_id' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'exists:invoice_titles,id'],
            'delivery_type' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'in:0,1,2'],
            'factory_code' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'items.required' => '订单商品不能为空',
            'items.min' => '至少需要选择一个商品',
            'items.*.product_id.required' => '商品ID不能为空',
            'items.*.product_id.exists' => '商品不存在或已下架',
            'items.*.quantity.required' => '商品数量不能为空',
            'items.*.quantity.min' => '商品数量至少为1',
            'items.*.spec.required' => '商品规格不能为空',
            'delivery_address_id.required' => '请选择收货地址',
            'delivery_address_id.exists' => '收货地址不存在',
            'pay_channel.required' => '请选择支付方式',
            'pay_channel.in' => '请选择有效的支付方式',
            'remark.max' => '订单备注不能超过500字',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `CancelOrderRequest` — 取消订单

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Order;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class CancelOrderRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'order_sn' => ['required', 'string', 'max:32', 'exists:orders,order_sn'],
            'reason' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:200'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'order_sn.required' => '订单编号不能为空',
            'order_sn.exists' => '订单不存在',
            'reason.max' => '取消原因不能超过200字',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `UpdateOrderAddressRequest` — 修改订单收货地址

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Order;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class UpdateOrderAddressRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'order_sn' => ['required', 'string', 'max:32', 'exists:orders,order_sn'],
            'delivery_address_id' => ['required', 'integer', 'exists:customer_addresses,id'],
            'modify_reason' => ['required', 'string', 'max:200'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'order_sn.required' => '订单编号不能为空',
            'order_sn.exists' => '订单不存在',
            'delivery_address_id.required' => '请选择新的收货地址',
            'delivery_address_id.exists' => '收货地址不存在',
            'modify_reason.required' => '请填写修改原因',
            'modify_reason.max' => '修改原因不能超过200字',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `EvaluateOrderRequest` — 订单评价

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Order;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class EvaluateOrderRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'order_sn' => ['required', 'string', 'max:32', 'exists:orders,order_sn'],
            'rating' => ['required', 'integer', 'between:1,5'],
            'content' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:500'],
            'tags' => ['nullable', 'array'],
            'tags.*' => ['string', 'max:20'],
            'is_anonymous' => ['nullable', 'boolean'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'order_sn.required' => '订单编号不能为空',
            'order_sn.exists' => '订单不存在',
            'rating.required' => '请对订单进行评分',
            'rating.between' => '评分必须在1到5之间',
            'content.max' => '评价内容不能超过500字',
            'tags.*.max' => '评价标签不能超过20字',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `ApplyAfterSaleRequest` — 申请售后（订单侧入口）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Order;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class ApplyAfterSaleRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'order_sn' => ['required', 'string', 'max:32', 'exists:orders,order_sn'],
            'type' => ['required', 'integer', 'in:0,1,2,3'],
            'reason' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0', 'max:10'],
            'reason_desc' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:500'],
            'refund_amount' => ['nullable', 'numeric', 'min:0'],
            'evidence_urls' => ['nullable', 'array'],
            'evidence_urls.*' => ['url', 'max:500'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'order_sn.required' => '订单编号不能为空',
            'order_sn.exists' => '订单不存在',
            'type.required' => '请选择售后类型',
            'type.in' => '售后类型不正确',
            'reason.required' => '请选择售后原因',
            'reason.max' => '售后原因选择不正确',
            'reason_desc.max' => '原因描述不能超过500字',
            'refund_amount.numeric' => '退款金额格式不正确',
            'refund_amount.min' => '退款金额不能为负数',
            'evidence_urls.*.url' => '凭证图片链接格式不正确',
        ];
    }
}
```

---

### 8.6.2 商品模块

#### `SearchProductRequest` — 商品搜索

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Product;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class SearchProductRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return true;
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'keyword' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:100'],
            'category_id' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'sort_field' => ['nullable', 'string', 'in:price,sales,created_at'],
            'sort_order' => ['nullable', 'string', 'in:asc,desc'],
            'page' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'min:1'],
            'page_size' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'min:1', 'max:100'],
            'min_price' => ['nullable', 'numeric', 'min:0'],
            'max_price' => ['nullable', 'numeric', 'min:0'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'keyword.max' => '搜索关键词不能超过100字',
            'sort_field.in' => '排序字段不正确',
            'sort_order.in' => '排序方式不正确',
            'page.min' => '页码不能小于1',
            'page_size.min' => '每页数量不能小于1',
            'page_size.max' => '每页数量不能超过100',
            'min_price.numeric' => '最低价格格式不正确',
            'max_price.numeric' => '最高价格格式不正确',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `GetProductDetailRequest` — 获取商品详情

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Product;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class GetProductDetailRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return true;
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'id' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:1', 'exists:products,id'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'id.required' => '商品ID不能为空',
            'id.integer' => '商品ID格式不正确',
            'id.exists' => '商品不存在或已下架',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `CalculatePriceRequest` — 计算商品价格

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Product;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class CalculatePriceRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return true;
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'product_id' => ['required', 'integer', 'exists:products,id'],
            'quantity' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:1', 'max:99999'],
            'spec' => ['required', 'array'],
            'spec.*' => ['required'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'product_id.required' => '商品ID不能为空',
            'product_id.exists' => '商品不存在',
            'quantity.required' => '数量不能为空',
            'quantity.min' => '数量至少为1',
            'quantity.max' => '数量不能超过99999',
            'spec.required' => '商品规格不能为空',
            'spec.*.required' => '规格参数不能为空',
        ];
    }
}
```

---

### 8.6.3 用户模块

#### `UpdateCustomerRequest` — 更新客户基本信息

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Customer;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class UpdateCustomerRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'customer_name' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:128'],
            'link_person' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:64'],
            'email' => ['nullable', 'email', 'max:128'],
            'fax' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:32'],
            'avatar_url' => ['nullable', 'url', 'max:500'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'customer_name.max' => '客户名称不能超过128字',
            'link_person.max' => '联系人不能超过64字',
            'email.email' => '邮箱格式不正确',
            'email.max' => '邮箱不能超过128字符',
            'fax.max' => '传真号码不能超过32字',
            'avatar_url.url' => '头像链接格式不正确',
            'avatar_url.max' => '头像链接不能超过500字符',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `CreateAddressRequest` — 创建收货地址

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Customer;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class CreateAddressRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'customer_name' => ['required', 'string', 'max:128'],
            'link_person' => ['required', 'string', 'max:64'],
            'mobile_phone' => ['required', 'regex:/^1[3-9]\d{9}$/'],
            'province_name' => ['required', 'string', 'max:64'],
            'city_name' => ['required', 'string', 'max:64'],
            'county_name' => ['required', 'string', 'max:64'],
            'detail_address' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'type' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'in:0,1'],
            'is_default' => ['nullable', 'boolean'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'customer_name.required' => '收货人姓名不能为空',
            'customer_name.max' => '收货人姓名不能超过128字',
            'link_person.required' => '联系人不能为空',
            'link_person.max' => '联系人不能超过64字',
            'mobile_phone.required' => '手机号不能为空',
            'mobile_phone.regex' => '手机号格式不正确',
            'province_name.required' => '省份不能为空',
            'city_name.required' => '城市不能为空',
            'county_name.required' => '区县不能为空',
            'detail_address.required' => '详细地址不能为空',
            'detail_address.max' => '详细地址不能超过255字',
            'type.in' => '地址类型不正确',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `UpdateAddressRequest` — 更新收货地址

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Customer;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class UpdateAddressRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'address_id' => ['required', 'integer', 'exists:customer_addresses,id'],
            'customer_name' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:128'],
            'link_person' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:64'],
            'mobile_phone' => ['nullable', 'regex:/^1[3-9]\d{9}$/'],
            'province_name' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:64'],
            'city_name' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:64'],
            'county_name' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:64'],
            'detail_address' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'type' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'in:0,1'],
            'is_default' => ['nullable', 'boolean'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'address_id.required' => '地址ID不能为空',
            'address_id.exists' => '地址不存在',
            'customer_name.max' => '收货人姓名不能超过128字',
            'link_person.max' => '联系人不能超过64字',
            'mobile_phone.regex' => '手机号格式不正确',
            'province_name.max' => '省份名称不能超过64字',
            'city_name.max' => '城市名称不能超过64字',
            'county_name.max' => '区县名称不能超过64字',
            'detail_address.max' => '详细地址不能超过255字',
            'type.in' => '地址类型不正确',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `CreateBrandRequest` — 创建品牌资质

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Customer;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class CreateBrandRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'brand_name' => ['required', 'string', 'max:128'],
            'logo_url' => ['nullable', 'url', 'max:500'],
            'trademark_type' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'in:0,1,2'],
            'trademark_reg_no' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:64'],
            'entruster' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:128'],
            'end_valid_date' => ['nullable', 'date'],
            'picture' => ['nullable', 'url', 'max:500'],
            'type' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'in:0,1,2,3'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'brand_name.required' => '品牌名称不能为空',
            'brand_name.max' => '品牌名称不能超过128字',
            'logo_url.url' => 'Logo链接格式不正确',
            'trademark_type.in' => '商标类型不正确',
            'trademark_reg_no.max' => '商标注册号不能超过64字',
            'entruster.max' => '委托人不能超过128字',
            'end_valid_date.date' => '有效期格式不正确',
            'picture.url' => '资质图片链接格式不正确',
            'type.in' => '资质类型不正确',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `UpdateBrandRequest` — 更新品牌资质

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Customer;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class UpdateBrandRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'brand_id' => ['required', 'integer', 'exists:customer_brands,id'],
            'brand_name' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:128'],
            'logo_url' => ['nullable', 'url', 'max:500'],
            'trademark_reg_no' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:64'],
            'entruster' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:128'],
            'end_valid_date' => ['nullable', 'date'],
            'picture' => ['nullable', 'url', 'max:500'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'brand_id.required' => '品牌ID不能为空',
            'brand_id.exists' => '品牌资质不存在',
            'brand_name.max' => '品牌名称不能超过128字',
            'logo_url.url' => 'Logo链接格式不正确',
            'trademark_reg_no.max' => '商标注册号不能超过64字',
            'entruster.max' => '委托人不能超过128字',
            'end_valid_date.date' => '有效期格式不正确',
            'picture.url' => '资质图片链接格式不正确',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `CreateSubAccountRequest` — 创建子账号

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Customer;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class CreateSubAccountRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'username' => ['required', 'string', 'max:64', 'unique:sub_accounts,username'],
            'real_name' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:64'],
            'phone' => ['required', 'regex:/^1[3-9]\d{9}$/'],
            'email' => ['nullable', 'email', 'max:128'],
            'password' => ['required', 'string', 'min:6', 'max:32'],
            'role' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'permission_mask' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'min:0'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'username.required' => '子账号用户名不能为空',
            'username.max' => '用户名不能超过64字',
            'username.unique' => '该用户名已被使用',
            'real_name.max' => '真实姓名不能超过64字',
            'phone.required' => '手机号不能为空',
            'phone.regex' => '手机号格式不正确',
            'email.email' => '邮箱格式不正确',
            'password.required' => '密码不能为空',
            'password.min' => '密码长度至少6位',
            'password.max' => '密码长度不能超过32位',
            'permission_mask.min' => '权限掩码不能为负数',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `UpdateSubAccountRequest` — 更新子账号

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Customer;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class UpdateSubAccountRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'sub_account_id' => ['required', 'integer', 'exists:sub_accounts,id'],
            'real_name' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:64'],
            'phone' => ['nullable', 'regex:/^1[3-9]\d{9}$/'],
            'email' => ['nullable', 'email', 'max:128'],
            'role' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'permission_mask' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'status' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'in:0,1'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'sub_account_id.required' => '子账号ID不能为空',
            'sub_account_id.exists' => '子账号不存在',
            'real_name.max' => '真实姓名不能超过64字',
            'phone.regex' => '手机号格式不正确',
            'email.email' => '邮箱格式不正确',
            'permission_mask.min' => '权限掩码不能为负数',
            'status.in' => '账号状态不正确',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `BindPhoneRequest` — 绑定手机号

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Customer;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class BindPhoneRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'mobile_phone' => ['required', 'regex:/^1[3-9]\d{9}$/'],
            'sms_code' => ['required', 'digits:6'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'mobile_phone.required' => '手机号不能为空',
            'mobile_phone.regex' => '手机号格式不正确',
            'sms_code.required' => '短信验证码不能为空',
            'sms_code.digits' => '短信验证码必须是6位数字',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `ChangePasswordRequest` — 修改登录密码

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Customer;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class ChangePasswordRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'old_password' => ['required', 'string', 'min:6', 'max:32'],
            'new_password' => [
                'required',
                'string',
                'min:8',
                'max:32',
                'regex:/[a-z]/',
                'regex:/[A-Z]/',
                'regex:/[0-9]/',
                'regex:/[^a-zA-Z0-9]/',
                'confirmed',
            ],
            'new_password_confirmation' => ['required', 'string'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'old_password.required' => '原密码不能为空',
            'new_password.required' => '新密码不能为空',
            'new_password.min' => '新密码长度至少8位',
            'new_password.max' => '新密码长度不能超过32位',
            'new_password.regex' => '新密码必须包含大小写字母、数字和特殊字符',
            'new_password.confirmed' => '两次输入的新密码不一致',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `ForgotPasswordRequest` — 忘记密码（发送验证码）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Auth;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class ForgotPasswordRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return true;
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'mobile_phone' => ['required', 'regex:/^1[3-9]\d{9}$/'],
            'captcha' => ['required', 'string', 'min:4', 'max:6'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'mobile_phone.required' => '手机号不能为空',
            'mobile_phone.regex' => '手机号格式不正确',
            'captcha.required' => '图形验证码不能为空',
            'captcha.min' => '图形验证码长度不正确',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `ResetPasswordRequest` — 重置密码

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Auth;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class ResetPasswordRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return true;
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'mobile_phone' => ['required', 'regex:/^1[3-9]\d{9}$/'],
            'sms_code' => ['required', 'digits:6'],
            'new_password' => [
                'required',
                'string',
                'min:8',
                'max:32',
                'regex:/[a-z]/',
                'regex:/[A-Z]/',
                'regex:/[0-9]/',
                'regex:/[^a-zA-Z0-9]/',
                'confirmed',
            ],
            'new_password_confirmation' => ['required', 'string'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'mobile_phone.required' => '手机号不能为空',
            'mobile_phone.regex' => '手机号格式不正确',
            'sms_code.required' => '短信验证码不能为空',
            'sms_code.digits' => '短信验证码必须是6位数字',
            'new_password.required' => '新密码不能为空',
            'new_password.min' => '新密码长度至少8位',
            'new_password.regex' => '新密码必须包含大小写字母、数字和特殊字符',
            'new_password.confirmed' => '两次输入的新密码不一致',
        ];
    }
}
```

### 8.6.4 支付模块

#### `CreatePayOrderRequest` — 创建支付单

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Pay;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class CreatePayOrderRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'order_sn' => ['required', 'string', 'max:32', 'exists:orders,order_sn'],
            'pay_type' => ['required', 'integer', 'in:1,3,8'],
            'pay_channel' => ['required', 'string', 'in:wechat,alipay,pre_deposit,transfer'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'order_sn.required' => '订单编号不能为空',
            'order_sn.exists' => '订单不存在',
            'pay_type.required' => '支付方式不能为空',
            'pay_type.in' => '支付方式不正确',
            'pay_channel.required' => '支付渠道不能为空',
            'pay_channel.in' => '支付渠道不正确',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `ApplyPayUrlRequest` — 申请支付链接

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Pay;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class ApplyPayUrlRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'order_sn' => ['required', 'string', 'max:32', 'exists:orders,order_sn'],
            'pay_channel' => ['required', 'string', 'in:wechat,alipay'],
            'return_url' => ['nullable', 'url', 'max:500'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'order_sn.required' => '订单编号不能为空',
            'order_sn.exists' => '订单不存在',
            'pay_channel.required' => '支付渠道不能为空',
            'pay_channel.in' => '仅支持微信或支付宝支付',
            'return_url.url' => '回调地址格式不正确',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `PreDepositPayRequest` — 预存款支付

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Pay;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class PreDepositPayRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'order_sn' => ['required', 'string', 'max:32', 'exists:orders,order_sn'],
            'pay_password' => ['required', 'string', 'min:6', 'max:32'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'order_sn.required' => '订单编号不能为空',
            'order_sn.exists' => '订单不存在',
            'pay_password.required' => '支付密码不能为空',
            'pay_password.min' => '支付密码长度至少6位',
        ];
    }
}
```

### 8.6.5 物流模块

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Delivery;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class CreateDeliveryRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'order_sn' => ['required', 'string', 'max:32', 'exists:orders,order_sn'],
            'express_company' => ['required', 'string', 'max:64'],
            'express_number' => ['required', 'string', 'max:64'],
            'delivery_type' => ['required', 'integer', 'in:0,1,2'],
            'shipper_name' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:64'],
            'shipper_phone' => ['nullable', 'regex:/^1[3-9]\d{9}$/'],
            'shipper_address' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'order_sn.required' => '订单编号不能为空',
            'order_sn.exists' => '订单不存在',
            'express_company.required' => '快递公司不能为空',
            'express_company.max' => '快递公司名称不能超过64字',
            'express_number.required' => '快递单号不能为空',
            'express_number.max' => '快递单号不能超过64字',
            'delivery_type.required' => '配送方式不能为空',
            'delivery_type.in' => '配送方式不正确',
            'shipper_phone.regex' => '发货人手机号格式不正确',
            'shipper_address.max' => '发货地址不能超过255字',
        ];
    }
}
```

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Delivery;

{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

            'order_sn' => ['required', 'string', 'max:32', 'exists:orders,order_sn'],
            'delivery_address_id' => ['required', 'integer', 'exists:customer_addresses,id'],

            'order_sn.exists' => '订单不存在',
            'delivery_address_id.required' => '配送地址ID不能为空',
```

### 8.6.6 售后模块

#### `CreateAfterSaleRequest` — 创建售后申请

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\AfterSale;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class CreateAfterSaleRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'order_id' => ['required', 'integer', 'exists:orders,id'],
            'type' => ['required', 'integer', 'in:0,1,2,3'],
            'reason' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0', 'max:10'],
            'reason_desc' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:500'],
            'refund_amount' => ['nullable', 'numeric', 'min:0'],
            'evidence_urls' => ['nullable', 'array', 'max:9'],
            'evidence_urls.*' => ['url', 'max:500'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'order_id.required' => '订单ID不能为空',
            'order_id.exists' => '订单不存在',
            'type.required' => '售后类型不能为空',
            'type.in' => '售后类型不正确',
            'reason.required' => '售后原因不能为空',
            'reason.max' => '售后原因选择不正确',
            'reason_desc.max' => '原因描述不能超过500字',
            'refund_amount.numeric' => '退款金额格式不正确',
            'refund_amount.min' => '退款金额不能为负数',
            'evidence_urls.max' => '凭证图片最多上传9张',
            'evidence_urls.*.url' => '凭证图片链接格式不正确',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `ReplyAfterSaleRequest` — 售后回复/沟通

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\AfterSale;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class ReplyAfterSaleRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'after_sale_id' => ['required', 'integer', 'exists:after_sales,id'],
            'content' => ['required', 'string', 'max:1000'],
            'attachments' => ['nullable', 'array', 'max:9'],
            'attachments.*' => ['url', 'max:500'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'after_sale_id.required' => '售后单ID不能为空',
            'after_sale_id.exists' => '售后单不存在',
            'content.required' => '回复内容不能为空',
            'content.max' => '回复内容不能超过1000字',
            'attachments.max' => '附件最多上传9个',
            'attachments.*.url' => '附件链接格式不正确',
        ];
    }
}
```

```php
    public function authorize(): bool

    }

            'after_sale_id' => ['required', 'integer', 'exists:after_sales,id'],
```

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Notification;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class UpdateNotificationSettingRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'email_enabled' => ['nullable', 'boolean'],
            'sms_enabled' => ['nullable', 'boolean'],
            'wechat_enabled' => ['nullable', 'boolean'],
            'order_notify' => ['nullable', 'boolean'],
            'promotion_notify' => ['nullable', 'boolean'],
            'system_notify' => ['nullable', 'boolean'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'email_enabled.boolean' => '邮箱通知设置格式不正确',
            'sms_enabled.boolean' => '短信通知设置格式不正确',
            'wechat_enabled.boolean' => '微信通知设置格式不正确',
            'order_notify.boolean' => '订单通知设置格式不正确',
            'promotion_notify.boolean' => '活动通知设置格式不正确',
            'system_notify.boolean' => '系统通知设置格式不正确',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `MarkNotificationReadRequest` — 标记通知已读

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Notification;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class MarkNotificationReadRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'notification_ids' => ['required', 'array', 'min:1'],
            'notification_ids.*' => ['integer', 'exists:notifications,id'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'notification_ids.required' => '通知ID列表不能为空',
            'notification_ids.min' => '至少需要选择一个通知',
            'notification_ids.*.integer' => '通知ID格式不正确',
            'notification_ids.*.exists' => '通知不存在',
        ];
    }
}
```

### 8.6.8 工单模块

#### `CreateTicketRequest` — 创建工单

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Ticket;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class CreateTicketRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'subject' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'content' => ['required', 'string', 'max:2000'],
            'ticket_category' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'complaint_type' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:0'],
            'priority' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'in:1,2,3,4'],
            'order_sn' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:32', 'exists:orders,order_sn'],
            'attachments' => ['nullable', 'array', 'max:9'],
            'attachments.*' => ['url', 'max:500'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'subject.required' => '工单主题不能为空',
            'subject.max' => '工单主题不能超过255字',
            'content.required' => '工单内容不能为空',
            'content.max' => '工单内容不能超过2000字',
            'ticket_category.required' => '工单分类不能为空',
            'complaint_type.required' => '投诉类型不能为空',
            'priority.in' => '优先级选择不正确',
            'order_sn.exists' => '关联订单不存在',
            'attachments.max' => '附件最多上传9个',
            'attachments.*.url' => '附件链接格式不正确',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `ReplyTicketRequest` — 回复工单

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Ticket;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class ReplyTicketRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'ticket_id' => ['required', 'integer', 'exists:tickets,id'],
            'content' => ['required', 'string', 'max:2000'],
            'attachments' => ['nullable', 'array', 'max:9'],
            'attachments.*' => ['url', 'max:500'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'ticket_id.required' => '工单ID不能为空',
            'ticket_id.exists' => '工单不存在',
            'content.required' => '回复内容不能为空',
            'content.max' => '回复内容不能超过2000字',
            'attachments.max' => '附件最多上传9个',
            'attachments.*.url' => '附件链接格式不正确',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `RateTicketRequest` — 工单评价/确认解决

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Ticket;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class RateTicketRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'ticket_id' => ['required', 'integer', 'exists:tickets,id'],
            'rating' => ['required', 'integer', 'between:1,5'],
            'content' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:500'],
            'is_resolved' => ['required', 'boolean'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'ticket_id.required' => '工单ID不能为空',
            'ticket_id.exists' => '工单不存在',
            'rating.required' => '请对工单处理进行评分',
            'rating.between' => '评分必须在1到5之间',
            'content.max' => '评价内容不能超过500字',
            'is_resolved.required' => '请选择是否已解决',
            'is_resolved.boolean' => '是否解决字段格式不正确',
        ];
    }
}
```

### 8.6.9 优惠券模块

#### `ReceiveCouponRequest` — 领取优惠券

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Coupon;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class ReceiveCouponRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'coupon_id' => ['required', 'integer', 'exists:coupons,id'],
            'scene' => ['nullable', 'string', 'in:center,new_customer,activity'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'coupon_id.required' => '优惠券ID不能为空',
            'coupon_id.exists' => '优惠券不存在',
            'scene.in' => '领取场景不正确',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `UseCouponRequest` — 使用优惠券

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Coupon;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class UseCouponRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'customer_coupon_id' => ['required', 'integer', 'exists:customer_coupons,id'],
            'order_sn' => ['required', 'string', 'max:32', 'exists:orders,order_sn'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'customer_coupon_id.required' => '优惠券ID不能为空',
            'customer_coupon_id.exists' => '优惠券不存在',
            'order_sn.required' => '订单编号不能为空',
            'order_sn.exists' => '订单不存在',
        ];
    }
}
```

### 8.6.10 发票模块

#### `ApplyInvoiceRequest` — 申请开票

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Invoice;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class ApplyInvoiceRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'order_id' => ['required', 'integer', 'exists:orders,id'],
            'title_type' => ['required', 'integer', 'in:1,2'],
            'invoice_category' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:1'],
            'company_name' => ['required', 'string', 'max:128'],
            'tax_number' => ['required', 'string', 'max:32'],
            'register_address' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
            'register_phone' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:32'],
            'bank_name' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:128'],
            'bank_account' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:64'],
            'email' => ['required', 'email', 'max:128'],
            'amount' => ['required', 'numeric', 'min:0.01'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'order_id.required' => '订单ID不能为空',
            'order_id.exists' => '订单不存在',
            'title_type.required' => '发票类型不能为空',
            'title_type.in' => '发票类型不正确',
            'invoice_category.required' => '发票类目不能为空',
            'company_name.required' => '公司名称不能为空',
            'company_name.max' => '公司名称不能超过128字',
            'tax_number.required' => '税号不能为空',
            'tax_number.max' => '税号不能超过32字',
            'register_address.max' => '注册地址不能超过255字',
            'register_phone.max' => '注册电话不能超过32字',
            'bank_name.max' => '开户行不能超过128字',
            'bank_account.max' => '银行账号不能超过64字',
            'email.required' => '接收邮箱不能为空',
            'email.email' => '邮箱格式不正确',
            'amount.required' => '开票金额不能为空',
            'amount.min' => '开票金额必须大于0',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `AuditInvoiceRequest` — 发票审核（管理后台）

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Invoice;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class AuditInvoiceRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('admin')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'invoice_id' => ['required', 'integer', 'exists:invoices,id'],
            'status' => ['required', 'integer', 'in:2,3,4'],
            'electronic_url' => ['nullable', 'url', 'max:500'],
            'express_company' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:64'],
            'express_number' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:64'],
            'remark' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:500'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'invoice_id.required' => '发票ID不能为空',
            'invoice_id.exists' => '发票记录不存在',
            'status.required' => '审核状态不能为空',
            'status.in' => '审核状态不正确',
            'electronic_url.url' => '电子发票链接格式不正确',
            'express_company.max' => '快递公司名称不能超过64字',
            'express_number.max' => '快递单号不能超过64字',
            'remark.max' => '备注不能超过500字',
        ];
    }
}
```

### 8.6.11 样品模块

#### `CreateSampleOrderRequest` — 创建样品订单

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Sample;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class CreateSampleOrderRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'sample_product_id' => ['required', 'integer', 'exists:sample_products,id'],
            'quantity' => ['required', 'integer', 'min:1', 'max:999'],
            'delivery_address_id' => ['required', 'integer', 'exists:customer_addresses,id'],
            'remark' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:500'],
            'pay_channel' => ['required', 'string', 'in:wechat,alipay,pre_deposit'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'sample_product_id.required' => '样品ID不能为空',
            'sample_product_id.exists' => '样品不存在或已下架',
            'quantity.required' => '购买数量不能为空',
            'quantity.min' => '购买数量至少为1',
            'quantity.max' => '购买数量不能超过999',
            'delivery_address_id.required' => '请选择收货地址',
            'delivery_address_id.exists' => '收货地址不存在',
            'remark.max' => '备注不能超过500字',
            'pay_channel.required' => '请选择支付方式',
            'pay_channel.in' => '支付方式不正确',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `PaySampleOrderRequest` — 支付样品订单

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Sample;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class PaySampleOrderRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'sample_order_sn' => ['required', 'string', 'max:32'],
            'pay_channel' => ['required', 'string', 'in:wechat,alipay,pre_deposit'],
            'pay_password' => ['nullable', 'string', 'min:6', 'max:32'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'sample_order_sn.required' => '样品订单编号不能为空',
            'pay_channel.required' => '支付方式不能为空',
            'pay_channel.in' => '支付方式不正确',
            'pay_password.min' => '支付密码长度至少6位',
        ];
    }
}
```

### 8.6.12 门店模块

#### `SearchStoreRequest` — 搜索门店

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Store;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class SearchStoreRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return true;
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'keyword' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:100'],
            'province_name' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:64'],
            'city_name' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:64'],
            'county_name' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:64'],
            'page' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'min:1'],
            'page_size' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'min:1', 'max:100'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'keyword.max' => '搜索关键词不能超过100字',
            'province_name.max' => '省份名称不能超过64字',
            'city_name.max' => '城市名称不能超过64字',
            'county_name.max' => '区县名称不能超过64字',
            'page.min' => '页码不能小于1',
            'page_size.min' => '每页数量不能小于1',
            'page_size.max' => '每页数量不能超过100',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `GetNearbyStoresRequest` — 获取附近门店

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Store;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class GetNearbyStoresRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return true;
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'longitude' => ['required', 'numeric', 'between:-180,180'],
            'latitude' => ['required', 'numeric', 'between:-90,90'],
            'radius' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'min:1', 'max:50000'],
            'page' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'min:1'],
            'page_size' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'min:1', 'max:100'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'longitude.required' => '经度不能为空',
            'longitude.between' => '经度范围不正确',
            'latitude.required' => '纬度不能为空',
            'latitude.between' => '纬度范围不正确',
            'radius.min' => '搜索半径不能小于1米',
            'radius.max' => '搜索半径不能超过50公里',
            'page.min' => '页码不能小于1',
            'page_size.min' => '每页数量不能小于1',
            'page_size.max' => '每页数量不能超过100',
        ];
    }
}
```

### 8.6.13 平台代发模块

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Platform;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class BindPlatformShopRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'platform_type' => ['required', 'integer', 'in:1,2,3,4'],
            'shop_name' => ['required', 'string', 'max:128'],
            'platform_shop_id' => ['required', 'string', 'max:64'],
            'auth_code' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'platform_type.required' => '平台类型不能为空',
            'platform_type.in' => '平台类型不正确，仅支持淘宝、拼多多、抖音、阿里巴巴',
            'shop_name.required' => '店铺名称不能为空',
            'shop_name.max' => '店铺名称不能超过128字',
            'platform_shop_id.required' => '平台店铺ID不能为空',
            'platform_shop_id.max' => '平台店铺ID不能超过64字',
            'auth_code.required' => '授权码不能为空',
        ];
    }
}
```

#### `SyncPlatformOrdersRequest` — 同步平台订单

```php
<?php

namespace App\Http\Requests\Platform;

use Illuminate\Foundation\Http\FormRequest;

class SyncPlatformOrdersRequest extends FormRequest
{
    public function authorize(): bool
    {
        return auth('customer')->check();
    }

    public function rules(): array
    {
        return [
            'platform_shop_id' => ['required', 'integer', 'exists:platform_shops,id'],
            'start_time' => ['nullable', 'date'],
            'end_time' => ['nullable', 'date', 'after_or_equal:start_time'],
            'order_status' => ['nullable', 'integer'],
            'page' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'min:1'],
            'page_size' => ['nullable', 'integer', 'min:1', 'max:100'],
        ];
    }

    public function messages(): array
    {
        return [
            'platform_shop_id.required' => '平台店铺ID不能为空',
            'platform_shop_id.exists' => '平台店铺不存在',
            'start_time.date' => '开始时间格式不正确',
            'end_time.date' => '结束时间格式不正确',
            'end_time.after_or_equal' => '结束时间不能早于开始时间',
            'page.min' => '页码不能小于1',
            'page_size.min' => '每页数量不能小于1',
            'page_size.max' => '每页数量不能超过100',
        ];
    }
}
```
